bridges.text: Today's Simon Willison weblog "Sightings" (May 2, JS app fetching iNaturalist data via Claude Code for web) + Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync (cross-cloud agent-identity primitive in production preview) is mixed-direction signal; dimension `none`. Reason: Sightings is lightweight HTML rather than headless; the Agent Registry primitive advances via Agent 365 Registry Sync. Coherence 1/5. Remaining gap: no clear convergent headless-architecture standardization signal yet.

Reason: Sightings is lightweight HTML rather than headless; the Agent Registry primitive advances via Agent 365 Registry Sync. Coherence 1/5. Remaining gap: no clear convergent headless-architecture standardization signal yet.
text_locales.ja: 本日の国防総省 8社分裂 + Anthropic 6か月サンセット + NSA Project Aether(Pentagon が調達拒否した Mythos に NSA が依存)+ Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync は予測の `landing` 要素(資金源によって決まるフロンティアモデル提供トポロジー; マルチランタイムをマルチフロンティアベンダーが置換)を支持する。理由: 8社コホート・トポロジー + Mythos-via-NSA ループホールが調達スタックと能力スタックの最も澄んだ運用上の分裂。Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: Bedrock + Foundry チャネル以外の正式なフロンティア研究所 × Tier-1 クラウド排他開示はなし。
text_locales.es: División Pentágono 8-vendor de hoy + sunset Anthropic 6-mes + NSA Project Aether (NSA depende de Mythos que Pentágono rehusó adquirir) + Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync apoya el componente `landing` de la predicción (topología frontier-model serving dictada por funding origin; multi-frontier-vendor reemplaza multi-runtime). Razón: topología cohort 8-vendor + loophole Mythos-via-NSA es la división operativa más limpia entre procurement-stack y capability-stack. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: no hay disclosure formal de exclusividad frontier-lab × Tier-1-cloud más allá de canales Bedrock + Foundry.
text_locales.fil: Today's Pentagon 8-vendor split + Anthropic 6-month sunset + NSA Project Aether (NSA umaasa sa Mythos na tinanggihan ng Pentagon na i-procure) + Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync ay nag-su-suporta sa `landing` component ng prediction (frontier-model serving topology dictated by funding origin; multi-frontier-vendor replaces multi-runtime). Reason: 8-vendor cohort topology + Mythos-via-NSA loophole ay ang cleanest operative split sa pagitan ng procurement-stack at capability-stack. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: walang formal frontier-lab × Tier-1-cloud exclusivity disclosure beyond Bedrock + Foundry channels.

bridges.text: Today's Simon Willison weblog (lightweight HTML, not headless) + arxiv 2604.27776 WindowsWorld GUI-agent benchmark (counter-evidence) + Microsoft Agent 365 "agent inventory" surface (Agent-Registry-adjacent) is mixed-direction; dimension `none`. Reason: the signal is split between counter-evidence (GUI research, lightweight HTML) and mild support (agent-inventory primitive). Coherence 1/5. Remaining gap: no clear convergent headless-architecture standardization signal yet.

text_locales.en: Today's Simon Willison weblog (lightweight HTML, not headless) + arxiv 2604.27776 WindowsWorld GUI-agent benchmark (counter-evidence) + Microsoft Agent 365 "agent inventory" surface (Agent-Registry-adjacent) is mixed-direction; dimension `none`. text_locales.ja: 本日のPowell 5/15超 在任継続 + Warsh上院銀行委承認 + Powell任期2028までの留任が `because`(市場心理の転換)を支持。Reason: "shadow chair"フレーミングから正式Boardマージナルスイングへの構造変化が公的に交渉中。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: WarshチェアマンでのDissent投票数がまだ印字されず;≤2 dissent norm予測は未観測。
text_locales.es: Powell se queda más allá del 15/5 + confirmación Warsh Senate Banking + Powell en Board hasta 2028 de hoy apoyan `because` (pivote de psicología de mercado). Reason: el cambio estructural del encuadre "shadow chair" a swing-marginal-Board formal está ahora siendo negociado públicamente. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: el conteo de votos de disidencia bajo el Chair Warsh aún no ha impreso; la proyección de norma de disidencia ≤2 está sin observar.
text_locales.fil: Ang Powell stays past May 15 + Warsh Senate Banking confirm + Powell on Board hanggang 2028 ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `because` (market-psychology pivot). Reason: ang structural shift mula "shadow chair" framing patungo sa formal-Board-marginal-swing ay publicly negotiated na. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ang dissent-vote count sa ilalim ng Warsh Chair ay hindi pa naka-print; ang ≤2 dissent norm projection ay unobserved.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **"Headless Everything" architecture standardizes.** Simon Willison's Apr 19 thesis — that personal AI is faster and more reliable hitting headless services than driving a GUI — frames an axis against browser-operating agents (Claude in Chrome, etc.). By H2 2026, expect a "headless-preferred" metadata standard on MCP / Agent Registry surfaces.

description.en: **OAuth trust between AI SaaS becomes the top enterprise risk.** The Vercel-Context.ai case shows how an employee's personal AI Office SaaS connection can turn into the breach path for the company's whole Google Workspace. By Q3 2026, major SSO providers (Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace) will **carve out an "AI extension" OAuth scope category**, letting administrators block "Allow All" defaults wholesale. CASB / SSPM vendors will report "data volume read by AI integrations" as an independent metric.
description.ja: **AI SaaS 間の OAuth 横断信任が最大のエンタープライズリスクに** — Vercel–Context.ai 事例は、社員が個人で連携した AI Office SaaS が企業の Google Workspace 全体を侵害経路に変えることを示した。2026 Q3 までに、主要 SSO プロバイダ（Okta / Entra ID / Google Workspace）は **AI SaaS 向け OAuth スコープを "AI 拡張" カテゴリとして分離**、管理者が「Allow All」既定を一括ブロックできる制御を標準化する。CASB / SSPM ベンダーも「AI 連携が閲覧する企業データ量」を独立メトリクスとしてレポート化する。

nodes.short_label: The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the n…
nodes.description: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. CASB / SSPM vendors will measure "API calls touched by AI agents" with a separate SLO / risk score from human-user baselines.

description.ja: **「Agent Control Plane」がハイパースケーラ競争の新主戦場に** — Google の Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、AWS Bedrock AgentCore の新 Managed Harness / CLI / skills、OpenAI の Workspace Agents は、いずれも「エージェントのライフサイクル管理・監査・ガバナンス」を単一コントロールプレーンに束ねる同一方向の戦略。2026 Q3 までに、Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace の SSO レイヤはエージェント識別子を人間 / サービスアカウントと同等の第一級オブジェクトとして扱い、CASB / SSPM ベンダは「AI エージェントが触れる API 呼び出し量」を人間ユーザ基準とは別の SLO / リスクスコアで計測する標準に移行する。

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「Agent Control Plane」がハイパースケーラ競争の新主戦場に** — Google の Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform、AWS Bedrock AgentCore の新 Managed Harness / CLI / skills、OpenAI の Workspace Agents は、いずれも「エージェントのライフサイクル管理・監査・ガバナンス」を単一コントロールプレーンに束ねる同一方向の戦略。2026 Q3 までに、Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace の SSO レイヤはエージェント識別子を人間 / サービスアカウントと同等の第一級オブジェクトとして扱い、CASB / SSPM ベンダは「AI エージェントが触れる API 呼び出し量」を人間ユーザ基準とは別の SLO / リスクスコアで計測する標準に移行する。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **The "Agent Control Plane" becomes the new battleground in hyperscaler competition.** Google's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, AWS Bedrock AgentCore's new Managed Harness / CLI / skills, and OpenAI's Workspace Agents all converge on the same strategy: **bind the agent lifecycle, audit, and governance into a single control plane.** By Q3 2026, Okta / Microsoft Entra ID / Google Workspace SSO layers will treat agent identifiers as first-class objects alongside humans and service accounts. description.en: **Capital markets reset their valuation of "AI-agent-displaced enterprise SaaS" inside Q2 2026.** ServiceNow's **-18% (worst single-day drop ever)** on Apr 23, IBM's same-day decline, and the chained falls of Salesforce / Workday / Oracle reveal a shift in how capital markets weigh "AI cost-savings benefit" vs "AI displacement of legacy workflow SaaS." Inside Q2 2026, expect Gartner / Forrester Magic Quadrant / Wave reports to make the "Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS" axis explicit, and market-cap math to move from "seats × ARPU" to "share of API calls touched by agents." Lagging analyst consensus updates mean another 3-5 names (Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet etc.) likely see 15%+ drops in the next two quarters.
description.ja: **「AI エージェントに displace されるエンタープライズ SaaS」の金融市場評価が 2026 Q2 中にリセット** — ServiceNow の Apr 23 の **-18%（過去最悪の 1 日下落）** と IBM の同日下落、Salesforce / Workday / Oracle の連鎖下落は、「AI のコスト削減恩恵 < AI による既存ワークフロー自動化による displace」への資本市場の評価軸シフトの現れ。2026 Q2 中に Gartner / Forrester の Magic Quadrant / Wave 系レポートで「Agent-native vs Legacy SaaS」の二軸化が明示され、時価総額評価は「シート数 × ARPU」から「エージェントが触る API 呼び出しの占有度」に移行。アナリストコンセンサス更新の遅行により、向こう 2 四半期で同様の 15%+ 暴落が Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet など 3-5 社で再発。

nodes.label: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Iden…
nodes.description: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel.

short_label.ja: AI への世論的反発が拘束力のあるエージェント ガバナンス規則へ転化
short_label.es: El rechazo público a la IA se convierte…

description.en: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel.
description.ja: **AI への世論的反発が拘束力のあるエージェント ガバナンス規則へ転化 — Q3 2026 までに米国の少なくとも 1 州が、Okta の Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway パターンを反映した「自律エージェントの法定アイデンティティ」法を可決。** 4/16 の Altman 自宅襲撃 + 4/15 CNBC のデータセンター反発記事 + 4/26 Salt Security データ (「組織の 48.9% が AI エージェント トラフィックを監視できていない」) + **4/30** Okta for AI Agents GA (Agent Discovery、Agent Gateway、仮想 MCP サーバ レジストリ、認証情報のボールティング + 自動ローテーション、ユニバーサル ログアウト) が規制を前倒しで引き寄せる。米国の州 (CA、NY、TX のいずれかが有力) が Q3 2026 までに **「エージェントを第一級アイデンティティとして登録、MCP コール チェーンのロギング、アクションごとの同意」** を義務付ける法令を成立させ、Cross App Access プロトコルのセマンティクスを反映。EU AI Act 第 26 条施行も並行して始動。
description.es: **El rechazo público a la IA se convierte en reglas vinculantes de gobernanza de agentes — para el Q3 2026 al menos un estado de EE. UU. promulga una ley de "Identidad Estatutaria para Agentes Autónomos" que refleja el patrón Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway de Okta.** Los ataques del 16/04 a la casa de Altman + el artículo de la CNBC del 15/04 sobre el rechazo a los centros de datos + los datos del 26/04 de Salt Security ("48,9% de las orgs no pueden monitorear el tráfico de agentes de IA") + la GA de Okta for AI Agents el **30/04** (con Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, registro virtual de servidores MCP, vault de credenciales + rotación automática, logout universal) componen un adelanto regulatorio. Un estado de EE. UU. (CA, NY o TX como candidatos probables) aprueba un estatuto para el Q3 2026 que obliga al **registro del agente como identidad de primera clase, registro de cadenas de llamadas MCP y consentimiento por acción**, reflejando la semántica del protocolo Cross App Access. La aplicación del Artículo 26 de la EU AI Act se activa en paralelo.
description.fil: **Magiging binding agent-governance rules ang public-opinion blowback laban sa AI — pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang US state ang magpapalabas ng "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act na nagre-replikate sa Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern ng Okta.** Ang 4/16 attacks sa bahay ni Altman + 4/15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + 4/26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA sa **4/30** (kasama ang Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) ang bumubuo ng regulatory pull-forward. Isang US state (CA, NY, o TX malamang) ang magpasa ng statute pagdating ng Q3 2026 na nag-uutos ng **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, at per-action consent**, na nagre-replikate sa Cross App Access protocol semantics. Mag-trigger din nang sabay ang EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement.

summary.en: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. A US state (CA, NY, or TX likely) ships a statute by Q3 2026 mandating **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, and per-action consent**, mirroring Cross App Access protocol semantics. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel.

(CA, NY o TX como candidatos probables) aprueba un estatuto para el Q3 2026 que obliga al **registro del agente como identidad de primera clase, registro de cadenas de llamadas MCP y consentimiento por acción**, reflejando la semántica del protocolo Cross App Access. La aplicación del Artículo 26 de la EU AI Act se activa en paralelo.
summary.fil: **Magiging binding agent-governance rules ang public-opinion blowback laban sa AI — pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang US state ang magpapalabas ng "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act na nagre-replikate sa Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern ng Okta.** Ang 4/16 attacks sa bahay ni Altman + 4/15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + 4/26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA sa **4/30** (kasama ang Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) ang bumubuo ng regulatory pull-forward. Isang US state (CA, NY, o TX malamang) ang magpasa ng statute pagdating ng Q3 2026 na nag-uutos ng **agent-as-first-class-identity registration, MCP-call-chain logging, at per-action consent**, na nagre-replikate sa Cross App Access protocol semantics. Mag-trigger din nang sabay ang EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement.

detail.description: **Public-opinion blowback against AI converts into binding agent-governance rules — by Q3 2026 at least one US state ships a "Statutory Identity for Autonomous Agents" Act mirroring Okta's Agent Discovery + Agent Gateway pattern.** Apr 16 attacks on Altman's home + the Apr 15 CNBC datacenter-blowback piece + Apr 26 Salt Security data ("48.9% of orgs cannot monitor AI-agent traffic") + Okta for AI Agents GA on **Apr 30** (with Agent Discovery, Agent Gateway, virtual-MCP-server registry, credential vaulting + auto-rotation, universal logout) compose a regulatory pull-forward. EU AI Act Article 26 enforcement triggers in parallel.

La aplicación del Artículo 26 de la EU AI Act se activa en paralelo.

nodes.description: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does.

description.en: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does.
description.ja: **Mag 7 決算 + FOMC(4/28-29)が、ハイパースケーラーによる初の**トークンあたりマージンゲート型設備投資**開示を2026年Q3までに引き出す — 4/27 OpenAI / Microsoft 協定 + Anthropic / AWS Trainium シリコンレベル契約が新ドクトリンを支える。** 2026年のMag 7合計設備投資 約$700B(Alphabet $175B-$185B、Amazon 約$200B、Meta $115B-$135B、Microsoft FY26 約$146BでFY27は$170Bへ)は、すでに「設備投資を信用で評価する」段階から「実利を要求する」段階へ移行した相場に着地する。**4/27の契約再構築はAIラボの計算需要をハイパースケーラー所有のシリコンへ明示的にルーティング**(AWS Trainium / Graviton with Anthropic; Meta Graviton CPU を大規模に)。2026年Q3までに、Big-3ハイパースケーラーの少なくとも1社が**Bedrock / Azure / Vertex のトークンあたりマージン下限に基づき増分GPU設備投資をゲート化**する公的開示を行う — 公開クラウドからの初の「AIインフラROIスレッショルド」。NVDA $5T級時価総額とAMD / Cerebras IPOの軌道は維持される; 支出曲線は折れないが、その開示言語は変わる。
description.es: **Los reportes de Mag 7 + FOMC 28-29 abr fuerzan la primera divulgación de **capex con compuerta de margen-por-token** de un hyperscaler para Q3 2026 — el pacto OpenAI/Microsoft del 27 abr + el acuerdo Anthropic/AWS Trainium a nivel de silicio anclan la nueva doctrina.** El capex Mag 7 combinado de ~$700B para 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 tendiendo a ~$170B FY27) aterriza en una cinta que ya ha cambiado de "premiar el capex por fe" a "exigir beneficio tangible". **Las reestructuraciones contractuales del 27 abr enrutan explícitamente el cómputo de los laboratorios IA a través de silicio propiedad del hyperscaler** (AWS Trainium/Graviton con Anthropic; CPUs Meta-Graviton a escala). Para Q3 2026 al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 públicamente **acota el capex GPU incremental sobre un piso de margen-por-token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** — primer "umbral ROI de AI-infra" explícito desde una nube pública. La capitalización clase $5T de NVDA y la trayectoria de IPO de AMD/Cerebras se mantienen; la curva de gasto no se rompe, pero su lenguaje de divulgación sí.
description.fil: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 ang magpipilit sa unang **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure mula sa hyperscaler pagdating ng Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal ang mga anchor ng bagong doctrine.** Ang pinagsamang Mag 7 capex na ~$700B para sa 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 nagpapatungo sa ~$170B FY27) ay babagsak sa isang tape na lumipat na mula "rewarding capex on faith" patungong "demanding tangible profit." **Tahasang nirou-route ng Apr 27 contract restructurings ang AI-lab compute sa hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton sa Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs sa scale). Pagdating ng Q3 2026, may isang Big-3 hyperscaler na publicly **nagga-gate ng incremental GPU capex sa Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — unang explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud. Mananatili ang NVDA $5T-class market cap at ang AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory; hindi mababasag ang spend curve, pero magbabago ang disclosure language nito.

By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does.

bridges.text: Today's $700B 2026 capex + AAPL +$100B buyback + Q3 +14-17% guide + AMD May 5 OpenAI 6GW H2 first-deployment timing + Powell stays past May 15 + Apr Jobs May 8 supports `because` (cohort capex pressure escalation into Q3 reporting cycle). Reason: AMD's H2 2026 OpenAI 6GW first-deployment commit is the most concrete per-token-margin-gated capex anchor yet visible. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no hyperscaler has yet disclosed per-token-margin-gated capex.

text_locales.en: Today's $700B 2026 capex + AAPL +$100B buyback + Q3 +14-17% guide + AMD May 5 OpenAI 6GW H2 first-deployment timing + Powell stays past May 15 + Apr Jobs May 8 supports `because` (cohort capex pressure escalation into Q3 reporting cycle). text_locales.ja: 本日 第二の基礎モデル研究所 × ハイパースケーラー契約改定はなし; AWS Bedrock Mythos Preview は Anthropic の Mythos 向け初のクロスクラウド・チャネル(4月7日)で Bedrock-as-distribution-layer がますます正常化; 次元 `none`. 理由: 予測は Q4 契約再構築シグナルを期待しているが着地していない。Coherence 1/5. Remaining gap: 第二の基礎モデル研究所 × ハイパースケーラー契約は公的に改定されていない。
text_locales.es: Hoy no produjo segundo contrato foundation-lab × hyperscaler modificado públicamente; AWS Bedrock Mythos Preview es primer canal cross-cloud Anthropic para Mythos (Apr 7), haciendo Bedrock-as-distribution-layer cada vez más normalizado; dimensión `none`. Razón: la predicción espera señal restructuración contrato Q4 que no ha aterrizado. Coherence 1/5. Remaining gap: no segundo contrato foundation-lab × hyperscaler modificado públicamente.
text_locales.fil: Today walang second foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract publicly amended; AWS Bedrock Mythos Preview ay first cross-cloud channel ng Anthropic para sa Mythos (Apr 7), making Bedrock-as-distribution-layer increasingly normalized; dimension `none`. Reason: ang prediction ay nag-a-asahan ng Q4 contract restructuring signal na hindi pa lumapag. Coherence 1/5. Remaining gap: walang second foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract publicly amended.

bridges.text: Today's $700B capex tape + AAPL +$100B buyback + Q3 +14-17% guide + Big Tech Q1 capex >$130B + BofA $1.3T 2026 chips forecast supports `because` (cohort capex pressure). Reason: the disclosure-precedent expansion (AAPL Q3) is the operative cohort signal, but the margin-gated capex line is still missing. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no hyperscaler has yet disclosed per-token-margin-gated capex.

text_locales.ja: 本日の7,000億ドルcapex + AAPL +$100B自社株買い + Q3 +14-17%ガイダンス + Big Tech Q1 capex >$130B + BofA $1.3T 2026チップ予測が `because`(集団capex圧)を支持。Reason: 開示先例拡大(AAPL Q3)が操作的集団シグナルだが、マージン基準capex行はまだ。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ハイパースケーラからper-token-margin-gated capexの開示が未だ。

Reason: la expansión de precedente de divulgación (AAPL Q3) es la señal operativa de cohorte, pero la línea de capex con margen-gated aún falta. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ningún hyperscaler ha divulgado capex per-token-margin-gated.
text_locales.fil: Ang $700B capex tape + AAPL +$100B buyback + Q3 +14-17% guide + Big Tech Q1 capex >$130B + BofA $1.3T 2026 chips forecast ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `because` (cohort capex pressure). Remaining gap: walang hyperscaler na nag-disclose pa ng per-token-margin-gated capex.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does.
detail.prediction_summary: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. NVDA $5T-class market cap and AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory hold; the spend curve doesn't break, but its disclosure language does.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 force the first **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure from a hyperscaler by Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal anchor the new doctrine.** Combined Mag 7 capex of ~$700B for 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 trending to ~$170B FY27) lands into a tape that has already shifted from "rewarding capex on faith" to "demanding tangible profit." **Apr 27 contract restructurings explicitly route AI-lab compute through hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton with Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs at scale). By Q3 2026 at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — first explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud. prediction_summary_locales.ja: **Mag 7 決算 + FOMC(4/28-29)が、ハイパースケーラーによる初の**トークンあたりマージンゲート型設備投資**開示を2026年Q3までに引き出す — 4/27 OpenAI / Microsoft 協定 + Anthropic / AWS Trainium シリコンレベル契約が新ドクトリンを支える。** 2026年のMag 7合計設備投資 約$700B(Alphabet $175B-$185B、Amazon 約$200B、Meta $115B-$135B、Microsoft FY26 約$146BでFY27は$170Bへ)は、すでに「設備投資を信用で評価する」段階から「実利を要求する」段階へ移行した相場に着地する。**4/27の契約再構築はAIラボの計算需要をハイパースケーラー所有のシリコンへ明示的にルーティング**(AWS Trainium / Graviton with Anthropic; Meta Graviton CPU を大規模に)。2026年Q3までに、Big-3ハイパースケーラーの少なくとも1社が**Bedrock / Azure / Vertex のトークンあたりマージン下限に基づき増分GPU設備投資をゲート化**する公的開示を行う — 公開クラウドからの初の「AIインフラROIスレッショルド」。NVDA $5T級時価総額とAMD / Cerebras IPOの軌道は維持される; 支出曲線は折れないが、その開示言語は変わる。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Los reportes de Mag 7 + FOMC 28-29 abr fuerzan la primera divulgación de **capex con compuerta de margen-por-token** de un hyperscaler para Q3 2026 — el pacto OpenAI/Microsoft del 27 abr + el acuerdo Anthropic/AWS Trainium a nivel de silicio anclan la nueva doctrina.** El capex Mag 7 combinado de ~$700B para 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 tendiendo a ~$170B FY27) aterriza en una cinta que ya ha cambiado de "premiar el capex por fe" a "exigir beneficio tangible". **Las reestructuraciones contractuales del 27 abr enrutan explícitamente el cómputo de los laboratorios IA a través de silicio propiedad del hyperscaler** (AWS Trainium/Graviton con Anthropic; CPUs Meta-Graviton a escala). Para Q3 2026 al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 públicamente **acota el capex GPU incremental sobre un piso de margen-por-token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** — primer "umbral ROI de AI-infra" explícito desde una nube pública. La capitalización clase $5T de NVDA y la trayectoria de IPO de AMD/Cerebras se mantienen; la curva de gasto no se rompe, pero su lenguaje de divulgación sí.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Mag 7 prints + FOMC Apr 28-29 ang magpipilit sa unang **per-token-margin-gated capex** disclosure mula sa hyperscaler pagdating ng Q3 2026 — Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft pact + Anthropic/AWS Trainium silicon-level deal ang mga anchor ng bagong doctrine.** Ang pinagsamang Mag 7 capex na ~$700B para sa 2026 (Alphabet $175B-$185B, Amazon ~$200B, Meta $115B-$135B, Microsoft ~$146B FY26 nagpapatungo sa ~$170B FY27) ay babagsak sa isang tape na lumipat na mula "rewarding capex on faith" patungong "demanding tangible profit." **Tahasang nirou-route ng Apr 27 contract restructurings ang AI-lab compute sa hyperscaler-owned silicon** (AWS Trainium/Graviton sa Anthropic; Meta-Graviton CPUs sa scale). Pagdating ng Q3 2026, may isang Big-3 hyperscaler na publicly **nagga-gate ng incremental GPU capex sa Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — unang explicit "AI-infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud. Mananatili ang NVDA $5T-class market cap at ang AMD/Cerebras IPO trajectory; hindi mababasag ang spend curve, pero magbabago ang disclosure language nito.

nodes.label: **The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewr…
nodes.description: **The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.

description.en: **The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.
description.ja: **4/28 WSJ OpenAI 売上未達報道 + 4/29 Mag 7 決算同時発表が 2026年に SEC + アナリストの AI 売上開示書き換え圧力を発動 — 2026年 Q3 までに、少なくとも 1つのファウンデーションラボ (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) が監査済み月次売上または WAU 開示サイクルを出荷し、少なくとも 1つの Big-3 ハイパースケーラーが Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex のトークン単価マージンを 10-Q 脚注で生クラウド売上から分離する。** 4/28 の売り (S&P -0.49%、Nasdaq -0.9%、Oracle -4%、AMD -3%、Broadcom -4%、SoftBank -10%) は AI 設備投資オン信用テープに最初の物理的亀裂; 4/29 決算は混合リセット (MSFT/GOOGL は強気ビート、META AH -7%); 4/30 AAPL 決算で Mag 7 サイクル終了。Microsoft は既に AI 年換算売上 $37B (+123%) を明示的に引用 — それが開示の前例。Cerebras IPO 5月中旬 $22B-$25B (G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% 売上集中) を背景に、SEC + バイサイドのトークン単価マージン + WAU 開示要求は 2026年 Q2-Q3 決算サイクル前後に集中する。Powell がトランプ政権 Fed 調査への抑止として理事会に残る決定も AI 設備投資テープ全体の政治リスクプレミアムを引き上げる; より厳しい数字を要求するのが公的市場のレバー。
description.es: **(No tecnológica) El reportaje del WSJ del 28-abr sobre incumplimiento de ingresos de OpenAI + la colisión de resultados Mag 7 del 29-abr disparan una reescritura del régimen de divulgación de ingresos de IA por parte de la SEC y los analistas en 2026 — para Q3 2026, al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) publica una cadencia de divulgación auditada de ingresos mensuales o WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 separa el margen por token de Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex en las notas al pie del 10-Q de los ingresos cloud brutos.** La caída del 28-abr (S&P -0,49%, Nasdaq -0,9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) fue la primera grieta material en la cinta «capex IA por fe»; los resultados del 29-abr fueron un reset mixto (MSFT/GOOGL batieron con fuerza, META -7% AH); los resultados de AAPL del 30-abr cierran el ciclo Mag 7. Microsoft ya citó explícitamente una tasa anual de IA de $37B (+123%) — ese es el precedente de divulgación. Con la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B-$25B (concentración de ingresos 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), la presión SEC + buyside para divulgación explícita de margen por token + WAU converge alrededor de los ciclos de resultados Q2-Q3 2026. La decisión de Powell de quedarse en la Junta como freno a la investigación Fed de Trump también eleva la prima de riesgo político sobre toda la cinta de capex IA; exigir cifras más duras es la palanca que tienen los mercados públicos.
description.fil: **Ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision ay magti-trigger ng 2026 SEC + analyst push para sa AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — bago matapos ang Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ang magsi-ship ng audited monthly-revenue o WAU disclosure cadence, at hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang magbubukod ng Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin sa 10-Q footnotes mula sa raw cloud revenue.** Ang Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) ang unang material crack sa AI-capex-on-faith tape; ang Apr 29 prints ay mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL malakas na beat, META -7% AH); ang Apr 30 AAPL prints ang nagsasara sa Mag 7 cycle. Tahasang sinipi na ng Microsoft ang $37B AI run rate (+123%) — iyon ang disclosure precedent. Sa Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang SEC + buyside pressure para sa explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure ay magko-converge sa Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Board bilang check sa Trump-admin Fed investigation ay nagdadagdag din ng political-risk premium sa buong AI-capex tape; ang paghingi ng mas matitigas na numero ang lever ng public markets.

Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.

Sa Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang SEC + buyside pressure para sa explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure ay magko-converge sa Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Board bilang check sa Trump-admin Fed investigation ay nagdadagdag din ng political-risk premium sa buong AI-capex tape; ang paghingi ng mas matitigas na numero ang lever ng public markets.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **The Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss report + Apr 29 Mag 7 print collision triggers a 2026 SEC + analyst push for AI-revenue disclosure rewrite — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue or WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Big-3 hyperscaler separates Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex per-token margin in 10-Q footnotes from raw cloud revenue.** Apr 28 selloff (S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) was the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape; Apr 29 prints were a mixed reset (MSFT/GOOGL beat hard, META -7% AH); Apr 30 AAPL prints close the Mag 7 cycle. Microsoft already cited a $37B AI run rate (+123%) explicitly — that is the disclosure precedent. With the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), the SEC + buyside pressure for explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure converges around Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Powell's choice to stay on Board as a check on Trump-admin Fed investigation also raises the political-risk premium on the entire AI-capex tape; demanding harder numbers is the lever public markets have.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **4/28 WSJ OpenAI 売上未達報道 + 4/29 Mag 7 決算同時発表が 2026年に SEC + アナリストの AI 売上開示書き換え圧力を発動 — 2026年 Q3 までに、少なくとも 1つのファウンデーションラボ (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) が監査済み月次売上または WAU 開示サイクルを出荷し、少なくとも 1つの Big-3 ハイパースケーラーが Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex のトークン単価マージンを 10-Q 脚注で生クラウド売上から分離する。** 4/28 の売り (S&P -0.49%、Nasdaq -0.9%、Oracle -4%、AMD -3%、Broadcom -4%、SoftBank -10%) は AI 設備投資オン信用テープに最初の物理的亀裂; 4/29 決算は混合リセット (MSFT/GOOGL は強気ビート、META AH -7%); 4/30 AAPL 決算で Mag 7 サイクル終了。Microsoft は既に AI 年換算売上 $37B (+123%) を明示的に引用 — それが開示の前例。Cerebras IPO 5月中旬 $22B-$25B (G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% 売上集中) を背景に、SEC + バイサイドのトークン単価マージン + WAU 開示要求は 2026年 Q2-Q3 決算サイクル前後に集中する。Powell がトランプ政権 Fed 調査への抑止として理事会に残る決定も AI 設備投資テープ全体の政治リスクプレミアムを引き上げる; より厳しい数字を要求するのが公的市場のレバー。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **(No tecnológica) El reportaje del WSJ del 28-abr sobre incumplimiento de ingresos de OpenAI + la colisión de resultados Mag 7 del 29-abr disparan una reescritura del régimen de divulgación de ingresos de IA por parte de la SEC y los analistas en 2026 — para Q3 2026, al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI / Anthropic / xAI) publica una cadencia de divulgación auditada de ingresos mensuales o WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Big-3 separa el margen por token de Bedrock / Azure-OpenAI / Vertex en las notas al pie del 10-Q de los ingresos cloud brutos.** La caída del 28-abr (S&P -0,49%, Nasdaq -0,9%, Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%) fue la primera grieta material en la cinta «capex IA por fe»; los resultados del 29-abr fueron un reset mixto (MSFT/GOOGL batieron con fuerza, META -7% AH); los resultados de AAPL del 30-abr cierran el ciclo Mag 7. Microsoft ya citó explícitamente una tasa anual de IA de $37B (+123%) — ese es el precedente de divulgación. Con la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B-$25B (concentración de ingresos 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), la presión SEC + buyside para divulgación explícita de margen por token + WAU converge alrededor de los ciclos de resultados Q2-Q3 2026. La decisión de Powell de quedarse en la Junta como freno a la investigación Fed de Trump también eleva la prima de riesgo político sobre toda la cinta de capex IA; exigir cifras más duras es la palanca que tienen los mercados públicos.

Sa Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), ang SEC + buyside pressure para sa explicit per-token margin + WAU disclosure ay magko-converge sa Q2-Q3 2026 earnings cycles. Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Board bilang check sa Trump-admin Fed investigation ay nagdadagdag din ng political-risk premium sa buong AI-capex tape; ang paghingi ng mas matitigas na numero ang lever ng public markets.

nodes.label: **By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wav…
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) publishes per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs as a single comparable disclosure, and at least one non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ships a mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal with parallel SLA disclosure.** Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset removed the cloud-exclusivity clause; Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) is the first cross-cloud frontier-model deployment in the post-exclusivity world; Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure is the developer-side primitive; Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview is the orchestration substrate; Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview is the parallel non-Bedrock path. The forcing function is enterprise procurement — once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals.

description.en: **By H2 2026 the OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset triggers a multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) publishes per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs as a single comparable disclosure, and at least one non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ships a mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal with parallel SLA disclosure.** Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset removed the cloud-exclusivity clause; Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) is the first cross-cloud frontier-model deployment in the post-exclusivity world; Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure is the developer-side primitive; Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview is the orchestration substrate; Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview is the parallel non-Bedrock path. The forcing function is enterprise procurement — once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals.
description.ja: **2026年下期までに、OpenAI on AWS Bedrock + Microsoft ライセンス非独占化のリセットがマルチクラウドのフロンティアモデル SLA 標準化を引き起こす — Big-3 ハイパースケーラ(AWS, Azure, GCP)のうち少なくとも 1 社がモデル別レイテンシ / スループット / 可用性 SLA を比較可能な単一フォーマットで公開し、非 OpenAI のフロンティアラボ(Anthropic、Google DeepMind、xAI)のうち少なくとも 1 社が「全クラウドにフロンティア」型のミラー契約を SLA 開示と共に締結する。** 4/27 Microsoft–OpenAI 再構成でクラウド独占が外れ、4/28 OpenAI on Bedrock(限定プレビュー)が独占解除後初のクロスクラウド・フロンティア配備、4/30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 のモデルプロバイダ主導モデル発見 + Bedrock アカウント状態公開が開発者側プリミティブ、4/28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14 リージョン GA + Managed Harness 4 リージョンプレビューがオーケストレーション基盤、4/30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox プレビューが非 Bedrock 系の並走経路。駆動力はエンタープライズの調達 — フロンティアモデルがクロス展開された瞬間、購買担当の最初の比較軸は「モデル」から「モデル + SLA on cloud-of-record」に変わる。SLA 標準化の最初の打ち手は AWS Bedrock(モデル選択肢が広く、エンタープライズコンプライアンス姿勢が最強)が有力、非 OpenAI のミラーは 4/27 Microsoft の非独占文言が「OpenAI 製品」に明示的に限定されており、Anthropic に空白を残しているため Anthropic が最有力。
description.es: **Para el segundo semestre de 2026 el reset OpenAI-en-AWS-Bedrock + licencia de Microsoft no exclusiva desencadena una ola de estandarización de SLA para modelos frontier multinube — al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) publica SLA por modelo (latencia / rendimiento / disponibilidad) como una divulgación comparable única, y al menos un laboratorio frontier no-OpenAI (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) cierra un acuerdo espejo de "frontier en cualquier nube" con divulgación paralela de SLA.** El reset Microsoft–OpenAI del 27/abr eliminó la cláusula de exclusividad cloud; OpenAI en Bedrock del 28/abr (vista previa limitada) es el primer despliegue cross-cloud frontier en el mundo post-exclusividad; el 30/abr Codex CLI 0.128.0 con descubrimiento de modelos a cargo del proveedor + exposición de estado de cuenta de Bedrock es la primitiva del lado desarrollador; el 28/abr AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI GA en 14 regiones + Managed Harness en 4 regiones en preview es el sustrato de orquestación; el 30/abr Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + preview de Toolbox es el camino paralelo no-Bedrock. La fuerza motriz es la procura empresarial — una vez que los modelos frontier despliegan en varias nubes, la primera comparación del comprador deja de ser "modelo" y pasa a ser "modelo + SLA en cloud-of-record". El primero en estandarizar SLA es muy probablemente AWS Bedrock (mayor selección de modelos y postura de cumplimiento empresarial más fuerte); el primer espejo no-OpenAI es muy probablemente Anthropic, dado que el lenguaje no-exclusivo de Microsoft del 27/abr aplica explícitamente a "productos de OpenAI" y deja espacio en blanco para acuerdos paralelos.
description.fil: **Pagdating ng H2 2026, ang OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset ay maglulunsad ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) ng per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs bilang single comparable disclosure, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ng mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal na may parallel SLA disclosure.** Tinanggal ng Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset ang cloud-exclusivity clause; ang Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) ang unang cross-cloud frontier-model deployment sa post-exclusivity world; ang Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure ang developer-side primitive; ang Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview ang orchestration substrate; ang Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview ang parallel non-Bedrock path. Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement — kapag nag-cross-deploy na ang frontier models, ang unang comparison ng buyer ay hindi na "model" kundi "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". Ang unang SLA-standardization mover ay malamang AWS Bedrock (dahil pinakamarami ang model selection at pinaka-strong ang enterprise compliance posture); ang unang non-OpenAI mirror ay malamang Anthropic dahil ang Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language ay nag-aapply lang sa "OpenAI products" at gumagawa ng white-space para sa parallel deals.

The forcing function is enterprise procurement — once frontier models cross-deploy, the buyer's first comparison stops being "model" and starts being "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". The first SLA-standardization mover is most likely AWS Bedrock (because Bedrock has the broadest model selection and the strongest enterprise compliance posture); the first non-OpenAI mirror is most likely Anthropic given the Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language explicitly applies to "OpenAI products" and creates white-space for parallel deals.
summary.ja: **2026年下期までに、OpenAI on AWS Bedrock + Microsoft ライセンス非独占化のリセットがマルチクラウドのフロンティアモデル SLA 標準化を引き起こす — Big-3 ハイパースケーラ(AWS, Azure, GCP)のうち少なくとも 1 社がモデル別レイテンシ / スループット / 可用性 SLA を比較可能な単一フォーマットで公開し、非 OpenAI のフロンティアラボ(Anthropic、Google DeepMind、xAI)のうち少なくとも 1 社が「全クラウドにフロンティア」型のミラー契約を SLA 開示と共に締結する。** 4/27 Microsoft–OpenAI 再構成でクラウド独占が外れ、4/28 OpenAI on Bedrock(限定プレビュー)が独占解除後初のクロスクラウド・フロンティア配備、4/30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 のモデルプロバイダ主導モデル発見 + Bedrock アカウント状態公開が開発者側プリミティブ、4/28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14 リージョン GA + Managed Harness 4 リージョンプレビューがオーケストレーション基盤、4/30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox プレビューが非 Bedrock 系の並走経路。駆動力はエンタープライズの調達 — フロンティアモデルがクロス展開された瞬間、購買担当の最初の比較軸は「モデル」から「モデル + SLA on cloud-of-record」に変わる。SLA 標準化の最初の打ち手は AWS Bedrock(モデル選択肢が広く、エンタープライズコンプライアンス姿勢が最強)が有力、非 OpenAI のミラーは 4/27 Microsoft の非独占文言が「OpenAI 製品」に明示的に限定されており、Anthropic に空白を残しているため Anthropic が最有力。
summary.es: **Para el segundo semestre de 2026 el reset OpenAI-en-AWS-Bedrock + licencia de Microsoft no exclusiva desencadena una ola de estandarización de SLA para modelos frontier multinube — al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) publica SLA por modelo (latencia / rendimiento / disponibilidad) como una divulgación comparable única, y al menos un laboratorio frontier no-OpenAI (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) cierra un acuerdo espejo de "frontier en cualquier nube" con divulgación paralela de SLA.** El reset Microsoft–OpenAI del 27/abr eliminó la cláusula de exclusividad cloud; OpenAI en Bedrock del 28/abr (vista previa limitada) es el primer despliegue cross-cloud frontier en el mundo post-exclusividad; el 30/abr Codex CLI 0.128.0 con descubrimiento de modelos a cargo del proveedor + exposición de estado de cuenta de Bedrock es la primitiva del lado desarrollador; el 28/abr AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI GA en 14 regiones + Managed Harness en 4 regiones en preview es el sustrato de orquestación; el 30/abr Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + preview de Toolbox es el camino paralelo no-Bedrock. La fuerza motriz es la procura empresarial — una vez que los modelos frontier despliegan en varias nubes, la primera comparación del comprador deja de ser "modelo" y pasa a ser "modelo + SLA en cloud-of-record". El primero en estandarizar SLA es muy probablemente AWS Bedrock (mayor selección de modelos y postura de cumplimiento empresarial más fuerte); el primer espejo no-OpenAI es muy probablemente Anthropic, dado que el lenguaje no-exclusivo de Microsoft del 27/abr aplica explícitamente a "productos de OpenAI" y deja espacio en blanco para acuerdos paralelos.
summary.fil: **Pagdating ng H2 2026, ang OpenAI-on-AWS-Bedrock + Microsoft-license-non-exclusive reset ay maglulunsad ng multi-cloud frontier-model SLA standardization wave — magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (AWS, Azure, GCP) ng per-model latency / throughput / availability SLAs bilang single comparable disclosure, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang non-OpenAI foundation lab (Anthropic, Google DeepMind, xAI) ng mirror "frontier on every cloud" deal na may parallel SLA disclosure.** Tinanggal ng Apr 27 Microsoft–OpenAI partnership reset ang cloud-exclusivity clause; ang Apr 28 OpenAI-on-Bedrock (limited preview) ang unang cross-cloud frontier-model deployment sa post-exclusivity world; ang Apr 30 Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-owned discovery + AWS Bedrock account-state exposure ang developer-side primitive; ang Apr 28 AWS Bedrock AgentCore Node.js + AgentCore CLI 14-region GA + Managed Harness 4-region preview ang orchestration substrate; ang Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA + Toolbox preview ang parallel non-Bedrock path. Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement — kapag nag-cross-deploy na ang frontier models, ang unang comparison ng buyer ay hindi na "model" kundi "model+SLA on cloud-of-record". Ang unang SLA-standardization mover ay malamang AWS Bedrock (dahil pinakamarami ang model selection at pinaka-strong ang enterprise compliance posture); ang unang non-OpenAI mirror ay malamang Anthropic dahil ang Apr 27 Microsoft non-exclusive language ay nag-aapply lang sa "OpenAI products" at gumagawa ng white-space para sa parallel deals.

Reason: Anthropic now ships across Anthropic API + AWS Bedrock + Microsoft-Foundry-style gated channels for both Opus 4.7 + Mythos — the literal mirror of the prediction's pattern; Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync standardizes the cross-cloud agent-identity layer. text_locales.ja: 本日の OpenAI 売上相場(Sacra $25B 年率化 + 2026年後半 IPO 早期段階の報告)+ AAPL Q2 印刷 AI サービス行なし + Cerebras IPO 5月中旬 + AMD 5月5日は `because`(開示書き換え圧力構築)を支持する。理由: OpenAI IPO 報告期間は監査済み月次売上 + WAU 開示ケイデンスを強制するが — 着地していない。Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: 監査済み月次売上 + WAU 開示ケイデンスを出荷した基礎モデル研究所はまだなし。
text_locales.es: OpenAI revenue tape (Sacra $25B anualizado + reportes pasos tempranos IPO fines 2026) + AAPL Q2 print sin línea AI-services + Cerebras IPO mid-May + AMD May 5 apoya `because` (presión disclosure-rewrite construye). Razón: período reporte OpenAI IPO forzaría cadencia disclosure audited monthly-revenue + WAU — pero no ha aterrizado. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: ningún foundation lab ha entregado cadencia disclosure audited monthly-revenue + WAU.
text_locales.fil: Today's OpenAI revenue tape (Sacra $25B annualized + reports of late-2026 IPO steps) + AAPL Q2 print walang AI-services line + Cerebras IPO mid-May + AMD May 5 ay nag-su-suporta sa `because` (disclosure-rewrite pressure builds). Reason: ang OpenAI IPO reporting period ay magpi-pilit sa audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence — pero hindi pa lumapag. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: walang foundation lab na nag-shi-ship ng audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence.

Remaining gap: NVDが推論サーバ固有のCWE / カテゴリでまだタグ付けしていない。
text_locales.es: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 sin parche al 2/5 + LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + ola UTT/IBM Langflow del 1/5 + técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 + continuación CSAI MITRE-CNA de hoy apoyan `because` (la clase CVE de inferencia se está formando según el cronograma). Reason: clúster cross-server + infraestructura named-technique convergiendo. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: NVD aún no etiqueta con un CWE / categoría específica de servidor de inferencia.
text_locales.fil: Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 unpatched into May 2 + LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + UTT/IBM Langflow May 1 wave + ATT&CK v19 named techniques + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `because` (ang inference-server CVE class ay nabubuo sa schedule). Reason: cross-server cluster + named-technique infrastructure ay nagsasama-sama. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: hindi pa nag-tag ang NVD ng inference-server-specific CWE / category.

nodes.label: **The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as the year AI-…
nodes.description: **The Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination cements 2026 as the year AI-capex disclosure splits into two reporting cadences — by Q4 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler (most likely Microsoft, given the Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) publishes audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) as a 10-Q footnote; the broader S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) follows with quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Apr 29 Microsoft's $37B AI run-rate (+123%) was the disclosure precedent; Apr 30 Apple's record Services $30.98B (+16%) included no separate AI-services line; Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) on the way to $700B 2026 capex is the buyside-pressure number; mid-May Cerebras IPO at $22-25B with 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is the disclosure stress-test. Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% on print day) shows public-market price discrimination is already operating on imprecise AI-revenue numbers; the path of least resistance is for the most-disclosing hyperscaler to set the precedent and force the cohort to follow. SEC will not need to act ahead of voluntary disclosure here — the buyside is the forcing function.

description.ja: **Mag 7 ウィーク + $700B AI 設備投資数値 + 4/30 Apple の +$1,000億自社株買い + 4% 増配の組み合わせで、2026年は AI 設備投資の開示が二系統に分化する年となる — 2026 Q4 までに Big-3 ハイパースケーラ(4/29 に AI ランレート $37B(+123%)を開示済みの Microsoft が最有力)が AI 事業 KPI(ランレート、課金シート、デプロイ済みエージェント)の月次 10-Q 脚注開示に踏み切り、より広い S&P AI コホート(Apple、上場後 Cerebras、Broadcom)が AI 事業別マージン四半期開示で続く。** 4/29 Microsoft の $37B AI ランレート(+123%)が開示の前例、4/30 Apple のサービス売上過去最高 $30.98B(+16%)に AI サービス別行はなし、4/30 Big Tech Q1 設備投資 $130B 超 → 2026年通期 $700B が買い手側の圧力数値、5月中旬 Cerebras IPO の $22-25B(G42 24% / MBZUAI 62% の収益集中)が開示の負荷試験。4/28 WSJ OpenAI 売上未達 + 4/29 Mag 7 のまだら戻り(META -7.5%、MSFT -3.8% on print day)が示すとおり、公開市場は不正確な AI 売上数値に対して既に価格差別を始めている。SEC の介入を待たず、最も開示する 1 社が前例を打ち、コホートを追従させる経路が最小抵抗。買い手側こそが駆動力。
description.es: **(No tech) La supersemana de los Mag 7 + el dato de capex AI 2026 de 700.000 M + la combinación del 30/abr de +100.000 M de recompra y +4% de dividendo de Apple consolida 2026 como el año en que la divulgación del capex AI se divide en dos cadencias de reporte — para el Q4 de 2026, al menos uno de los Big-3 hyperscalers (probablemente Microsoft, dado el precedente del 29/abr de "AI run-rate" de 37.000 M) publica KPIs mensuales auditados del negocio AI (tasa anualizada, asientos pagos, agentes desplegados) en una nota al pie del 10-Q; la cohorte AI más amplia del S&P (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sigue con divulgación trimestral de margen por negocio AI.** La tasa AI de 37.000 M (+123%) de Microsoft del 29/abr fue el precedente de divulgación; los Servicios récord de 30.980 M (+16%) de Apple del 30/abr no incluyen línea separada de servicios AI; los >130.000 M de capex Q1 de Big Tech (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) en camino a 700.000 M en 2026 es el número de presión del lado comprador; la IPO de Cerebras a mediados de mayo a 22-25.000 M con concentración 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI es la prueba de estrés de la divulgación. El WSJ del 28/abr sobre menores ingresos de OpenAI + el reset mixto de los Mag 7 del 29/abr (META -7,5%, MSFT -3,8% el día de la publicación) muestran que el mercado público ya está discriminando precios sobre cifras AI imprecisas; la senda de menor resistencia es que el hyperscaler más comunicativo siente el precedente y arrastre a la cohorte. La SEC no necesitará actuar antes de la divulgación voluntaria — la fuerza motriz es el lado comprador.
description.fil: **Ang Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination ay magpapatibay sa 2026 bilang taon na hahati ang AI-capex disclosure sa dalawang reporting cadences — pagdating ng Q4 2026, magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (malamang ang Microsoft, dahil sa Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) ng audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) bilang 10-Q footnote; susunod ang mas malawak na S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sa quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Ang Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate (+123%) ng Microsoft ang disclosure precedent; ang Apr 30 record na Services $30.98B (+16%) ng Apple ay walang hiwalay na linya ng AI services; ang Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) papuntang $700B 2026 capex ang buyside-pressure number; ang mid-May Cerebras IPO sa $22-25B na may 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration ang disclosure stress-test. Ipinapakita ng Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% sa print day) na ang public-market price discrimination ay umuusad na sa imprecise AI-revenue numbers; ang path of least resistance ay para sa pinakanagdi-disclose na hyperscaler na maglatag ng precedent at pumilit sa cohort na sumunod. Hindi na kailangang mag-act ang SEC bago ang voluntary disclosure — ang buyside ang forcing function.

text_locales.ja: 本日の ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法 繰り越し + CSAI MITRE-CNA 繰り越し + Microsoft Agent 365 + arxiv 評価波(SAGE, LiveClawBench, GAIA-v2-LILT)は `landing`(マトリックス部分出荷 + 評価基板拡大)を支持する。理由: ATT&CK v19 が運用上は名前付き手法付録 + 評価ベンチ波が予測が名指す学術基板。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF 付録はまだ公開されていない; 主要マーケットプレイスは署名 + 出所ゲートを出荷していない。
text_locales.es: Carry técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 + carry CSAI MITRE-CNA + Microsoft Agent 365 + ola eval arxiv (SAGE, LiveClawBench, GAIA-v2-LILT) apoya `landing` (parte matriz entregada + sustrato eval ampliándose). Razón: ATT&CK v19 es operativamente el apéndice named-technique + la ola eval-bench es el sustrato académico que la predicción nombra. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: apéndice NIST AI-RMF aún no publicado; gate signing + provenance aún no entregado en ningún marketplace mayor.
text_locales.fil: Today's ATT&CK v19 named-techniques carry + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + Microsoft Agent 365 + arxiv eval wave (SAGE, LiveClawBench, GAIA-v2-LILT) ay nag-su-suporta sa `landing` (matrix part shipped + eval substrate broadening). Reason: ATT&CK v19 ay operationally ang named-technique appendix + ang eval-bench wave ay ang academic substrate na pinangalan ng prediction. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF appendix hindi pa published; signing + provenance gate hindi pa ship sa anumang major marketplace.

text_locales.ja: 本日の生態系全カバレッジ(SGLang TurboQuant in-tree、llama.cpp #20969、PolyKV、NVIDIA kvpress、arxiv波、Unsloth、Foundry Local GA継続)が `landing`(スタック横断統一圧縮KVキャッシュ・デプロイメントノブ)を支持。Reason: クロススタック収斂がSGLang + llama.cpp + vLLM + arxivリサーチで可視化。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: Foundry LocalがWindows MLに紐づく native TurboQuant統合をまだ出荷していない。
text_locales.es: Cobertura ecosistema completa de hoy (SGLang TurboQuant in-tree, llama.cpp #20969, PolyKV, NVIDIA kvpress, ola arxiv, Unsloth, continuación Foundry Local GA) apoya `landing` (manija unificada de despliegue de KV-cache comprimido a través de pilas). Reason: convergencia cross-stack ahora visible a través de SGLang + llama.cpp + vLLM + investigación arxiv. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: Foundry Local aún no envía integración nativa TurboQuant atada a Windows ML.
text_locales.fil: Ang full ecosystem coverage ngayon (SGLang TurboQuant in-tree, llama.cpp #20969, PolyKV, NVIDIA kvpress, arxiv wave, Unsloth, Foundry Local GA carry) ay sumusuporta sa `landing` (unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob across stacks). Reason: ang cross-stack convergence ay visible na sa SGLang + llama.cpp + vLLM + arxiv research. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: hindi pa nag-ship ang Foundry Local ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML.

prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang Mag 7 super-week + $700B-2026-AI-capex print + Apr 30 Apple +$100B-buyback / 4%-dividend-hike combination ay magpapatibay sa 2026 bilang taon na hahati ang AI-capex disclosure sa dalawang reporting cadences — pagdating ng Q4 2026, magpa-publish ang hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler (malamang ang Microsoft, dahil sa Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate precedent) ng audited monthly AI-business KPIs (run-rate, paid seats, deployed agents) bilang 10-Q footnote; susunod ang mas malawak na S&P AI cohort (Apple, Cerebras post-IPO, Broadcom) sa quarterly per-AI-business margin disclosure.** Ang Apr 29 $37B AI run-rate (+123%) ng Microsoft ang disclosure precedent; ang Apr 30 record na Services $30.98B (+16%) ng Apple ay walang hiwalay na linya ng AI services; ang Apr 30 Big Tech $130B+ Q1 capex (Alphabet+Meta+Microsoft+Amazon) papuntang $700B 2026 capex ang buyside-pressure number; ang mid-May Cerebras IPO sa $22-25B na may 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration ang disclosure stress-test. Ipinapakita ng Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue-miss + Apr 29 Mag 7 mixed reset (META -7.5%, MSFT -3.8% sa print day) na ang public-market price discrimination ay umuusad na sa imprecise AI-revenue numbers; ang path of least resistance ay para sa pinakanagdi-disclose na hyperscaler na maglatag ng precedent at pumilit sa cohort na sumunod. Hindi na kailangang mag-act ang SEC bago ang voluntary disclosure — ang buyside ang forcing function.

Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel.

title.en: Big-3 hyperscalers ship MCP-server policy enforcement as default by Q4 2026
title.ja: Q4 2026までにBig-3ハイパースケーラがMCPサーバ・ポリシー強制をデフォルト化
title.es: Big-3 hyperscalers despliegan aplicación de políticas MCP por defecto antes del Q4 2026
title.fil: Sa Q4 2026, ipapatupad ng Big-3 hyperscalers ang MCP-server policy enforcement bilang default

description.en: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel.
description.ja: **2026年第4四半期までに、Microsoft Agent 365 GA(月額$15、M365 E7)+ Cisco DefenseClaw オープンソース(3月23日)+ CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA(4月29日)+ AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness(4月28日)のスタックがエンタープライズ AI エージェント・コントロールプレーンの参照モデルへ収斂する。Big-3 ハイパースケーラー(AWS, Azure, GCP)のうち少なくとも2社がテナントレベルでポリシーベースの MCP サーバー許可・ブロック制御と監査済みツール呼び出しログをデフォルトオン基本機能として提供。少なくとも1つの独立コントロールプレーンベンダー(Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI)が Sec-Labels 形式のアーティファクト署名ゲートを公開する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達。Microsoft はエージェント・コントロールプレーン分野にユーザー単価($15/user/月)を付け、AWS と Google が同等の開示で応じる必要が生じる価格アンカーを設定した。4月30日の OpenAI Agents SDK + 7つのサンドボックスプロバイダーがランタイム側を、5月1日の GA がポリシー側を既存 M365 管理面(Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender)に接続する。5月1日 GA の Defender 資産コンテキストマッピング(エージェントごとのデバイス + MCP サーバー + ID + クラウドリソース)が2026年6月に出荷されると事実上のスキーマとなる。M365 設置基盤というアンカーを失わないため、AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden が第4四半期前に並行スキーマを公開するのが最小抵抗線。CSAI の MITRE-CNA リズムが開示側を並行して圧縮する。
description.es: **Para el Q4 2026, la pila Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/usuario, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (23 de marzo) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (29 de abril) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (28 de abril) converge en un modelo de referencia de plano de control de agentes empresariales — al menos 2 de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) lanzan aplicación basada en políticas de permitir/bloquear de servidores MCP a nivel de tenant con logs auditados de invocación de herramientas como primitiva activada por defecto; al menos un proveedor independiente de plano de control (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publica una puerta de atestación de artefactos al estilo Sec-Labels.** El forzamiento es la adquisición empresarial: Microsoft acaba de poner una etiqueta de precio por usuario ($15/usuario/mes) a la categoría de plano de control de agentes, fijando el ancla de precio a la que AWS + Google deben responder con divulgaciones comparables; el Agents SDK de OpenAI del 30 de abril + 7 proveedores de sandbox preconfeccionaron el lado runtime, y el GA del 1 de mayo cablea el lado de políticas a una superficie M365 admin existente (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Cuando el mapeo de contexto de activos de Defender del GA del 1 de mayo (dispositivos + servidores MCP + identidades + recursos cloud por agente) se lance en junio de 2026 se convierte en el esquema de facto; la ruta de menor resistencia es que AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden publiquen esquemas paralelos antes del Q4 para no perder el ancla de la base instalada de M365. La cadencia de MITRE-CNA de CSAI comprimirá el lado de divulgación en paralelo.
description.fil: **Sa Q4 2026, ang stack na Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (March 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (April 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (April 28) ay magtatagpo sa enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — kahit 2 sa Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ay maglalabas ng policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement sa tenant level na may audited tool-invocation logs bilang default-on primitive; kahit isang independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) ay maglalabas ng Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: nag-set ang Microsoft ng per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) sa agent-control-plane category, na nagiging pricing-anchor na kailangang sagutin ng AWS + Google ng comparable disclosures; ang April 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers ang nag-pre-bake sa runtime side, at ang May 1 GA ay nag-wire sa policy side patungo sa existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Kapag nag-ship sa Hunyo 2026 ang Defender asset-context mapping ng May 1 GA (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources kada agent) ay magiging de-facto schema; pinakamadaling daan na maglabas ng parallel schemas ang AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden bago Q4 para hindi mawala ang M365-installed-base anchor. Pa-compress ng disclosure side parallel ang CSAI MITRE-CNA cadence.

detail.summary_short: Microsoft Agent 365's $15/user GA pricing on May 1 sets the agent-control-plane anchor. By Q4 2026 ≥2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers ship default policy-based MCP-server enforcement and ≥1 independent control-plane vendor publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.

summary_short_locales.en: Microsoft Agent 365's $15/user GA pricing on May 1 sets the agent-control-plane anchor. By Q4 2026 ≥2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers ship default policy-based MCP-server enforcement and ≥1 independent control-plane vendor publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.
summary_short_locales.ja: 5月1日のMicrosoft Agent 365 $15/user GAがエージェント・コントロールプレーンの価格アンカーを設定。Q4 2026までにBig-3のうち≥2社がデフォルトのポリシーベースMCPサーバ強制を出荷し、≥1独立ベンダーがSec-Labels型の証明書ゲートを公表。
summary_short_locales.es: El GA de Microsoft Agent 365 a $15/usuario del 1 de mayo fija el ancla del plano de control de agentes. Para el Q4 2026, ≥2 de los Big-3 hyperscalers despliegan aplicación de políticas MCP por defecto y ≥1 proveedor independiente publica una puerta de atestación al estilo Sec-Labels.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Microsoft Agent 365 $15/user GA noong May 1 ay nag-set ng pricing anchor para sa agent-control-plane. Sa Q4 2026, ≥2 sa Big-3 hyperscalers ay maglalabas ng default policy-based MCP-server enforcement at ≥1 independent vendor ay magpu-publish ng Sec-Labels-style attestation gate.

bridges.text: Today's Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync GA preview (May 1) + Defender per-agent relationship-map + Anthropic Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI named as upcoming local-agent integrations supports `landing` (Big-3 hyperscalers ship MCP-server policy enforcement as default). Reason: Registry Sync extends the May 1 GA single-vendor allow/block primitive to cross-cloud (AWS + Google) registry-sync — the cross-cloud production preview is the structural-precedent shift the Q4 2026 thesis was projecting, landing 5+ months early in preview form. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: cross-vendor parity (AWS / GCP own primitives, not registry-sync into Microsoft) not yet shipped; OWASP MCP Top 10 not published.

text_locales.en: Today's Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync GA preview (May 1) + Defender per-agent relationship-map + Anthropic Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI named as upcoming local-agent integrations supports `landing` (Big-3 hyperscalers ship MCP-server policy enforcement as default). Reason: Registry Sync extends the May 1 GA single-vendor allow/block primitive to cross-cloud (AWS + Google) registry-sync — the cross-cloud production preview is the structural-precedent shift the Q4 2026 thesis was projecting, landing 5+ months early in preview form. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: cross-vendor parity (AWS / GCP own primitives, not registry-sync into Microsoft) not yet shipped; OWASP MCP Top 10 not published.
text_locales.ja: 本日の Anthropic Mythos Preview が AWS Bedrock Gated Research Preview + Project Glasswing 50組織プログラム + Microsoft Agent 365 マルチクラウド Registry Sync + Anthropic Opus 4.7 マルチクラウド繰り越しは `landing`(フロンティア・オン・エブリ・クラウド + 並行 SLA 開示)を支持する。理由: Anthropic は今や Anthropic API + AWS Bedrock + Microsoft-Foundry 型ゲート付きチャネル横断で Opus 4.7 + Mythos の両方を出荷 — 予測パターンの文字通りのミラー; Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync がクロスクラウド・エージェント識別層を標準化。Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: 4ホスティングパスにわたる並行 SLA フィールド開示標準化はまだなし。
text_locales.es: Anthropic Mythos Preview como AWS Bedrock Gated Research Preview + programa Project Glasswing 50-org + Microsoft Agent 365 multicloud Registry Sync + Anthropic Opus 4.7 multi-cloud carry apoya `landing` (frontier-on-every-cloud + parallel SLA disclosure). Razón: Anthropic ahora envía a través de Anthropic API + AWS Bedrock + canales gated tipo Microsoft-Foundry para ambos Opus 4.7 + Mythos — el mirror literal del patrón de la predicción; Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync estandariza la capa cross-cloud agent-identity. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: aún no parallel SLA-field disclosure standardization a través de los 4 hosting paths.
text_locales.fil: Today's Anthropic Mythos Preview bilang AWS Bedrock Gated Research Preview + Project Glasswing 50-org program + Microsoft Agent 365 multicloud Registry Sync + Anthropic Opus 4.7 multi-cloud carry ay nag-su-suporta sa `landing` (frontier-on-every-cloud + parallel SLA disclosure). Reason: Anthropic ngayon ay nag-shi-ship sa Anthropic API + AWS Bedrock + Microsoft-Foundry-style gated channels para sa parehong Opus 4.7 + Mythos — ang literal mirror ng prediction's pattern; Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync ay nag-istandard ng cross-cloud agent-identity layer. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: walang parallel SLA-field disclosure standardization sa apat na hosting paths.
