detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel.
detail.prediction_summary: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By Q4 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (Mar 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (Apr 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (Apr 28) stack converges into an enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — at least 2 of the Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ship policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement at the tenant level with audited tool-invocation logs as a default-on primitive; at least one independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publishes a Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: Microsoft just put a per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) on the agent-control-plane category, which sets the pricing-anchor that AWS + Google must respond to with comparable disclosures; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers pre-baked the runtime side, and the May 1 GA wires the policy side to an existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Once the May 1 GA's Defender asset-context mapping (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources per agent) ships in June 2026 it becomes the de-facto schema; the path of least resistance is for AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden to publish parallel schemas before Q4 to avoid losing the M365-installed-base anchor. CSAI's MITRE-CNA cadence will compress the disclosure side in parallel.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年第4四半期までに、Microsoft Agent 365 GA(月額$15、M365 E7)+ Cisco DefenseClaw オープンソース(3月23日)+ CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA(4月29日)+ AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness(4月28日)のスタックがエンタープライズ AI エージェント・コントロールプレーンの参照モデルへ収斂する。Big-3 ハイパースケーラー(AWS, Azure, GCP)のうち少なくとも2社がテナントレベルでポリシーベースの MCP サーバー許可・ブロック制御と監査済みツール呼び出しログをデフォルトオン基本機能として提供。少なくとも1つの独立コントロールプレーンベンダー(Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI)が Sec-Labels 形式のアーティファクト署名ゲートを公開する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達。Microsoft はエージェント・コントロールプレーン分野にユーザー単価($15/user/月)を付け、AWS と Google が同等の開示で応じる必要が生じる価格アンカーを設定した。4月30日の OpenAI Agents SDK + 7つのサンドボックスプロバイダーがランタイム側を、5月1日の GA がポリシー側を既存 M365 管理面(Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender)に接続する。5月1日 GA の Defender 資産コンテキストマッピング(エージェントごとのデバイス + MCP サーバー + ID + クラウドリソース)が2026年6月に出荷されると事実上のスキーマとなる。M365 設置基盤というアンカーを失わないため、AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden が第4四半期前に並行スキーマを公開するのが最小抵抗線。CSAI の MITRE-CNA リズムが開示側を並行して圧縮する。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q4 2026, la pila Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/usuario, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (23 de marzo) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (29 de abril) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (28 de abril) converge en un modelo de referencia de plano de control de agentes empresariales — al menos 2 de los Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) lanzan aplicación basada en políticas de permitir/bloquear de servidores MCP a nivel de tenant con logs auditados de invocación de herramientas como primitiva activada por defecto; al menos un proveedor independiente de plano de control (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) publica una puerta de atestación de artefactos al estilo Sec-Labels.** El forzamiento es la adquisición empresarial: Microsoft acaba de poner una etiqueta de precio por usuario ($15/usuario/mes) a la categoría de plano de control de agentes, fijando el ancla de precio a la que AWS + Google deben responder con divulgaciones comparables; el Agents SDK de OpenAI del 30 de abril + 7 proveedores de sandbox preconfeccionaron el lado runtime, y el GA del 1 de mayo cablea el lado de políticas a una superficie M365 admin existente (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Cuando el mapeo de contexto de activos de Defender del GA del 1 de mayo (dispositivos + servidores MCP + identidades + recursos cloud por agente) se lance en junio de 2026 se convierte en el esquema de facto; la ruta de menor resistencia es que AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden publiquen esquemas paralelos antes del Q4 para no perder el ancla de la base instalada de M365. La cadencia de MITRE-CNA de CSAI comprimirá el lado de divulgación en paralelo.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Sa Q4 2026, ang stack na Microsoft Agent 365 GA ($15/user, M365 E7) + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source (March 23) + CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA (April 29) + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness (April 28) ay magtatagpo sa enterprise agent-control-plane reference model — kahit 2 sa Big-3 hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP) ay maglalabas ng policy-based MCP-server allow/block enforcement sa tenant level na may audited tool-invocation logs bilang default-on primitive; kahit isang independent control-plane vendor (Vanta, Zenity, OpenClawAI) ay maglalabas ng Sec-Labels-style artifact attestation gate.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: nag-set ang Microsoft ng per-user price tag ($15/user/mo) sa agent-control-plane category, na nagiging pricing-anchor na kailangang sagutin ng AWS + Google ng comparable disclosures; ang April 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + 7 sandbox providers ang nag-pre-bake sa runtime side, at ang May 1 GA ay nag-wire sa policy side patungo sa existing M365 admin surface (Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender). Kapag nag-ship sa Hunyo 2026 ang Defender asset-context mapping ng May 1 GA (devices + MCP servers + identities + cloud resources kada agent) ay magiging de-facto schema; pinakamadaling daan na maglabas ng parallel schemas ang AWS Bedrock AgentCore + Google Vertex Agent Garden bago Q4 para hindi mawala ang M365-installed-base anchor. Pa-compress ng disclosure side parallel ang CSAI MITRE-CNA cadence.

nodes.title: Cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP registry RFC draft ships by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage.

description.en: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage.
description.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、5月1日 Microsoft Agent 365 GA Registry Sync(AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform)+ Anthropic MCP SDK 月間ダウンロード ~9,700万 + 並行する4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore スタックが、クロスクラウド・エージェント識別 + MCP サーバー在庫 + ツール呼び出しログ・スキーマを標準的相互運用層として形式化する RFC 草案(IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation ワーキンググループ)へと収斂する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達。Microsoft が $15/user/月で M365 管理面統合のレジストリ同期基本機能を出荷した瞬間、AWS + Google は並行サーフェスを公開するか Microsoft スキーマに吸収されるかを迫られる。CSAI の4月29日 MITRE-CNA 権限 + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法(MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment)が脅威側の標準化圧力を提供。4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA が既にビルド・ランタイム層を標準化しており、欠けているのは相互運用プロトコル層 — レジストリ同期がそれが機能することを証明している。Microsoft + AWS + Google はベンダー固有スキーマでは M365 + Bedrock + Vertex 設置基盤というアンカー優位を失うため、公開 RFC 草案で三角化する見込み。
description.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el Microsoft Agent 365 GA del 1 de mayo Registry Sync con AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + descargas mensuales Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M + el stack paralelo OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abril / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore convergerá en un borrador RFC publicado (grupo de trabajo IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation) que formaliza el esquema cross-cloud de identidad de agente + inventario de servidores MCP + log de invocación de herramientas como una capa estándar de interoperabilidad.** La función forzante es la adquisición empresarial: una vez que Microsoft entrega el primitivo registry-sync a $15/user/mes con integración admin-surface M365, AWS + Google deben exponer superficies paralelas o ser absorbidos en el esquema Microsoft; la autoridad MITRE-CNA del 29 abril CSAI + las técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) proveen presión de estandarización del lado de amenazas; el 30 abril OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ya estandarizan la capa build/runtime así que la pieza faltante es la capa de protocolo de interop que el registry-sync prueba que funciona; se espera que Microsoft + AWS + Google triangulen sobre un borrador RFC público porque esquemas vendor-specific perderían la ventaja de anclaje de base instalada M365 + Bedrock + Vertex.
description.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + ang parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack ay magko-converge sa published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) na nag-formalize ng cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema bilang standard interop layer.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: kapag nag-ship na ang Microsoft ng registry-sync primitive sa $15/user/mo na may M365 admin-surface integration, ang AWS + Google ay kailangang mag-expose ng parallel surfaces o ma-absorb sa Microsoft schema; ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) ay nagbibigay ng threat-side standardization pressure; ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ay na-standardize na ang build/runtime layer kaya ang nawawalang piraso ay ang interop-protocol layer na pina-prove ng registry-sync na gumagana; expect na ang Microsoft + AWS + Google ay magta-triangulate sa public draft RFC dahil ang vendor-specific schemas ay mawawalan ng M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage.

summary.en: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage.
summary.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、5月1日 Microsoft Agent 365 GA Registry Sync(AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform)+ Anthropic MCP SDK 月間ダウンロード ~9,700万 + 並行する4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore スタックが、クロスクラウド・エージェント識別 + MCP サーバー在庫 + ツール呼び出しログ・スキーマを標準的相互運用層として形式化する RFC 草案(IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation ワーキンググループ)へと収斂する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達。Microsoft が $15/user/月で M365 管理面統合のレジストリ同期基本機能を出荷した瞬間、AWS + Google は並行サーフェスを公開するか Microsoft スキーマに吸収されるかを迫られる。CSAI の4月29日 MITRE-CNA 権限 + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法(MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment)が脅威側の標準化圧力を提供。4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA が既にビルド・ランタイム層を標準化しており、欠けているのは相互運用プロトコル層 — レジストリ同期がそれが機能することを証明している。Microsoft + AWS + Google はベンダー固有スキーマでは M365 + Bedrock + Vertex 設置基盤というアンカー優位を失うため、公開 RFC 草案で三角化する見込み。
summary.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el Microsoft Agent 365 GA del 1 de mayo Registry Sync con AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + descargas mensuales Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M + el stack paralelo OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abril / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore convergerá en un borrador RFC publicado (grupo de trabajo IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation) que formaliza el esquema cross-cloud de identidad de agente + inventario de servidores MCP + log de invocación de herramientas como una capa estándar de interoperabilidad.** La función forzante es la adquisición empresarial: una vez que Microsoft entrega el primitivo registry-sync a $15/user/mes con integración admin-surface M365, AWS + Google deben exponer superficies paralelas o ser absorbidos en el esquema Microsoft; la autoridad MITRE-CNA del 29 abril CSAI + las técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) proveen presión de estandarización del lado de amenazas; el 30 abril OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ya estandarizan la capa build/runtime así que la pieza faltante es la capa de protocolo de interop que el registry-sync prueba que funciona; se espera que Microsoft + AWS + Google triangulen sobre un borrador RFC público porque esquemas vendor-specific perderían la ventaja de anclaje de base instalada M365 + Bedrock + Vertex.
summary.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + ang parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack ay magko-converge sa published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) na nag-formalize ng cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema bilang standard interop layer.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: kapag nag-ship na ang Microsoft ng registry-sync primitive sa $15/user/mo na may M365 admin-surface integration, ang AWS + Google ay kailangang mag-expose ng parallel surfaces o ma-absorb sa Microsoft schema; ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) ay nagbibigay ng threat-side standardization pressure; ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ay na-standardize na ang build/runtime layer kaya ang nawawalang piraso ay ang interop-protocol layer na pina-prove ng registry-sync na gumagana; expect na ang Microsoft + AWS + Google ay magta-triangulate sa public draft RFC dahil ang vendor-specific schemas ay mawawalan ng M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage.

detail.summary_short: Microsoft Agent 365's May 1 registry sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Gemini Enterprise is the first cross-cloud agent-identity primitive in production. By Q3 2026 a standards body publishes a draft RFC formalizing the protocol before vendor-specific schemas lock in.

summary_short_locales.en: Microsoft Agent 365's May 1 registry sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Gemini Enterprise is the first cross-cloud agent-identity primitive in production. By Q3 2026 a standards body publishes a draft RFC formalizing the protocol before vendor-specific schemas lock in.
summary_short_locales.ja: Microsoft Agent 365 が5月1日に AWS Bedrock + Google Gemini Enterprise と多クラウド・レジストリ同期を出荷、初の本番クロスクラウド・エージェント識別基本機能となる。Q3 2026までにベンダー固有スキーマがロックインする前に標準化機関が RFC 草案を公開。
summary_short_locales.es: La sincronización multicloud del registro Microsoft Agent 365 del 1 de mayo con AWS Bedrock + Google Gemini Enterprise es el primer primitivo cross-cloud de identidad de agente en producción. Para Q3 2026 un cuerpo de estándares publica un borrador RFC formalizando el protocolo antes de que se fijen esquemas vendor-specific.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 multicloud registry sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Gemini Enterprise ay ang unang cross-cloud agent-identity primitive sa production. By Q3 2026, isang standards body ay magpa-publish ng draft RFC na nag-formalize ng protocol bago mag-lock-in ang vendor-specific schemas.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage.
detail.prediction_summary: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、5月1日 Microsoft Agent 365 GA Registry Sync(AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform)+ Anthropic MCP SDK 月間ダウンロード ~9,700万 + 並行する4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore スタックが、クロスクラウド・エージェント識別 + MCP サーバー在庫 + ツール呼び出しログ・スキーマを標準的相互運用層として形式化する RFC 草案(IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation ワーキンググループ)へと収斂する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達。Microsoft が $15/user/月で M365 管理面統合のレジストリ同期基本機能を出荷した瞬間、AWS + Google は並行サーフェスを公開するか Microsoft スキーマに吸収されるかを迫られる。CSAI の4月29日 MITRE-CNA 権限 + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法(MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment)が脅威側の標準化圧力を提供。4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA が既にビルド・ランタイム層を標準化しており、欠けているのは相互運用プロトコル層 — レジストリ同期がそれが機能することを証明している。Microsoft + AWS + Google はベンダー固有スキーマでは M365 + Bedrock + Vertex 設置基盤というアンカー優位を失うため、公開 RFC 草案で三角化する見込み。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el Microsoft Agent 365 GA del 1 de mayo Registry Sync con AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + descargas mensuales Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M + el stack paralelo OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abril / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore convergerá en un borrador RFC publicado (grupo de trabajo IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation) que formaliza el esquema cross-cloud de identidad de agente + inventario de servidores MCP + log de invocación de herramientas como una capa estándar de interoperabilidad.** La función forzante es la adquisición empresarial: una vez que Microsoft entrega el primitivo registry-sync a $15/user/mes con integración admin-surface M365, AWS + Google deben exponer superficies paralelas o ser absorbidos en el esquema Microsoft; la autoridad MITRE-CNA del 29 abril CSAI + las técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) proveen presión de estandarización del lado de amenazas; el 30 abril OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ya estandarizan la capa build/runtime así que la pieza faltante es la capa de protocolo de interop que el registry-sync prueba que funciona; se espera que Microsoft + AWS + Google triangulen sobre un borrador RFC público porque esquemas vendor-specific perderían la ventaja de anclaje de base instalada M365 + Bedrock + Vertex.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + ang parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack ay magko-converge sa published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) na nag-formalize ng cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema bilang standard interop layer.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: kapag nag-ship na ang Microsoft ng registry-sync primitive sa $15/user/mo na may M365 admin-surface integration, ang AWS + Google ay kailangang mag-expose ng parallel surfaces o ma-absorb sa Microsoft schema; ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) ay nagbibigay ng threat-side standardization pressure; ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ay na-standardize na ang build/runtime layer kaya ang nawawalang piraso ay ang interop-protocol layer na pina-prove ng registry-sync na gumagana; expect na ang Microsoft + AWS + Google ay magta-triangulate sa public draft RFC dahil ang vendor-specific schemas ay mawawalan ng M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage.

description.en: **Convergence on an "Agent Registry" model.** AWS Agent Registry, NemoClaw's audit-log + guardrail story, and Hermes Agent's self-learned skills all surface in the same window. By H2 2026, a registry standard for distributing agent artifacts (skills, tool permissions, audit traces) will grow alongside MCP.
description.ja: **「Agent Registry」方式への収斂** — AWS Agent Registry、NemoClaw の監査ログ・ガードレール、Hermes Agent の自己学習スキルが同時発生。2026 後半にはエージェント成果物（スキル、ツール権限、監査トレース）を配布するレジストリ標準が MCP の隣に生えると予測。

description.en: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming.
description.ja: **AI エージェント・セキュリティ標準が「第三者ベンダ境界」と「URL 命名ハンデン」まで広がる** — Anthropic Mythos の未認可アクセス（外注＋命名規則推測＋サードパーティ流出データの組み合わせ）は、Vercel–Context.ai サプライチェーン侵害と同じ構造を frontier モデルアクセス制御で再演した。2026 Q3 には「フロンティアモデルプレビュー／早期アクセスの第三者ベンダ環境」は SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum の共通セキュリティベースラインを満たすことが事実上必須化し、エンドポイント URL / サブドメインは推測困難なランダム文字列ベースの命名に強制移行する。
description.es: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming.

nodes.label: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026…
nodes.short_label: Attack surface against the MCP protocol…
nodes.description: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category.

description.en: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category.
description.ja: **「MCP プロトコル自体への攻撃面」が 2026 Q3 までにエンタープライズ AI 採用の最大ボトルネックに** — Nginx UI **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** の「`/mcp_message` エンドポイントが空デフォルト IP 許可リストで未認証 12 ツール呼び出し可能」という構造的欠陥が VulnCheck KEV 追加 + 実環境で 2 リクエストで完全乗っ取り達成という事実は、MCP プロトコルそのものを「ウェブ標準として再設計」しなければスケールしないシグナル。2026 Q3 までに OWASP MCP Top 10 が正式公開され、**Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare による MCP-over-mTLS / 標準 OAuth scope 仕様** が業界標準化、Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security 等が「MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall」プロダクトを Q4 までに次々投入、エンタープライズの「MCP 接続ツール数 / 接続先 / 認可ポリシー」が新たなコンプライアンス監査項目として定着する。

bridges.text: Today's Microsoft Agent 365 GA at $15/user with tenant-level MCP-server allow/block + CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 named techniques + CSA Identity blog supports the prediction's `so_that` component (the predicted MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall enterprise primitive ships). Reason: Agent 365 is the literal control-plane the prediction names, four months ahead of Q3. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: cross-vendor parity (AWS / GCP equivalent) and OWASP MCP Top 10 publication.

text_locales.en: Today's Microsoft Agent 365 GA at $15/user with tenant-level MCP-server allow/block + CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 named techniques + CSA Identity blog supports the prediction's `so_that` component (the predicted MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall enterprise primitive ships). Reason: Agent 365 is the literal control-plane the prediction names, four months ahead of Q3. Coherence 5/5. text_locales.ja: 本日のApptronik幹部採用波 + Figure 03 1/hour 自律夜間運用 + Tesla / Boston Dynamics / SoftBank Roze 軌跡が予測の `landing` コンポーネント(評価プリミティブとしての生産ライン記録)を支持。Reason: 第3走者の商業展開が4ベンダーで可視化、OEM採用記録が登場し始めた。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: 評価基準を制度化するIROS / GTCリーグテーブルの公表は未だ。
text_locales.es: La ola de contrataciones ejecutivas de Apptronik + Figure 03 1/hora con runs autónomos nocturnos + la trayectoria Tesla / Boston Dynamics / SoftBank Roze de hoy apoyan el componente `landing` de la predicción (registros de línea de producción como primitiva de evaluación). Reason: el despliegue comercial de tercer entrante ahora es visible en cuatro proveedores y los récords adoptados por OEM están emergiendo. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ninguna publicación de tabla de liga IROS / GTC formalizando el criterio de evaluación todavía.
text_locales.fil: Ang Apptronik exec-hire wave + Figure 03 1/oras autonomous overnight runs + Tesla / Boston Dynamics / SoftBank Roze trajectory ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `landing` component (production-line records bilang eval primitive). Reason: third-mover commercial deployment ay visible na sa apat na vendors, at OEM-adopted records ay lumalabas na. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: walang IROS / GTC league-table publication na nag-formalize sa eval criterion.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category.

nodes.description: **"Hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" graduates from finance pact to compute-stack lock-in by Q3 2026.** Apr 24's Google **$40B + 5GW** to Anthropic + the prior Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft's existing $13B+ to OpenAI mean the **top 3 frontier labs each have a hyperscaler underwriter — paid partly in compute capacity, not cash**. By Q3 2026, **frontier-model serving topology becomes dictated by funding origin**: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 ships natively on Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 stays Azure-first, and Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) double down on Huawei Ascend (per the Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). The "model-portability promise" of 2024-2025 quietly ends; **enterprise multi-cloud LLM strategy shifts from "multi-runtime" to "multi-frontier-vendor."**

short_label.ja: ハイパースケーラー × AI ラボの資本結合」が金融的盟約から計算スタックの囲…

description.en: **"Hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" graduates from finance pact to compute-stack lock-in by Q3 2026.** Apr 24's Google **$40B + 5GW** to Anthropic + the prior Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft's existing $13B+ to OpenAI mean the **top 3 frontier labs each have a hyperscaler underwriter — paid partly in compute capacity, not cash**. By Q3 2026, **frontier-model serving topology becomes dictated by funding origin**: Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 ships natively on Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 stays Azure-first, and Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) double down on Huawei Ascend (per the Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). The "model-portability promise" of 2024-2025 quietly ends; **enterprise multi-cloud LLM strategy shifts from "multi-runtime" to "multi-frontier-vendor."**
description.ja: **「ハイパースケーラー × AI ラボの資本結合」が金融的盟約から計算スタックの囲い込みへ移行、Q3 2026 に完成する。** 4/24 の Google **400 億ドル + 5GW** Anthropic 投資 + 直前の Amazon **250 億ドル + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft の既存 130 億ドル超 OpenAI 投資により、**フロンティア 3 ラボそれぞれに専属ハイパースケーラーが付き、しかも支払いの一部は計算キャパシティで決済される**構造が確立。Q3 2026 までに、**フロンティアモデルのサービング配置は資金提供元によって規定される**ようになる。Anthropic の Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 は Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google 経路) でネイティブ提供、OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 は Azure ファースト維持、中国系フロンティア (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) は Huawei Ascend にさらに傾斜 (4/26 Bloomberg-CCTV 記事の通り)。2024-2025 の「モデル可搬性の約束」は静かに終わり、**エンタープライズのマルチクラウド LLM 戦略は「マルチランタイム」から「マルチフロンティアベンダー」へ転換する**。
description.es: **El "acoplamiento de capital hyperscaler-laboratorio AI" deja de ser pacto financiero para convertirse en bloqueo de la pila de cómputo durante el T3 2026.** El compromiso del 24/4 de Google **40.000 M$ + 5 GW** a Anthropic + el previo Amazon **25.000 M$ + 5 GW de Trainium2/3** + los más de 13.000 M$ históricos de Microsoft a OpenAI suponen que **los tres laboratorios frontera tienen un padrino hyperscaler — pagado en parte con capacidad de cómputo, no en metálico**. Para el T3 2026, **la topología de servicio de modelos frontera quedará dictada por el origen de la financiación**: Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nativo en Trainium2 + TPU v8 (vías Amazon + Google), GPT-5.5 / 6 sigue Azure-first y los laboratorios chinos (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) doblan apuesta por Huawei Ascend (según el artículo Bloomberg-CCTV del 26/4). La "promesa de portabilidad de modelos" de 2024-2025 se apaga; **la estrategia LLM multi-cloud de la empresa pasa de "multi-runtime" a "multi-vendor frontera"**.
description.fil: **Magmamadali ang "hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" mula sa finance pact tungo sa compute-stack lock-in pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 24 Google **$40B + 5GW** sa Anthropic + ang naunang Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + ang umiiral na $13B+ ng Microsoft sa OpenAI ay nangangahulugang **bawat isa sa tatlong frontier labs ay may hyperscaler underwriter — bahagyang binabayaran sa pamamagitan ng compute capacity, hindi cash**. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **ang serving topology ng frontier models ay didiktahan ng pinanggalingan ng pondo**: Mag-ship ang Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nang native sa Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), magiging Azure-first pa rin ang OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6, at lalong magpopokus ang Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) sa Huawei Ascend (gaya ng nasa Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). Tahimik na matatapos ang "model-portability promise" ng 2024-2025; **ang multi-cloud LLM strategy ng enterprise ay lilipat mula "multi-runtime" tungo sa "multi-frontier-vendor"**.

bridges.text: Today's Pentagon 8-vendor split + Anthropic 6-month sunset + NSA Project Aether (NSA depends on Mythos that Pentagon refused to procure) + Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync supports the prediction's `landing` component (frontier-model serving topology dictated by funding origin; multi-frontier-vendor replaces multi-runtime). Reason: 8-vendor cohort topology + Mythos-via-NSA loophole is the cleanest operative split between procurement-stack and capability-stack. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: no formal frontier-lab × Tier-1-cloud exclusivity disclosure beyond Bedrock + Foundry channels.

text_locales.ja: 本日の CSA Identity in the Age of AI(5月1日)+ Microsoft Agent 365 Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender + Registry Sync クロスクラウド・プレビューは `given`(エージェント・アズ・ファーストクラス・アイデンティティ基盤)を支持する。理由: 運用上の基板基本機能がクロスクラウド・コントロールプレーン層で形成中。Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: 本日のニュースに米州法または立法草案活動なし。
text_locales.es: CSA Identity in the Age of AI (May 1) + Microsoft Agent 365 Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender + preview Registry Sync cross-cloud apoya `given` (andamio agent-as-first-class-identity). Razón: primitivo operative-substrate formándose en capa cross-cloud control plane. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: no hay statute estado-US o actividad legislative-draft en noticias hoy.
text_locales.fil: Today's CSA Identity in the Age of AI (May 1) + Microsoft Agent 365 Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender + Registry Sync cross-cloud preview ay nag-su-suporta sa `given` (agent-as-first-class-identity scaffolding). Reason: operative-substrate primitive nabubuo sa cross-cloud control plane layer. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: walang US-state statute o legislative-draft activity sa today's news.

bridges.text: Today's Pentagon 7-vendor split + Anthropic Opus 4.7 across Claude/API/Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry + OpenAI on Bedrock preview supports the prediction's `landing` component (multi-frontier-vendor replaces multi-runtime). Reason: the visible deployment topology is now funding-origin-shaped, with Anthropic uniquely on all four hosting paths. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no 10-Q-level disclosure tying funding origin to serving topology yet.

text_locales.ja: 本日のATT&CK v19 named-techniques + CSAI MITRE-CNA継続 + Microsoft Agent 365 + Agent Harness Survey preprintが `landing`(マトリクス部分が出荷済み)を支持。Reason: ATT&CK v19が予測が要求するnamed-technique付録の操作的実体。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF付録未公表;主要マーケットプレイスから署名+来歴ゲートの出荷が未だ。
text_locales.es: Técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 + continuación CSAI MITRE-CNA + Microsoft Agent 365 + preprint Agent Harness Survey de hoy apoyan `landing` (la parte de la matriz envió). Reason: ATT&CK v19 es operativamente el apéndice named-technique que la predicción exige. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: apéndice NIST AI-RMF aún no publicado; puerta de firma + procedencia aún no enviada en ningún mercado mayor.
text_locales.fil: Ang ATT&CK v19 named-techniques + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + Microsoft Agent 365 + Agent Harness Survey preprint ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `landing` (na-ship ang matrix part). Reason: ang ATT&CK v19 ay operationally ang named-technique appendix na hinihingi ng prediction. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF appendix hindi pa publish; signing + provenance gate hindi pa na-ship sa anumang major marketplace.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「ハイパースケーラー × AI ラボの資本結合」が金融的盟約から計算スタックの囲い込みへ移行、Q3 2026 に完成する。** 4/24 の Google **400 億ドル + 5GW** Anthropic 投資 + 直前の Amazon **250 億ドル + 5GW Trainium2/3** + Microsoft の既存 130 億ドル超 OpenAI 投資により、**フロンティア 3 ラボそれぞれに専属ハイパースケーラーが付き、しかも支払いの一部は計算キャパシティで決済される**構造が確立。Q3 2026 までに、**フロンティアモデルのサービング配置は資金提供元によって規定される**ようになる。Anthropic の Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 は Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google 経路) でネイティブ提供、OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6 は Azure ファースト維持、中国系フロンティア (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) は Huawei Ascend にさらに傾斜 (4/26 Bloomberg-CCTV 記事の通り)。2024-2025 の「モデル可搬性の約束」は静かに終わり、**エンタープライズのマルチクラウド LLM 戦略は「マルチランタイム」から「マルチフロンティアベンダー」へ転換する**。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El "acoplamiento de capital hyperscaler-laboratorio AI" deja de ser pacto financiero para convertirse en bloqueo de la pila de cómputo durante el T3 2026.** El compromiso del 24/4 de Google **40.000 M$ + 5 GW** a Anthropic + el previo Amazon **25.000 M$ + 5 GW de Trainium2/3** + los más de 13.000 M$ históricos de Microsoft a OpenAI suponen que **los tres laboratorios frontera tienen un padrino hyperscaler — pagado en parte con capacidad de cómputo, no en metálico**. Para el T3 2026, **la topología de servicio de modelos frontera quedará dictada por el origen de la financiación**: Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nativo en Trainium2 + TPU v8 (vías Amazon + Google), GPT-5.5 / 6 sigue Azure-first y los laboratorios chinos (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) doblan apuesta por Huawei Ascend (según el artículo Bloomberg-CCTV del 26/4). La "promesa de portabilidad de modelos" de 2024-2025 se apaga; **la estrategia LLM multi-cloud de la empresa pasa de "multi-runtime" a "multi-vendor frontera"**.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Magmamadali ang "hyperscaler-AI-lab capital coupling" mula sa finance pact tungo sa compute-stack lock-in pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 24 Google **$40B + 5GW** sa Anthropic + ang naunang Amazon **$25B + 5GW Trainium2/3** + ang umiiral na $13B+ ng Microsoft sa OpenAI ay nangangahulugang **bawat isa sa tatlong frontier labs ay may hyperscaler underwriter — bahagyang binabayaran sa pamamagitan ng compute capacity, hindi cash**. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **ang serving topology ng frontier models ay didiktahan ng pinanggalingan ng pondo**: Mag-ship ang Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 / 4.8 nang native sa Trainium2 + TPU v8 (Amazon + Google paths), magiging Azure-first pa rin ang OpenAI GPT-5.5 / 6, at lalong magpopokus ang Chinese frontier labs (DeepSeek V4 / Qwen 3.6-3.7) sa Huawei Ascend (gaya ng nasa Apr 26 Bloomberg-CCTV piece). Tahimik na matatapos ang "model-portability promise" ng 2024-2025; **ang multi-cloud LLM strategy ng enterprise ay lilipat mula "multi-runtime" tungo sa "multi-frontier-vendor"**.

nodes.description: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" — Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatory NVD tagging.** The Apr 19-26 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + the Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — composes a clear "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. By Q3 2026, NIST/NVD adds a dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag to its CVE schema, OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** to a top-3 entry, and supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ships **per-engine signature feeds for vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** as standard SKUs.

description.en: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" — Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatory NVD tagging.** The Apr 19-26 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + the Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — composes a clear "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. By Q3 2026, NIST/NVD adds a dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag to its CVE schema, OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** to a top-3 entry, and supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ships **per-engine signature feeds for vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** as standard SKUs.
description.ja: **推論サーバが新たな「プリミティブのサプライチェーン」になる — Q3 2026 に AI インフラ専用 CVE クラス (LLM-INFRA-CWE) が NVD タグ付け必須化される最初のケースが登場。** 4/19-26 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分で攻撃成立)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar による Antigravity の `find_by_name -X` サンドボックス エスケープ** + 4/21 の Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot をまたいだ Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション — が「推論ランタイム + エージェンティック CI」攻撃面のカテゴリーを形成。Q3 2026 までに NIST/NVD が CVE スキーマに **「AI-Infra」専用タグ**を追加、OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 が **「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」** をトップ 3 に格上げ、Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera が **vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama 各エンジン用の署名フィード**を標準 SKU として提供開始。
description.es: **Los servidores de inferencia se convierten en la nueva "cadena de suministro de primitivos" — el T3 2026 verá la primera clase de CVE específica de infraestructura AI (LLM-INFRA-CWE) con etiquetado obligatorio en NVD.** La secuencia 19/4-26/4 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 h 31 min explotado)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) RCE Jinja2 SSTI** + **escape de sandbox de Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + la cadena Comment-and-Control del 21/4 sobre Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — compone una categoría clara de superficie de ataque "runtime de inferencia + CI agéntico". Para el T3 2026, NIST/NVD añade una etiqueta dedicada **"AI-Infra"** a su esquema CVE, OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** al top 3 y el tooling SBOM (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) entrega **feeds de firmas por motor para vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** como SKUs estándar.
description.fil: **Magiging bagong "primitive supply chain" ang inference servers — sa Q3 2026 lalabas ang unang AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) na may mandatory NVD tagging.** Ang sequence ng Apr 19-26 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X`** + ang Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — ay bumubuo ng malinaw na "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, magdadagdag ang NIST/NVD ng dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag sa CVE schema nito, ipo-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** sa top-3 entry, at maglalabas ang supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ng **per-engine signature feeds para sa vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** bilang standard SKUs.

summary.en: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" — Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatory NVD tagging.** The Apr 19-26 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + the Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — composes a clear "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. bridges.text: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched ~14 days) + LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 + Spring AI + UTT/IBM Langflow May 1 wave + Linux Copy Fail KEV supports `because` (the inference-server CVE class is forming on schedule). Reason: cross-server cluster (vLLM + LMDeploy + Spring AI + LiteLLM + SGLang) + KEV-mandated remediation is the AI-Infra-CVE-class precondition. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: NVD does not yet tag with an inference-server-specific CWE / category.

text_locales.ja: 本日の OpenAI 売上相場 + AAPL Q3 ガイダンス +14-17% + サービス AI 別個行なし + Cerebras IPO 5月中旬 + 本日の予測 #3(SEC AI 売上コンセプト・リリース Q4 2026)は `because`(開示書き換え力が構築; 本日の #3 が運用上の規制エスカレーション)を支持する。理由: AAPL Q3 ガイダンスが視認可能な開示前例の拡大、OpenAI の売上形状は不透明のまま; SEC コンセプト・リリースが次の規制ステップ。Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: SEC または買い手側公開の AI 売上開示フレームワークはまだなし。
text_locales.es: OpenAI revenue tape de hoy + AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% + Services sin línea AI separada + Cerebras IPO mid-May + predicción hoy #3 (SEC AI-revenue concept release Q4 2026) apoya `because` (fuerza disclosure-rewrite construye; #3 hoy es la escalada regulatoria operativa). Razón: AAPL Q3 guide es el precedente visible-disclosure expandiéndose mientras la forma revenue OpenAI permanece opaca; un SEC concept release es el siguiente paso regulatorio. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: aún no SEC o framework disclosure AI-revenue publicado por buyside.
text_locales.fil: Today's OpenAI revenue tape + AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% + Services walang separate AI line + Cerebras IPO mid-May + today's prediction #3 (SEC AI-revenue concept release Q4 2026) ay nag-su-suporta sa `because` (disclosure-rewrite force builds; today's #3 ay ang operative regulatory escalation). Reason: AAPL Q3 guide ay ang visible-disclosure precedent expanding habang ang OpenAI's revenue shape ay nananatiling opaque; SEC concept release ang next regulatory step. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: walang SEC o buyside-published AI-revenue disclosure framework yet.

Reason: cross-server cluster + named-technique infrastructure are converging. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: NVD does not yet tag with an inference-server-specific CWE / category.

text_locales.ja: 本日のMicrosoft Agent 365 GA $15/userでテナントレベルMCPサーバ allow/block + CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 named techniques + CSA Identityブログが予測の `so_that` コンポーネント(予測されたMCP Gateway / MCP Firewall企業プリミティブ出荷)を支持。Reason: Agent 365は予測が名付けたコントロールプレーン本体を、Q3より4ヶ月早く出荷。Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: クロスベンダー同等(AWS / GCP相当)とOWASP MCP Top 10公表。
text_locales.es: El GA de Microsoft Agent 365 a $15/usuario con permitir/bloquear de servidores MCP a nivel de tenant + CSAI MITRE-CNA + técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 + blog CSA Identity de hoy apoyan el componente `so_that` de la predicción (la primitiva empresarial MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall predicha es enviada). Reason: Agent 365 es el plano de control literal que la predicción nombra, cuatro meses adelantado al Q3. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: paridad cross-vendor (equivalente AWS / GCP) y publicación OWASP MCP Top 10.
text_locales.fil: Ang Microsoft Agent 365 GA sa $15/user na may tenant-level MCP-server allow/block + CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 named techniques + CSA Identity blog ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `so_that` component ng prediction (na-ship ang predicted MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall enterprise primitive). Reason: ang Agent 365 ay literal na control-plane na pinangalanan ng prediction, apat na buwan na maaga sa Q3. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: cross-vendor parity (AWS / GCP equivalent) at OWASP MCP Top 10 publication.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **推論サーバが新たな「プリミティブのサプライチェーン」になる — Q3 2026 に AI インフラ専用 CVE クラス (LLM-INFRA-CWE) が NVD タグ付け必須化される最初のケースが登場。** 4/19-26 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分で攻撃成立)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar による Antigravity の `find_by_name -X` サンドボックス エスケープ** + 4/21 の Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot をまたいだ Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション — が「推論ランタイム + エージェンティック CI」攻撃面のカテゴリーを形成。Q3 2026 までに NIST/NVD が CVE スキーマに **「AI-Infra」専用タグ**を追加、OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 が **「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」** をトップ 3 に格上げ、Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera が **vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama 各エンジン用の署名フィード**を標準 SKU として提供開始。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Los servidores de inferencia se convierten en la nueva "cadena de suministro de primitivos" — el T3 2026 verá la primera clase de CVE específica de infraestructura AI (LLM-INFRA-CWE) con etiquetado obligatorio en NVD.** La secuencia 19/4-26/4 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 h 31 min explotado)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) RCE Jinja2 SSTI** + **escape de sandbox de Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + la cadena Comment-and-Control del 21/4 sobre Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — compone una categoría clara de superficie de ataque "runtime de inferencia + CI agéntico". Para el T3 2026, NIST/NVD añade una etiqueta dedicada **"AI-Infra"** a su esquema CVE, OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** al top 3 y el tooling SBOM (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) entrega **feeds de firmas por motor para vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** como SKUs estándar.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Magiging bagong "primitive supply chain" ang inference servers — sa Q3 2026 lalabas ang unang AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) na may mandatory NVD tagging.** Ang sequence ng Apr 19-26 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X`** + ang Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — ay bumubuo ng malinaw na "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, magdadagdag ang NIST/NVD ng dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag sa CVE schema nito, ipo-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** sa top-3 entry, at maglalabas ang supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ng **per-engine signature feeds para sa vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** bilang standard SKUs.

description.en: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.
description.ja: **「AI インフラ CVE クラス」が規制プリミティブへ昇格 — Q4 2026 に CISA / NIST が KEV から独立した「推論サーバ + エージェンティック CI ランタイム」サブカタログを公開。** 4/19-27 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (依然未パッチ)** + **Pillar の Antigravity サンドボックス エスケープ (`find_by_name -X` 経由)** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE (CI/CD 基盤依存)** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション チェーン (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 サンドボックス バイパス** — はもはや「カテゴリ形成中」ではない。NIST の 4 月オペレーション更新 (CVE 公開数の記録的増加、AI 駆動評価サポート) と Google の **野生 IPI コンテンツ前年比 32% 増** を受けて、CISA/NVD が Q4 2026 までに **専用の「推論サーバ + エージェンティック ツール」CVE サブカタログ** を SBOM タグ付け必須でリリース。OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をトップ 3 に格上げ。
description.es: **La "clase CVE de infraestructura de IA" se gradúa como primitiva regulatoria — el Q4 2026 verá a CISA / NIST publicar un subcatálogo para runtimes de servidores de inferencia + CI agente, separado del KEV.** La secuencia 19-27/04 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (sigue sin parche)** + **escape de sandbox en Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + **CVE-2026-6951 RCE en simple-git, dependencia fundacional de CI/CD** + **cadena de inyección Comment-and-Control del 21/04 en Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **bypass de sandbox en OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329** — ya no es una "categoría emergente". La actualización de operaciones de NIST de abril (crecimiento récord de publicación de CVE, soporte de evaluación basado en IA) más el **aumento del 32% interanual de inyecciones indirectas en la wild de Google** obligan a CISA/NVD a entregar un **subcatálogo CVE dedicado a servidores de inferencia + herramientas agente** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio para el Q4 2026. El OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" al top 3.
description.fil: **Mag-graduate ang "AI-Infra CVE class" papuntang regulatory primitive — sa Q4 2026, mag-publish ang CISA / NIST ng sub-catalog para sa inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, hiwalay sa KEV.** Ang sequence ng 4/19-27 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (hindi pa rin na-patch)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa foundational CI/CD dep** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — hindi na "category emerging." Ang April ops update ng NIST (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus ang **32% YoY na pagtaas ng indirect-prompt-injection sa wild ng Google** ang magpipilit sa CISA/NVD na mag-ship ng **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging pagdating ng Q4 2026. I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" papuntang top-3.

OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.

bridges.text: Today's CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques + Linux Copy Fail KEV + cPanel & WHM KEV + NIST CAISI RFI supports `because` (regulatory primitive forming). Reason: issuer-authority + named-technique scaffolding is in place across MITRE + CSA + NIST + CISA, and today's prediction #2 (frontier cyber-AI export-control category) is the operative escalation. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: CISA / NIST has not yet published an inference-server / agentic-CI sub-catalog separate from KEV.

text_locales.ja: 本日の $700B 2026 設備投資 + AAPL +$100B 自社株買い + Q3 +14-17% ガイダンス + AMD 5月5日 OpenAI 6GW H2 初期配備タイミング + Powell が5月15日越え留任 + 4月雇用統計5月8日は `because`(Q3 報告サイクルへのコホート設備投資圧力エスカレーション)を支持する。理由: AMD の H2 2026 OpenAI 6GW 初期配備コミットが視認可能な最も具体的なトークン単価マージン階層化設備投資アンカー。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ハイパースケーラーはまだトークン単価マージン階層化設備投資を開示していない。
text_locales.es: $700B 2026 capex + AAPL +$100B buyback + Q3 +14-17% guide + AMD May 5 OpenAI 6GW H2 first-deployment timing + Powell se queda más allá May 15 + Apr Jobs May 8 apoya `because` (escalada presión cohort capex hacia ciclo reporte Q3). Razón: el commit H2 2026 OpenAI 6GW first-deployment de AMD es el ancla per-token-margin-gated capex más concreto visible. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ningún hyperscaler ha disclosed per-token-margin-gated capex.
text_locales.fil: Today's $700B 2026 capex + AAPL +$100B buyback + Q3 +14-17% guide + AMD May 5 OpenAI 6GW H2 first-deployment timing + Powell stays past May 15 + Apr Jobs May 8 ay nag-su-suporta sa `because` (cohort capex pressure escalation patungong Q3 reporting cycle). Reason: ang AMD's H2 2026 OpenAI 6GW first-deployment commit ay ang most concrete per-token-margin-gated capex anchor na visible. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: walang hyperscaler na nag-disclosed ng per-token-margin-gated capex.

text_locales.ja: 本日のAnthropic Opus 4.7 Claude/API/Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry展開 + AWS AgentCore Node.js + 14リージョンGA + Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-discovery + MS Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GAが `landing`(frontier-on-every-cloud着地)を支持。Reason: Anthropicが独占的に4ホスティング経路全てに出荷、予測パターンの直接ミラー。Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: 4経路全体での標準化SLAフィールド開示の同時並行が未だ。
text_locales.es: Anthropic Opus 4.7 en Claude/API/Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry + AWS AgentCore Node.js + 14-region GA + Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-discovery + MS Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA de hoy apoyan `landing` (frontier-on-every-cloud aterriza). Reason: Anthropic envía únicamente en las cuatro rutas de hosting, el espejo literal del patrón de la predicción. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: ninguna estandarización paralela de divulgación de campos SLA a través de las cuatro rutas de hosting todavía.
text_locales.fil: Ang Anthropic Opus 4.7 sa Claude/API/Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry + AWS AgentCore Node.js + 14-region GA + Codex CLI 0.128.0 model-provider-discovery + MS Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `landing` (frontier-on-every-cloud lands). Reason: ang Anthropic ay nag-ship sa lahat ng apat na hosting paths, ang literal mirror ng prediction's pattern. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: walang parallel SLA-field disclosure standardization sa apat na hosting paths.

NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「AI インフラ CVE クラス」が規制プリミティブへ昇格 — Q4 2026 に CISA / NIST が KEV から独立した「推論サーバ + エージェンティック CI ランタイム」サブカタログを公開。** 4/19-27 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (依然未パッチ)** + **Pillar の Antigravity サンドボックス エスケープ (`find_by_name -X` 経由)** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE (CI/CD 基盤依存)** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション チェーン (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 サンドボックス バイパス** — はもはや「カテゴリ形成中」ではない。NIST の 4 月オペレーション更新 (CVE 公開数の記録的増加、AI 駆動評価サポート) と Google の **野生 IPI コンテンツ前年比 32% 増** を受けて、CISA/NVD が Q4 2026 までに **専用の「推論サーバ + エージェンティック ツール」CVE サブカタログ** を SBOM タグ付け必須でリリース。OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をトップ 3 に格上げ。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **La "clase CVE de infraestructura de IA" se gradúa como primitiva regulatoria — el Q4 2026 verá a CISA / NIST publicar un subcatálogo para runtimes de servidores de inferencia + CI agente, separado del KEV.** La secuencia 19-27/04 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (sigue sin parche)** + **escape de sandbox en Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + **CVE-2026-6951 RCE en simple-git, dependencia fundacional de CI/CD** + **cadena de inyección Comment-and-Control del 21/04 en Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **bypass de sandbox en OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329** — ya no es una "categoría emergente". La actualización de operaciones de NIST de abril (crecimiento récord de publicación de CVE, soporte de evaluación basado en IA) más el **aumento del 32% interanual de inyecciones indirectas en la wild de Google** obligan a CISA/NVD a entregar un **subcatálogo CVE dedicado a servidores de inferencia + herramientas agente** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio para el Q4 2026. El OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" al top 3.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Mag-graduate ang "AI-Infra CVE class" papuntang regulatory primitive — sa Q4 2026, mag-publish ang CISA / NIST ng sub-catalog para sa inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, hiwalay sa KEV.** Ang sequence ng 4/19-27 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (hindi pa rin na-patch)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa foundational CI/CD dep** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — hindi na "category emerging." Ang April ops update ng NIST (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus ang **32% YoY na pagtaas ng indirect-prompt-injection sa wild ng Google** ang magpipilit sa CISA/NVD na mag-ship ng **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging pagdating ng Q4 2026. I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" papuntang top-3.

OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.

description.en: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.
description.ja: **推論サーバSSTIが単発CVEからOWASP LLM Top-10 v2026項目へ昇格 — CISAは2026年Q3までに「AI-Infra KEV」サブカタログを公開する。** SGLang CVE-2026-5760(CVSS 9.8)は4/28時点でも**未パッチ**(開示後10日以上)、公開PoCがあり、`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` 不使用のJinja2の同型がvLLM / LMDeploy / 周辺推論サーバを横断するコピペクラスとして指摘されている。**4/27-28のTotolink CVE 4連発(7153/7154/7156/7202、すべて9.8)**、**Cisco ISE 認証不要RCE**、**simple-git CVE-2026-6951 のCI/CD向けRCE**、**PillarのAntigravity サンドボックスエスケープ(`find_by_name -X`経由)**、Google / Forcepoint の**間接プロンプトインジェクション 32% YoY 増加** + 10件の野生ペイロードを合わせると、NIST / CISAへの圧力が結晶化する。**2026年Q3までにCISAは専用「AI-Infra」KEVサブカタログ**を公開し、推論サーバ(vLLM / SGLang / Ollama / llama.cpp / LMDeploy)とエージェント型CIランタイム(Claude Code / Codex / Antigravity / OpenClaw)に対するSBOMタグ付けを義務化する。OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をTop-3に格上げする。
description.es: **El SSTI en servidores de inferencia se gradúa de CVE puntual a entrada en OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026; CISA publicará un sub-catálogo "AI-Infra KEV" para Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9,8) **sigue sin parche al 28 abr** (10+ días post-divulgación), con PoC público y la misma forma de Jinja2-sin-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` ahora marcada como una clase de copia-pega que abarca vLLM, LMDeploy y servidores de inferencia adyacentes. Combinado con el **cuádruple CVE Totolink del 27-28 abr (7153/7154/7156/7202, todos 9,8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE en CI/CD**, **escape de sandbox Antigravity de Pillar vía `find_by_name -X`**, y el **aumento del 32% YoY en inyección indirecta de prompt** de Google/Forcepoint con 10 payloads en estado salvaje — la presión sobre NIST/CISA cristaliza. **Para Q3 2026 CISA publicará un sub-catálogo dedicado "AI-Infra" KEV** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio sobre servidores de inferencia (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) y runtimes agénticos de CI (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" al top-3.
description.fil: **Ang Inference-server SSTI ay magta-graduate mula one-off CVE patungong OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; magpa-publish ang CISA ng "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) ay **hindi pa rin patched hanggang Apr 28** (10+ araw post-disclosure), na may public PoC at parehong Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape na ngayon flagged bilang copy-paste class na sumasaklaw sa vLLM, LMDeploy, at adjacent inference servers. Pagsamahin sa **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, lahat 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, at sa **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** ng Google/Forcepoint na may 10 in-the-wild payloads — nagcrystallize ang pressure sa NIST/CISA. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026 magpapadala ang CISA ng dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging sa inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) at agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" sa top-3.

summary.en: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.

bridges.text: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 unpatched + cross-server class spread + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + CISA KEV May 1 (Linux kernel, not AI-infra-specific) supports `because` (the OWASP class is forming). Reason: named-technique + unpatched-CVE + cross-server precedent is locked in. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 is not yet published; CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog not yet shipped.

text_locales.en: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 unpatched + cross-server class spread + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + CISA KEV May 1 (Linux kernel, not AI-infra-specific) supports `because` (the OWASP class is forming). Reason: named-technique + unpatched-CVE + cross-server precedent is locked in. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 is not yet published; CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog not yet shipped.
text_locales.ja: 本日の SGLang CVE-2026-5760(依然未パッチ ~14日)+ LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 + Spring AI + UTT/IBM Langflow 5月1日波 + Linux Copy Fail KEV は `because`(推論サーバー CVE クラスが予定通り形成中)を支持する。理由: クロスサーバー・クラスター(vLLM + LMDeploy + Spring AI + LiteLLM + SGLang)+ KEV 義務化された修復が AI-Infra-CVE-クラスの前提条件。Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: NVD はまだ推論サーバー固有の CWE / カテゴリでタグ付けしていない。
text_locales.es: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 de hoy (aún sin parche ~14 días) + LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 + Spring AI + ola UTT/IBM Langflow May 1 + Linux Copy Fail KEV apoya `because` (clase CVE inference-server formándose en cronograma). Razón: cluster cross-server (vLLM + LMDeploy + Spring AI + LiteLLM + SGLang) + remediación KEV-mandatoria es la precondición clase-AI-Infra-CVE. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: NVD aún no etiqueta con CWE / categoría inference-server-específica.
text_locales.fil: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched ~14 days) + LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 + Spring AI + UTT/IBM Langflow May 1 wave + Linux Copy Fail KEV ay nag-su-suporta sa `because` (ang inference-server CVE class ay nabubuo sa schedule). Reason: cross-server cluster (vLLM + LMDeploy + Spring AI + LiteLLM + SGLang) + KEV-mandated remediation ang AI-Infra-CVE-class precondition. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: ang NVD ay hindi pa nag-ta-tag ng inference-server-specific CWE / category.

bridges.text: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 unpatched + cross-server class spread to vLLM/LMDeploy/Spring AI/LiteLLM + CSAI MITRE-CNA + CISA KEV (Linux Copy Fail) supports `because` (the OWASP class is forming). Reason: the named-technique + unpatched-CVE precedent is locked in. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 is not yet published; CISA KEV May 1 add was Linux kernel, not AI-infra-specific.

text_locales.ja: 本日のDeepSeek V4 Pro/Flash + Qwen 3.6 + Kimi K2.6 + GLM-5.1 + Bonsai-8B + Foundry Local + Unsloth 2026.4.8が `because`(コンシューマGPU対応オープンウェイト・スタックが成熟)を支持。Reason: オープンウェイト・スタックがコンシューマハードウェア価格でGPT-5.4をSWE-Bench Pro超え。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: エンタープライズ開発ツールベンダーから「デフォルト≥30%ローカルファースト切替」テレメトリの公表が未だ。
text_locales.es: DeepSeek V4 Pro/Flash + Qwen 3.6 + Kimi K2.6 + GLM-5.1 + Bonsai-8B + Foundry Local + Unsloth 2026.4.8 de hoy apoyan `because` (la pila open-weight capaz de GPU consumidor madura). Reason: la pila open-weight ahora supera GPT-5.4 en SWE-Bench Pro a precios de hardware consumidor. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ningún proveedor de herramientas de desarrollo empresarial ha publicado un artefacto de telemetría "≥30% local-first toggle por defecto".
text_locales.fil: Ang DeepSeek V4 Pro/Flash + Qwen 3.6 + Kimi K2.6 + GLM-5.1 + Bonsai-8B + Foundry Local + Unsloth 2026.4.8 ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `because` (consumer-GPU-capable open-weight stack ay umuunlad). Reason: ang open-weight stack ay nakakatalo na sa GPT-5.4 sa SWE-Bench Pro sa consumer-hardware price points. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: walang enterprise dev-tool vendor na nag-publish ng "≥30% local-first toggle by default" telemetry.

detail.description: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.

Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw).
