prediction_summary_locales.ja: **推論サーバSSTIが単発CVEからOWASP LLM Top-10 v2026項目へ昇格 — CISAは2026年Q3までに「AI-Infra KEV」サブカタログを公開する。** SGLang CVE-2026-5760(CVSS 9.8)は4/28時点でも**未パッチ**(開示後10日以上)、公開PoCがあり、`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` 不使用のJinja2の同型がvLLM / LMDeploy / 周辺推論サーバを横断するコピペクラスとして指摘されている。**4/27-28のTotolink CVE 4連発(7153/7154/7156/7202、すべて9.8)**、**Cisco ISE 認証不要RCE**、**simple-git CVE-2026-6951 のCI/CD向けRCE**、**PillarのAntigravity サンドボックスエスケープ(`find_by_name -X`経由)**、Google / Forcepoint の**間接プロンプトインジェクション 32% YoY 増加** + 10件の野生ペイロードを合わせると、NIST / CISAへの圧力が結晶化する。**2026年Q3までにCISAは専用「AI-Infra」KEVサブカタログ**を公開し、推論サーバ(vLLM / SGLang / Ollama / llama.cpp / LMDeploy)とエージェント型CIランタイム(Claude Code / Codex / Antigravity / OpenClaw)に対するSBOMタグ付けを義務化する。OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をTop-3に格上げする。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El SSTI en servidores de inferencia se gradúa de CVE puntual a entrada en OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026; CISA publicará un sub-catálogo "AI-Infra KEV" para Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9,8) **sigue sin parche al 28 abr** (10+ días post-divulgación), con PoC público y la misma forma de Jinja2-sin-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` ahora marcada como una clase de copia-pega que abarca vLLM, LMDeploy y servidores de inferencia adyacentes. Combinado con el **cuádruple CVE Totolink del 27-28 abr (7153/7154/7156/7202, todos 9,8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE en CI/CD**, **escape de sandbox Antigravity de Pillar vía `find_by_name -X`**, y el **aumento del 32% YoY en inyección indirecta de prompt** de Google/Forcepoint con 10 payloads en estado salvaje — la presión sobre NIST/CISA cristaliza. **Para Q3 2026 CISA publicará un sub-catálogo dedicado "AI-Infra" KEV** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio sobre servidores de inferencia (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) y runtimes agénticos de CI (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" al top-3.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang Inference-server SSTI ay magta-graduate mula one-off CVE patungong OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; magpa-publish ang CISA ng "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) ay **hindi pa rin patched hanggang Apr 28** (10+ araw post-disclosure), na may public PoC at parehong Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape na ngayon flagged bilang copy-paste class na sumasaklaw sa vLLM, LMDeploy, at adjacent inference servers. Pagsamahin sa **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, lahat 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, at sa **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** ng Google/Forcepoint na may 10 in-the-wild payloads — nagcrystallize ang pressure sa NIST/CISA. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026 magpapadala ang CISA ng dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging sa inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) at agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" sa top-3.

nodes.short_label: The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates…
nodes.description: **The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Mag-7 hyperscaler publishes Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure separated from raw cloud revenue.** WSJ Apr 28 was decisive: a single off-target-leak dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (which already removed the discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A.

description.en: **The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Mag-7 hyperscaler publishes Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure separated from raw cloud revenue.** WSJ Apr 28 was decisive: a single off-target-leak dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (which already removed the discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A.
description.ja: **OpenAI 4/28 WSJ報道は2026年の「AI売上開示の書き換え」を起動する — Q3 2026までに少なくとも1つのファウンデーションラボ(OpenAI、Anthropic、xAI)が監査済みの月次売上 + WAU開示ケイデンスを出荷し、Mag 7ハイパースケーラの少なくとも1社がBedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertexのトークン当たりマージンを生クラウド売上から分離して開示する。** 4/28のWSJは決定的だった: 単一の標的未達リークでOracleが4%、AMDが3%、Broadcomが4%、ソフトバンクが10%下落、しかも**4/27のOpenAI/Microsoft AGI条項撤回**(任意の「AGI宣言」によるIP取消リスクは既に消滅)に重ねての反応。Mag 7決算の集中 + 合算約7,000億ドルの2026キャペックス + 5月中旬の Cerebras IPO ($22B–$25B、G42 24% / MBZUAI 62%の売上集中)を合わせると、ウォール街は今や**ナラティブではなく具体的なAI収益学的開示を明示的に要求**している。Q3 2026までにSEC + アナリスト圧力で(a)少なくとも1ラボが公開月次売上 / WAUダッシュボード・ケイデンスへ、(b)Big-3クラウドの少なくとも1社が10-Q脚注でトークン当たりAIプラットフォーム・マージンを分離開示、を生む。「AGI」は形而上学的概念から金融商品プリミティブへ、「DAU/WAU」はプロダクトKPIからMD&Aへ昇格する。
description.es: **El reporte WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI inicia una "reescritura de la disclosure de revenue AI" en 2026 — para Q3 2026 al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) lanza una cadencia auditada de revenue mensual + WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Mag-7 publica disclosure de margen por token Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex separado del revenue cloud crudo.** El WSJ del 28-abr fue decisivo: una sola filtración de off-target tumbó Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% en una sola sesión, sumado al **rewind del AGI clause OpenAI/Microsoft del 27-abr** (que ya retiró el riesgo discrecional de revocación de IP por declaración AGI). Combinado con la colisión de reportes Mag-7 hoy + ~700 mil millones USD agregados de capex 2026 + el IPO Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B–$25B (concentración 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), Wall Street ahora **exige explícitamente disclosure de economía AI tangible, no narrativa**. Para Q3 2026 la presión SEC + analistas produce (a) al menos un foundation lab moviéndose a una cadencia pública de dashboard de revenue mensual / WAU, y (b) al menos uno de los Big-3 cloud separando margen por token de plataforma AI en notas al pie del 10-Q. La palabra "AGI" pasa de metafísica a primitiva de instrumento financiero; "DAU/WAU" pasa de KPI de producto a MD&A.
description.fil: **Sinisimulan ng OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report ang isang 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — pagsapit ng Q3 2026, magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) ng audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, at maglalathala ng di bababa sa isang Mag-7 hyperscaler ng Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure na hiwalay sa raw cloud revenue.** Mapagpasya ang WSJ Apr 28: isang off-target leak lang ay nagpababa kay Oracle ng 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% sa isang session, plus pa rin ng **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (na inalis na ang discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Kasabay ng Mag-7 prints collision ngayon + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B–$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), **buong-buo at hayagang hinihingi na ng Wall Street ang tangible AI-economics disclosure, hindi narrative**. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang SEC + analyst pressure ay magbubunga ng (a) di bababa sa isang foundation lab na lumipat sa public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, at (b) di bababa sa isang Big-3 cloud na ihihiwalay ang per-token AI-platform margin sa 10-Q footnotes. Mula metaphysical ay magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI"; mula product KPI ay magiging MD&A material ang "DAU/WAU".

Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A.

bridges.text: Today's OpenAI revenue tape (Sacra $25B annualized + reports of late-2026 IPO steps) + AAPL Q2 print no AI-services line + Cerebras IPO mid-May + AMD May 5 supports `because` (disclosure-rewrite pressure builds). Reason: an OpenAI IPO reporting period would force the audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence — but it has not landed. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: no foundation lab has yet shipped audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence.

text_locales.en: Today's OpenAI revenue tape (Sacra $25B annualized + reports of late-2026 IPO steps) + AAPL Q2 print no AI-services line + Cerebras IPO mid-May + AMD May 5 supports `because` (disclosure-rewrite pressure builds). Reason: an OpenAI IPO reporting period would force the audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence — but it has not landed. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: no foundation lab has yet shipped audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence.
text_locales.ja: 本日の Powell が5月15日越え留任 + Warsh Senate Banking 確認 + Powell は2028年まで理事 + 4月雇用統計5月8日ベースライン + WTI +12% 週次は `because`(マクロボラタイル週下での市場心理ピボット)を支持する。理由: 「シャドー Chair」から正式理事マージナル・スイングへの構造的シフトが現在公的に交渉中; イラン緊張原油入札がボラティリティを追加。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: Warsh Chair 下での反対投票数はまだ印刷されていない; ≤2 反対規範予測は未観測。
text_locales.es: Powell se queda más allá May 15 + Warsh confirm Senate Banking + Powell en Board hasta 2028 + baseline Apr Jobs Report May 8 + WTI +12% sem apoya `because` (pivote market-psychology bajo semana macro-volátil). Razón: shift estructural desde "shadow chair" a Board-marginal-swing formal ahora públicamente negociado; bid petróleo Iran-tension agrega volatilidad. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: conteo dissent-vote bajo Warsh Chair aún no impreso; proyección norma ≤2 dissent unobserved.
text_locales.fil: Today's Powell stays past May 15 + Warsh Senate Banking confirm + Powell on Board through 2028 + Apr Jobs Report May 8 baseline + WTI +12% week-on-week ay nag-su-suporta sa `because` (market-psychology pivot sa ilalim ng macro-volatile week). Reason: structural shift mula "shadow chair" patungong formal-Board-marginal-swing ay ngayon publicly negotiated; Iran-tension oil bid ay nag-aagdag ng volatility. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: dissent-vote count sa ilalim ng Warsh Chair ay hindi pa printed; ≤2 dissent norm projection unobserved.

bridges.text: Today's OpenAI revenue tape (Sacra $25B annualized, $2B/month run rate, ad pilot $100M) + AAPL Q2 print no AI-services line + Cerebras IPO mid-May supports `because` (disclosure-rewrite pressure builds). Reason: the disclosure-precedent gap is still visible at the cohort level. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: no foundation lab has yet shipped audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence.

Reason: the disclosure-precedent gap is still visible at the cohort level. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: no foundation lab has yet shipped audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence.
text_locales.ja: 本日の明示的訂正(4月雇用統計が5/1ではなく5/8公開)が予測の `landing` コンポーネント(5/1印字フレーミング)を部分的に無効化;Powell-on-Board through 2028 + Warsh上院銀行委承認部分は維持。Reason: 日付アンカーが誤りだが構造的部分は無傷。Coherence 2/5. Remaining gap: 4月雇用統計が5/8に着地、翌日書きでタイミング部分を再アンカー必要。
text_locales.es: La corrección explícita de hoy (Apr Jobs publica el 8/5, no el 1/5) invalida parcialmente el componente `landing` de la predicción (encuadre del print del 1/5); las patas Powell-on-Board hasta 2028 + confirmación Warsh Senate Banking se mantienen. Reason: el ancla de fecha es errónea pero las piezas estructurales permanecen intactas. Coherence 2/5. Remaining gap: el print de Apr Jobs ahora aterriza el 8/5; necesita re-anclar la pata de tiempo en el siguiente día de escritura.
text_locales.fil: Ang explicit correction ngayon (April Jobs nailalathala May 8, hindi May 1) ay partially nag-invalidate sa `landing` component ng prediction (May 1 print framing); ang Powell-on-Board hanggang 2028 + Warsh Senate Banking confirm legs ay buo. Reason: ang date-anchor ay mali pero ang structural pieces ay buo. Coherence 2/5. Remaining gap: ang April Jobs print ngayon ay napupunta sa May 8; kailangan i-re-anchor ang timing leg sa next-day write.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **The OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report initiates a 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — by Q3 2026 at least one foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, or xAI) ships an audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, and at least one Mag-7 hyperscaler publishes Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure separated from raw cloud revenue.** WSJ Apr 28 was decisive: a single off-target-leak dropped Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% in one session, on top of the **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (which already removed the discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A.

Combined with the Mag-7 print collision today + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + the Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22B-$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), Wall Street is now **explicitly demanding tangible AI-economics disclosure, not narrative**. By Q3 2026 the SEC + analyst pressure produces (a) at least one foundation lab moving to a public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, and (b) at least one Big-3 cloud separating per-token AI-platform margin in the 10-Q footnotes. The "AGI" word goes from metaphysical to financial-instrument; "DAU/WAU" goes from product KPI to MD&A.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **OpenAI 4/28 WSJ報道は2026年の「AI売上開示の書き換え」を起動する — Q3 2026までに少なくとも1つのファウンデーションラボ(OpenAI、Anthropic、xAI)が監査済みの月次売上 + WAU開示ケイデンスを出荷し、Mag 7ハイパースケーラの少なくとも1社がBedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertexのトークン当たりマージンを生クラウド売上から分離して開示する。** 4/28のWSJは決定的だった: 単一の標的未達リークでOracleが4%、AMDが3%、Broadcomが4%、ソフトバンクが10%下落、しかも**4/27のOpenAI/Microsoft AGI条項撤回**(任意の「AGI宣言」によるIP取消リスクは既に消滅)に重ねての反応。Mag 7決算の集中 + 合算約7,000億ドルの2026キャペックス + 5月中旬の Cerebras IPO ($22B–$25B、G42 24% / MBZUAI 62%の売上集中)を合わせると、ウォール街は今や**ナラティブではなく具体的なAI収益学的開示を明示的に要求**している。Q3 2026までにSEC + アナリスト圧力で(a)少なくとも1ラボが公開月次売上 / WAUダッシュボード・ケイデンスへ、(b)Big-3クラウドの少なくとも1社が10-Q脚注でトークン当たりAIプラットフォーム・マージンを分離開示、を生む。「AGI」は形而上学的概念から金融商品プリミティブへ、「DAU/WAU」はプロダクトKPIからMD&Aへ昇格する。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El reporte WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI inicia una "reescritura de la disclosure de revenue AI" en 2026 — para Q3 2026 al menos un foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) lanza una cadencia auditada de revenue mensual + WAU, y al menos un hyperscaler Mag-7 publica disclosure de margen por token Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex separado del revenue cloud crudo.** El WSJ del 28-abr fue decisivo: una sola filtración de off-target tumbó Oracle 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% en una sola sesión, sumado al **rewind del AGI clause OpenAI/Microsoft del 27-abr** (que ya retiró el riesgo discrecional de revocación de IP por declaración AGI). Combinado con la colisión de reportes Mag-7 hoy + ~700 mil millones USD agregados de capex 2026 + el IPO Cerebras a mediados de mayo en $22B–$25B (concentración 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI), Wall Street ahora **exige explícitamente disclosure de economía AI tangible, no narrativa**. Para Q3 2026 la presión SEC + analistas produce (a) al menos un foundation lab moviéndose a una cadencia pública de dashboard de revenue mensual / WAU, y (b) al menos uno de los Big-3 cloud separando margen por token de plataforma AI en notas al pie del 10-Q. La palabra "AGI" pasa de metafísica a primitiva de instrumento financiero; "DAU/WAU" pasa de KPI de producto a MD&A.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Sinisimulan ng OpenAI Apr 28 WSJ report ang isang 2026 "AI-revenue disclosure rewrite" — pagsapit ng Q3 2026, magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang foundation lab (OpenAI, Anthropic, o xAI) ng audited monthly-revenue + WAU disclosure cadence, at maglalathala ng di bababa sa isang Mag-7 hyperscaler ng Bedrock/Azure-OpenAI/Vertex per-token-margin disclosure na hiwalay sa raw cloud revenue.** Mapagpasya ang WSJ Apr 28: isang off-target leak lang ay nagpababa kay Oracle ng 4%, AMD 3%, Broadcom 4%, SoftBank 10% sa isang session, plus pa rin ng **Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** (na inalis na ang discretionary "AGI declaration" IP-revocation risk). Kasabay ng Mag-7 prints collision ngayon + ~$700B aggregated 2026 capex + Cerebras IPO sa kalagitnaan ng Mayo sa $22B–$25B (24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration), **buong-buo at hayagang hinihingi na ng Wall Street ang tangible AI-economics disclosure, hindi narrative**. Pagsapit ng Q3 2026, ang SEC + analyst pressure ay magbubunga ng (a) di bababa sa isang foundation lab na lumipat sa public monthly revenue / WAU dashboard cadence, at (b) di bababa sa isang Big-3 cloud na ihihiwalay ang per-token AI-platform margin sa 10-Q footnotes. Mula metaphysical ay magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI"; mula product KPI ay magiging MD&A material ang "DAU/WAU".

nodes.short_label: By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surf…
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates.

description.en: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates.
description.ja: **H2 2026までにエージェント・スキルの攻撃面が独自のMITRE ATT&CKスタイルのサブマトリクスを取得し、少なくとも1つの主要スキル・マーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills/agent traces)が署名 + プロビナンス必須ゲートを出荷する。** ClawHavocのClawHub内1,184個の悪性スキル + OpenClawマーケットプレイス全体での**Cisco 36%プロンプトインジェクション率**は、もはや一過性ではない — 4/28のNovita SandboxはOpenClaw + Hermes + 自律エージェント・ランタイム専用に作られた最初の商用緩和プロダクト。Corpus2Skillが「ナビゲート可能なアーティファクトとしてのスキル」を主流化し、Externalization-in-LLM-Agentsサーベイ(arxiv 2604.08224)がskills/harness/protocolを2026支配的設計層と位置付けたことで、攻撃面は**サイドチャネルではなくファーストクラス・インフラ**になった。H2 2026までに(a)スキル汚染 + スキル経由の間接プロンプトインジェクション + クロススキル特権チェーンを網羅した公開エージェント・スキル脅威マトリクス(MITREスタイルまたはNIST主導)、および(b)公開前に署名 + プロビナンス証明済みスキルを義務化する主要マーケットプレイス、をAnthropicの17スキルレポ、ClawHub、Multicaマーケットプレイス、Hugging Faceエージェント・トレース面の中から最初の候補が出す。
description.es: **Para H2 2026 la superficie de ataque skills-de-agente aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE ATT&CK y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills/agent traces de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance.** Los 1.184 skills maliciosos de ClawHavoc en ClawHub + el **36% de prompt-injection rate de Cisco en el marketplace OpenClaw** ya no es un evento aislado — el Sandbox de Novita del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido de propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes + agentes autónomos. Con Corpus2Skill volviendo mainstream "skills como artefacto navegable" y la encuesta Externalization-in-LLM-Agents (arxiv 2604.08224) llamando skills/harness/protocol la capa de diseño dominante de 2026, la superficie de ataque ahora es **infraestructura de primera clase**, no un side-channel. Para H2 2026 vemos (a) una matriz de amenazas agent-skills publicada (estilo MITRE o liderada por NIST) cubriendo poisoning de skills + indirect-prompt-injection vía skill + cadenas de privilegios cross-skill, y (b) al menos un marketplace mayor obligando skills firmadas y atestadas con provenance antes de publicar — con el repo 17-skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, el marketplace de Multica y la superficie agent-trace de Hugging Face como primeros candidatos.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE ATT&CK-style sub-matrix ang attack surface ng agent skills, at magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (official skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ng enforced signing + provenance gate.** Hindi na one-off ang 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc sa ClawHub + ang **36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco sa OpenClaw skill marketplace** — ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na purposely-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. Sa pagiging mainstream ng "skills bilang navigable artifact" ng Corpus2Skill at sa pagturing ng Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) sa skills/harness/protocol bilang dominant 2026 design layer, **first-class infrastructure** na ang attack surface, hindi na side-channel. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, makikita natin (a) isang published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style o NIST-led) na sumasakop ng skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, at (b) di bababa sa isang major marketplace na nag-mandate ng signed-and-provenance-attested skills bago publish — kasama ang 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, marketplace ng Multica, at agent-trace surface ng Hugging Face bilang unang kandidato.

Reason: matrix layer shipped + allow/block primitive is the enforcement surface; the upcoming local-agent integrations extend the enforcement surface to coding agents. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no major skill marketplace has yet shipped enforced signing + provenance gate.

text_locales.ja: 本日の中国オープン・ウェイト・スタック繰り越し(DeepSeek V4 + Qwen 3.6 + Kimi K2.6 + GLM-5.1)+ Bonsai-8B + Foundry Local + Unsloth 2026.4.8 + Google Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite が $0.25 は `because`(コンシューマー GPU 対応オープン・ウェイト・スタックが成熟 + トークン単価マージン圧縮)を支持する。理由: オープン・ウェイト・スタックが拡大し続け + Google が $0.25/M でトークン単価マージン圧縮に参加。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: エンタープライズ開発ツールベンダーで「≥30% ローカル・ファースト・トグル・デフォルト」テレメトリを公開した者なし。
text_locales.es: Carry stack open-weight chino de hoy (DeepSeek V4 + Qwen 3.6 + Kimi K2.6 + GLM-5.1) + Bonsai-8B + Foundry Local + Unsloth 2026.4.8 + Google Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite a $0.25 apoya `because` (stack open-weight consumer-GPU-capable madura + compresión margen-por-token). Razón: stack open-weight continúa expandiéndose + Google se une a la compresión margen-por-token a $0.25/M. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ningún vendor enterprise dev-tool ha publicado telemetría "≥30% local-first toggle by default".
text_locales.fil: Today's Chinese open-weight stack carry (DeepSeek V4 + Qwen 3.6 + Kimi K2.6 + GLM-5.1) + Bonsai-8B + Foundry Local + Unsloth 2026.4.8 + Google Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite sa $0.25 ay nag-su-suporta sa `because` (consumer-GPU-capable open-weight stack matures + per-token-margin compression). Reason: open-weight stack patuloy na lumalapad + Google sumali sa per-token-margin compression sa $0.25/M. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: walang enterprise dev-tool vendor na nag-publish ng "≥30% local-first toggle by default" telemetry.

bridges.text: Today's ATT&CK v19 named techniques carry + CSAI MITRE-CNA + Microsoft Agent 365 tools-management allow/block + arxiv BenchGuard supports `so_that` (sub-matrix lands). Reason: the matrix layer has shipped; the allow/block primitive is the enforcement surface. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no major skill marketplace has yet shipped enforced signing + provenance gate.

text_locales.en: Today's ATT&CK v19 named techniques carry + CSAI MITRE-CNA + Microsoft Agent 365 tools-management allow/block + arxiv BenchGuard supports `so_that` (sub-matrix lands). Reason: the matrix layer has shipped; the allow/block primitive is the enforcement surface. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no major skill marketplace has yet shipped enforced signing + provenance gate.
text_locales.ja: 本日のCSAI MITRE-CNA継続 + ATT&CK v19 named techniques + SGLang/LiteLLM/Spring AI継続 + UTT/IBM Langflow 5/1波 + Microsoft Agent 365 allow/blockが `because`(CNA発行サブコーパス形成)を支持。Reason: 発行者権限 + named-technique語彙 + クロスCVEクラスタが予測のトポロジに収斂。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ≥50エージェント特異CVEsはまだ集計されていない;マーケットプレイスから署名+来歴ゲートの強制施行が未だ。
text_locales.es: Continuación CSAI MITRE-CNA + técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 + continuación SGLang/LiteLLM/Spring AI + ola UTT/IBM Langflow del 1/5 + Microsoft Agent 365 allow/block de hoy apoyan `because` (formación de sub-corpus emitido por CNA). Reason: la autoridad emisora + vocabulario named-technique + clúster cross-CVE están convergiendo en la topología predicha. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ≥50 CVEs específicos de agentes aún no contados; ningún mercado ha enviado puerta firmada-+-procedencia obligatoria.
text_locales.fil: Ang CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + ATT&CK v19 named techniques + SGLang/LiteLLM/Spring AI carry + UTT/IBM Langflow May 1 wave + Microsoft Agent 365 allow/block ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `because` (CNA-issued sub-corpus formation). Reason: ang issuer authority + named-technique vocabulary + cross-CVE cluster ay nagsasama-sama sa predicted topology. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ≥50 agent-specific CVEs hindi pa nabilang; walang marketplace na nag-ship ng mandatory signed-+-provenance gate.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates.
detail.prediction_summary: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **H2 2026までにエージェント・スキルの攻撃面が独自のMITRE ATT&CKスタイルのサブマトリクスを取得し、少なくとも1つの主要スキル・マーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills/agent traces)が署名 + プロビナンス必須ゲートを出荷する。** ClawHavocのClawHub内1,184個の悪性スキル + OpenClawマーケットプレイス全体での**Cisco 36%プロンプトインジェクション率**は、もはや一過性ではない — 4/28のNovita SandboxはOpenClaw + Hermes + 自律エージェント・ランタイム専用に作られた最初の商用緩和プロダクト。Corpus2Skillが「ナビゲート可能なアーティファクトとしてのスキル」を主流化し、Externalization-in-LLM-Agentsサーベイ(arxiv 2604.08224)がskills/harness/protocolを2026支配的設計層と位置付けたことで、攻撃面は**サイドチャネルではなくファーストクラス・インフラ**になった。H2 2026までに(a)スキル汚染 + スキル経由の間接プロンプトインジェクション + クロススキル特権チェーンを網羅した公開エージェント・スキル脅威マトリクス(MITREスタイルまたはNIST主導)、および(b)公開前に署名 + プロビナンス証明済みスキルを義務化する主要マーケットプレイス、をAnthropicの17スキルレポ、ClawHub、Multicaマーケットプレイス、Hugging Faceエージェント・トレース面の中から最初の候補が出す。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para H2 2026 la superficie de ataque skills-de-agente aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE ATT&CK y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills/agent traces de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance.** Los 1.184 skills maliciosos de ClawHavoc en ClawHub + el **36% de prompt-injection rate de Cisco en el marketplace OpenClaw** ya no es un evento aislado — el Sandbox de Novita del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido de propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes + agentes autónomos. Con Corpus2Skill volviendo mainstream "skills como artefacto navegable" y la encuesta Externalization-in-LLM-Agents (arxiv 2604.08224) llamando skills/harness/protocol la capa de diseño dominante de 2026, la superficie de ataque ahora es **infraestructura de primera clase**, no un side-channel. Para H2 2026 vemos (a) una matriz de amenazas agent-skills publicada (estilo MITRE o liderada por NIST) cubriendo poisoning de skills + indirect-prompt-injection vía skill + cadenas de privilegios cross-skill, y (b) al menos un marketplace mayor obligando skills firmadas y atestadas con provenance antes de publicar — con el repo 17-skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, el marketplace de Multica y la superficie agent-trace de Hugging Face como primeros candidatos.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE ATT&CK-style sub-matrix ang attack surface ng agent skills, at magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (official skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ng enforced signing + provenance gate.** Hindi na one-off ang 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc sa ClawHub + ang **36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco sa OpenClaw skill marketplace** — ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na purposely-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. Sa pagiging mainstream ng "skills bilang navigable artifact" ng Corpus2Skill at sa pagturing ng Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) sa skills/harness/protocol bilang dominant 2026 design layer, **first-class infrastructure** na ang attack surface, hindi na side-channel. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, makikita natin (a) isang published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style o NIST-led) na sumasakop ng skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, at (b) di bababa sa isang major marketplace na nag-mandate ng signed-and-provenance-attested skills bago publish — kasama ang 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, marketplace ng Multica, at agent-trace surface ng Hugging Face bilang unang kandidato.

nodes.short_label: By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills thr…
nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.

description.en: **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.
description.ja: **2026年 Q3 までに、エージェントスキル脅威サブマトリックスが MITRE ATT&CK 拡張または NIST AI-RMF 付録として最初の正式公開を迎え、少なくとも 1つの主要スキルマーケットプレイス (Anthropic 公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face スキル) が公開前に署名 + プロベナンス検証ゲートを強制する。** 4/28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 フレームワークは AI エージェントコンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェントデプロイを既にテクニックとして命名済み; 4/28 Novita Sandbox は OpenClaw + Hermes ランタイム専用に構築された初の商用緩和製品; 4/28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite、SuiteConnect SF) は署名配布をセキュリティフレームとしてスキルを製品化した初の主要非ファウンデーションラボベンダー; 4/28 arxiv 2604.24026 (スキルの SSL 表現) + 4/24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint が学術的足場を提供。強制関数は Cisco RSAC 2026 36% プロンプトインジェクション率の発見 + ClawHavoc 1,184件の悪意あるスキル + 4/23-29 Google +32% IPI 増加; 合わせると、これは 2017年の MITRE ATT&CK Mobile と 2021年の MITRE ATLAS を生み出したのと同じガバナンスギャップの軌跡。これらの最初の義務化はファウンデーションラボからではなく、CISA / NIST から、あるいはエンタープライズ顧客圧力下のマーケットプレイス事業者から直接出る可能性が高い。
description.es: **(Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** ATT&CK v19 del 28-abr + el marco v5.4 ya nombran envenenamiento de contexto de agentes IA, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP y despliegue de agentes maliciosos como técnicas; Novita Sandbox del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido a propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes; SuiteCloud Agent Skills del 28-abr (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) es el primer gran proveedor no-foundation-lab que distribuye habilidades como producto con distribución firmada como marco de seguridad; arxiv 2604.24026 (representación SSL para habilidades) del 28-abr + arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint del 24-abr aportan el andamiaje académico. La función forzada es el hallazgo de Cisco RSAC 2026 del 36% de inyección de prompts + las 1.184 habilidades maliciosas de ClawHavoc + el repunte +32% IPI de Google del 23-29 abr; combinado, es el mismo arco de brecha de gobernanza que produjo MITRE ATT&CK Mobile en 2017 y MITRE ATLAS en 2021. La primera de estas obligaciones probablemente venga de CISA / NIST o directamente de los operadores del marketplace bajo presión de clientes empresariales, no de un foundation lab.
description.fil: **Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Pinangalanan na ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework ang AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, at malicious agent deployment bilang techniques; ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na ginawa para sa OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; ang Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) ang unang major non-foundation-lab vendor na nag-ship ng skills-as-a-product na may signed-distribution bilang security frame; ang Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ang nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagbunga ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandates na ito ay malamang manggagaling sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa marketplace operators sa ilalim ng enterprise-customer pressure, hindi mula sa foundation lab.

Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagbunga ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandates na ito ay malamang manggagaling sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa marketplace operators sa ilalim ng enterprise-customer pressure, hindi mula sa foundation lab.

text_locales.en: Today's ATT&CK v19 named-techniques carry + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + Microsoft Agent 365 + arxiv eval wave (SAGE, LiveClawBench, GAIA-v2-LILT) supports `landing` (matrix part shipped + eval substrate broadening). Reason: ATT&CK v19 is operationally the named-technique appendix + the eval-bench wave is the academic substrate the prediction names. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF appendix not yet published; signing + provenance gate not yet shipped at any major marketplace.
text_locales.ja: 本日の Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync GA プレビュー(5月1日)+ Defender エージェント単位関係マップ + Anthropic Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI を今後のローカル・エージェント統合として名指しは `landing`(Big-3 ハイパースケーラーが MCP サーバー・ポリシー強制をデフォルト出荷)を支持する。理由: Registry Sync が5月1日 GA の単一ベンダー allow/block 基本機能をクロスクラウド(AWS + Google)レジストリ同期へ拡張 — クロスクラウド本番プレビューが Q4 2026 テーゼが投影していた構造的前例シフトでプレビュー形式で5か月以上前倒し。Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: クロスベンダー・パリティ(AWS / GCP 自前のプリミティブ、Microsoft への registry-sync ではない)はまだ出荷されていない; OWASP MCP Top 10 は公開されていない。
text_locales.es: Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync GA preview (May 1) + Defender per-agent relationship-map + Anthropic Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI nombrados como próximas integraciones agente-local apoya `landing` (Big-3 hyperscalers ship MCP-server policy enforcement as default). Razón: Registry Sync extiende el primitivo single-vendor allow/block del GA May 1 a cross-cloud (AWS + Google) registry-sync — el preview cross-cloud producción es el shift estructural-precedent que la tesis Q4 2026 proyectaba, aterrizando 5+ meses temprano en forma preview. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: paridad cross-vendor (AWS / GCP own primitives, no registry-sync into Microsoft) aún no entregada; OWASP MCP Top 10 no publicado.
text_locales.fil: Today's Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync GA preview (May 1) + Defender per-agent relationship-map + Anthropic Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI named bilang upcoming local-agent integrations ay nag-su-suporta sa `landing` (Big-3 hyperscalers ship MCP-server policy enforcement as default). Reason: ang Registry Sync ay nag-e-extend sa May 1 GA single-vendor allow/block primitive sa cross-cloud (AWS + Google) registry-sync — ang cross-cloud production preview ay ang structural-precedent shift na ipinapalagay ng Q4 2026 thesis, lumapag 5+ months early sa preview form. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: cross-vendor parity (AWS / GCP own primitives, hindi registry-sync into Microsoft) hindi pa ship; OWASP MCP Top 10 hindi published.

bridges.text: Today's ATT&CK v19 named-techniques + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + Microsoft Agent 365 + Agent Harness Survey preprint supports `landing` (the matrix part shipped). Reason: ATT&CK v19 is operationally the named-technique appendix the prediction calls for. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF appendix not yet published; signing + provenance gate not yet shipped at any major marketplace.

text_locales.ja: 本日のペンタゴン7社分裂 + Anthropic Opus 4.7のClaude/API/Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry展開 + OpenAI on Bedrockプレビューが予測の `landing` コンポーネント(マルチフロンティアベンダーがマルチランタイムを置換)を支持。Reason: 可視化された展開トポロジは資金源形状で、Anthropicが独占的に4経路全てに展開。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: 資金源と提供トポロジを結ぶ10-Qレベルの開示は未だ。
text_locales.es: La división Pentágono 7-vendedores + Anthropic Opus 4.7 en Claude/API/Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry + preview OpenAI on Bedrock de hoy apoyan el componente `landing` de la predicción (multi-frontier-vendor reemplaza multi-runtime). Reason: la topología de despliegue visible está ahora moldeada por origen de financiación, con Anthropic únicamente en las cuatro rutas de hosting. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ninguna divulgación a nivel 10-Q vinculando origen de financiación con topología de servicio todavía.
text_locales.fil: Ang Pentagon 7-vendor split + Anthropic Opus 4.7 sa Claude/API/Bedrock/Vertex/Foundry + OpenAI on Bedrock preview ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `landing` component ng prediction (multi-frontier-vendor pumalit sa multi-runtime). Reason: ang visible deployment topology ay funding-origin-shaped na, at Anthropic ay nasa lahat ng apat na hosting paths. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: walang 10-Q-level disclosure na nagdudugtong sa funding origin sa serving topology.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.

The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年 Q3 までに、エージェントスキル脅威サブマトリックスが MITRE ATT&CK 拡張または NIST AI-RMF 付録として最初の正式公開を迎え、少なくとも 1つの主要スキルマーケットプレイス (Anthropic 公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face スキル) が公開前に署名 + プロベナンス検証ゲートを強制する。** 4/28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 フレームワークは AI エージェントコンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェントデプロイを既にテクニックとして命名済み; 4/28 Novita Sandbox は OpenClaw + Hermes ランタイム専用に構築された初の商用緩和製品; 4/28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite、SuiteConnect SF) は署名配布をセキュリティフレームとしてスキルを製品化した初の主要非ファウンデーションラボベンダー; 4/28 arxiv 2604.24026 (スキルの SSL 表現) + 4/24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint が学術的足場を提供。強制関数は Cisco RSAC 2026 36% プロンプトインジェクション率の発見 + ClawHavoc 1,184件の悪意あるスキル + 4/23-29 Google +32% IPI 増加; 合わせると、これは 2017年の MITRE ATT&CK Mobile と 2021年の MITRE ATLAS を生み出したのと同じガバナンスギャップの軌跡。これらの最初の義務化はファウンデーションラボからではなく、CISA / NIST から、あるいはエンタープライズ顧客圧力下のマーケットプレイス事業者から直接出る可能性が高い。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **(Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** ATT&CK v19 del 28-abr + el marco v5.4 ya nombran envenenamiento de contexto de agentes IA, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP y despliegue de agentes maliciosos como técnicas; Novita Sandbox del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido a propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes; SuiteCloud Agent Skills del 28-abr (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) es el primer gran proveedor no-foundation-lab que distribuye habilidades como producto con distribución firmada como marco de seguridad; arxiv 2604.24026 (representación SSL para habilidades) del 28-abr + arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint del 24-abr aportan el andamiaje académico. La función forzada es el hallazgo de Cisco RSAC 2026 del 36% de inyección de prompts + las 1.184 habilidades maliciosas de ClawHavoc + el repunte +32% IPI de Google del 23-29 abr; combinado, es el mismo arco de brecha de gobernanza que produjo MITRE ATT&CK Mobile en 2017 y MITRE ATLAS en 2021. La primera de estas obligaciones probablemente venga de CISA / NIST o directamente de los operadores del marketplace bajo presión de clientes empresariales, no de un foundation lab.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Pinangalanan na ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework ang AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, at malicious agent deployment bilang techniques; ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na ginawa para sa OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; ang Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) ang unang major non-foundation-lab vendor na nag-ship ng skills-as-a-product na may signed-distribution bilang security frame; ang Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ang nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagbunga ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandates na ito ay malamang manggagaling sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa marketplace operators sa ilalim ng enterprise-customer pressure, hindi mula sa foundation lab.

nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.

description.en: **By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.
description.ja: **2026 Q3 までに、エージェント型 AI の CVE クラスが CSAI 発行の MITRE 認可 CNA を通じて固有のサブコーパスとして確立し、エージェント / スキル / ハーネス / サンドボックス特有の CVE が 50 件以上発行される。同時に主要スキルマーケットプレース(Anthropic skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills)のうち少なくとも 1 社が「公開前の署名 + 出所証明ゲート」を必須化する。** 4/29 の CSAI MITRE CNA 認可が制度的火種、4/28 ATT&CK v19 が手法を命名(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバ侵害、悪意あるエージェント配備)、4/30 OpenAI Agents SDK が 7 つのサンドボックスプロバイダ(Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel)上でネイティブ・サンドボックス実行をデフォルト化、4/28 Novita Sandbox + 4/28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + 4/30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents がベンダ側を補完、4/26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208(SQLi 1 行で OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock キーが漏洩)+ 4/28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + 持ち越しの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 がモデルツール層インジェクションの被害規模を実証している。駆動力はエンタープライズのリスク移転 — AI エージェント明示の CNA が存在する以上、開示サイクルは出版者依存から発行者主導に圧縮され、スキルマーケットプレースは無署名のままではエンタープライズ顧客を失う。CSAI の最初の活動四半期(2026 Q3)が閾値超えのもっとも自然な着地時期。
description.es: **Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** La autorización CNA de CSAI por MITRE el 29/abr es la chispa institucional; el 28/abr ATT&CK v19 nombra las técnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el 30/abr el Agents SDK de OpenAI hace de la ejecución en sandbox una primitiva por defecto sobre 7 proveedores (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28/abr + Bedrock Managed Agents del 28/abr + hosted agents de Microsoft Foundry del 30/abr forman la contraparte del lado proveedor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26/abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28/abr + SGLang CVE-2026-5760 en arrastre demuestran el radio de explosión de la inyección a nivel de tooling del modelo. La fuerza motriz es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial — una vez existe una CNA con mandato explícito de IA agéntica, el ritmo de divulgación se comprime de "publicador aleatorio" a "emisor coordinado" y los marketplaces de skills no podrán seguir sin firma por defecto sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre operativo de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje más probable.
description.fil: **Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, ang disclosure cadence ay mauurong mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakapagdesign ang skill marketplaces na mananatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first operating quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para tumawid ang threshold.

summary.en: **By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.
summary.ja: **2026 Q3 までに、エージェント型 AI の CVE クラスが CSAI 発行の MITRE 認可 CNA を通じて固有のサブコーパスとして確立し、エージェント / スキル / ハーネス / サンドボックス特有の CVE が 50 件以上発行される。同時に主要スキルマーケットプレース(Anthropic skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills)のうち少なくとも 1 社が「公開前の署名 + 出所証明ゲート」を必須化する。** 4/29 の CSAI MITRE CNA 認可が制度的火種、4/28 ATT&CK v19 が手法を命名(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバ侵害、悪意あるエージェント配備)、4/30 OpenAI Agents SDK が 7 つのサンドボックスプロバイダ(Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel)上でネイティブ・サンドボックス実行をデフォルト化、4/28 Novita Sandbox + 4/28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + 4/30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents がベンダ側を補完、4/26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208(SQLi 1 行で OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock キーが漏洩)+ 4/28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + 持ち越しの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 がモデルツール層インジェクションの被害規模を実証している。駆動力はエンタープライズのリスク移転 — AI エージェント明示の CNA が存在する以上、開示サイクルは出版者依存から発行者主導に圧縮され、スキルマーケットプレースは無署名のままではエンタープライズ顧客を失う。CSAI の最初の活動四半期(2026 Q3)が閾値超えのもっとも自然な着地時期。
summary.es: **Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** La autorización CNA de CSAI por MITRE el 29/abr es la chispa institucional; el 28/abr ATT&CK v19 nombra las técnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el 30/abr el Agents SDK de OpenAI hace de la ejecución en sandbox una primitiva por defecto sobre 7 proveedores (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28/abr + Bedrock Managed Agents del 28/abr + hosted agents de Microsoft Foundry del 30/abr forman la contraparte del lado proveedor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26/abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28/abr + SGLang CVE-2026-5760 en arrastre demuestran el radio de explosión de la inyección a nivel de tooling del modelo. La fuerza motriz es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial — una vez existe una CNA con mandato explícito de IA agéntica, el ritmo de divulgación se comprime de "publicador aleatorio" a "emisor coordinado" y los marketplaces de skills no podrán seguir sin firma por defecto sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre operativo de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje más probable.
summary.fil: **Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, ang disclosure cadence ay mauurong mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakapagdesign ang skill marketplaces na mananatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first operating quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para tumawid ang threshold.

nodes.title: LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain becomes dominant attack pattern by H2 2026
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way.

description.en: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way.
description.ja: **2026年下半期までに、5月1日 Copy Fail(CVE-2026-31431)BOD-22-01 14日期限 + 4月30日 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26時間悪用ウィンドウ + 5月2日時点で未パッチの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 という3点セットが「LLMツーリング層 CVE のサプライチェーン武器化」を支配的な攻撃者パターンに押し上げる。少なくとも1つの主要 IR 企業が、LLMゲートウェイ・エージェントハーネス・推論ランタイムの CVE と Linux カーネル LPE(Copy Fail またはその後継)を組み合わせてマルチテナント推論基盤に対する完全チェーン root を実現した実際の侵害について公開ポストモーテムを発表する。少なくとも1件の CSAI-CNA 発行アドバイザリが LLMツーリング+カーネルチェーンを ATT&CK v19 の Defense Impairment 内の名前付き手法として明示する。** 4月28日の ATT&CK v19 が既にエージェント手法(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェント展開)を命名済み。5月1日の Copy Fail は攻撃者にユニバーサル Linux LPE を提供し、Microsoft Security Blog がクラウドサービスプロバイダーへの実環境利用を確認済み。LiteLLM の SQLi 1行漏えいが OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock キーを流出させる先例が横展開ベクトルを与える。CSAI の4月29日 CNA 認定が開示発行側で、IR 企業の第3四半期インシデントレポートでこの組み合わせが1件のクラウド・マルチテナント侵害として登場するのが最小抵抗線。
description.es: **Para el H2 2026 el trío plazo BOD-22-01 de 14 días del Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) del 1 de mayo + ventana de explotación de 26 horas del LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 30 de abril + el sin parchar al 1 de mayo SGLang CVE-2026-5760 hace de la "armamentización de cadena de suministro de CVEs en la capa de tooling LLM" el patrón de atacante dominante — al menos una firma de IR importante publica un post-mortem público de una intrusión real que empareja un CVE de gateway-LLM/agent-harness/inference-runtime con un LPE de kernel Linux (Copy Fail o su sucesor) para una cadena completa root-en-inferencia-multi-tenant, y al menos una advisory emitida por CSAI-CNA carve-out explícitamente la cadena LLM-tooling + kernel como técnica nombrada dentro del Defense Impairment de ATT&CK v19.** ATT&CK v19 del 28 de abril ya nombra las técnicas agénticas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); la ola Copy Fail del 1 de mayo da a los atacantes un LPE Linux universal con uso confirmado in-the-wild contra proveedores cloud (según divulgación del Microsoft Security Blog); el precedente de SQLi-fila-fuga-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys de LiteLLM les da el vector de movimiento lateral. La autorización CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI es el lado de emisión de divulgaciones; la ruta de menor resistencia para un informe de incidente del Q3 de una firma IR es una intrusión cloud multi-tenant ensamblada exactamente así.
description.fil: **Sa H2 2026, ang trio ng May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + April 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + ang unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay magpapadominante sa "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" bilang attacker pattern — kahit isang major IR firm ay maglalabas ng public post-mortem ng totoong intrusion na pinagsasama ang LLM-gateway/agent-harness/inference-runtime CVE sa Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail o ang successor nito) para sa full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, at kahit isang CSAI-CNA-issued advisory ay explicitly mag-carve-out ng LLM-tooling + kernel chain bilang named technique sa loob ng Defense Impairment ng ATT&CK v19.** Pinangalanan na ng April 28 ATT&CK v19 ang agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); binibigyan ng May 1 Copy Fail wave ang attackers ng universal-Linux LPE na may confirmed in-the-wild use laban sa cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); ang LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent ang nagbibigay sa kanila ng lateral-movement vector. Ang April 29 CSAI CNA authorization ang disclosure-issuance side; pinakamadaling daan para sa Q3 incident report ng IR firm ay isang cloud-multi-tenant intrusion na pinagsama-sama nang ganito.

eli14.en: Hackers can chain an AI-tooling bug with a Linux-kernel bug to take over shared AI servers.
eli14.ja: 攻撃者がAIツールのバグとLinuxカーネルのバグを組み合わせて共有AIサーバを乗っ取れる。
eli14.es: Hackers pueden encadenar bug de tooling AI con bug del kernel Linux para tomar servidores AI compartidos.
eli14.fil: Pwedeng pagsamahin ng hackers ang AI-tooling bug + Linux-kernel bug para makuha ang shared AI servers.

title_locales.en: LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain becomes dominant attack pattern by H2 2026
title_locales.ja: H2 2026までにLLMツーリング+Linuxカーネル CVEチェーンが支配的な攻撃パターンに
title_locales.es: La cadena LLM-tooling + kernel Linux se vuelve patrón de ataque dominante en H2 2026
title_locales.fil: Sa H2 2026, ang LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain ay magiging dominanteng pattern ng pag-atake

detail.summary_short: The May 1 Copy Fail Linux LPE plus LiteLLM's 26-hour SQLi precedent plus the unpatched SGLang RCE makes supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling CVEs the dominant attacker pattern. By H2 2026 ≥1 IR firm ships a public post-mortem and CSAI publishes a named-technique advisory.

summary_short_locales.en: The May 1 Copy Fail Linux LPE plus LiteLLM's 26-hour SQLi precedent plus the unpatched SGLang RCE makes supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling CVEs the dominant attacker pattern. By H2 2026 ≥1 IR firm ships a public post-mortem and CSAI publishes a named-technique advisory.
summary_short_locales.ja: 5/1 Copy FailのユニバーサルLinux LPEと、LiteLLMの26時間SQLi先例と、未パッチSGLang RCEで「LLMツーリングCVEのサプライチェーン武器化」が支配的な攻撃パターンに。H2 2026までに≥1 IR企業が公開ポストモーテムを発表し、CSAIがnamed-techniqueアドバイザリを公表。
summary_short_locales.es: El LPE Linux universal de Copy Fail del 1 may + el precedente SQLi 26h de LiteLLM + el RCE sin parche de SGLang convierte la "armamentización de cadena de suministro de CVEs LLM-tooling" en patrón dominante. Para H2 2026, ≥1 firma IR envía post-mortem público y CSAI publica advisory técnica nombrada.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang universal-Linux LPE ng Copy Fail noong May 1 + ang 26-hour SQLi precedent ng LiteLLM + ang unpatched SGLang RCE ay nagiging dominanteng "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling CVEs" na pattern. Sa H2 2026, ≥1 IR firm ay maglalabas ng public post-mortem at ang CSAI ay magpu-publish ng named-technique advisory.

bridges.text: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 unpatched into May 3 (~14 days) + CERT/CC ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment workaround + Linux Copy Fail KEV May 15 federal deadline + LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 carry + Spring AI carry + cross-server class supports `because` (LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain forming). Reason: the SGLang+Copy-Fail-class cohort is now operating on the projected timeline + CERT/CC mitigation guidance institutionalizes the workaround. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: no IR firm has yet published a public post-mortem of the LLM-tooling + kernel chain in production.

text_locales.en: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 unpatched into May 3 (~14 days) + CERT/CC ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment workaround + Linux Copy Fail KEV May 15 federal deadline + LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 carry + Spring AI carry + cross-server class supports `because` (LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain forming). Reason: the SGLang+Copy-Fail-class cohort is now operating on the projected timeline + CERT/CC mitigation guidance institutionalizes the workaround. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: no IR firm has yet published a public post-mortem of the LLM-tooling + kernel chain in production.
text_locales.ja: 本日の SGLang CVE-2026-5760 未パッチ + クロスサーバー・クラス拡散 + CSAI MITRE-CNA 繰り越し + CISA KEV 5月1日(Linux カーネル、AI-infra 固有ではない)は `because`(OWASP クラスが形成中)を支持する。理由: 名前付き手法 + 未パッチ CVE + クロスサーバー前例がロックされている。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 はまだ公開されていない; CISA AI-Infra KEV サブカタログはまだ出荷されていない。
text_locales.es: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 sin parche + difusión clase cross-server + carry CSAI MITRE-CNA + CISA KEV May 1 (Linux kernel, no AI-infra-específico) apoya `because` (clase OWASP formándose). Razón: precedente named-technique + unpatched-CVE + cross-server bloqueado. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 aún no publicado; sub-catálogo CISA AI-Infra KEV aún no entregado.
text_locales.fil: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 unpatched + cross-server class spread + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + CISA KEV May 1 (Linux kernel, hindi AI-infra-specific) ay nag-su-suporta sa `because` (ang OWASP class ay nabubuo). Reason: named-technique + unpatched-CVE + cross-server precedent ay locked in. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ay hindi pa published; CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog hindi pa ship.
