detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way.
detail.prediction_summary: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年下半期までに、5月1日 Copy Fail(CVE-2026-31431)BOD-22-01 14日期限 + 4月30日 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26時間悪用ウィンドウ + 5月2日時点で未パッチの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 という3点セットが「LLMツーリング層 CVE のサプライチェーン武器化」を支配的な攻撃者パターンに押し上げる。少なくとも1つの主要 IR 企業が、LLMゲートウェイ・エージェントハーネス・推論ランタイムの CVE と Linux カーネル LPE(Copy Fail またはその後継)を組み合わせてマルチテナント推論基盤に対する完全チェーン root を実現した実際の侵害について公開ポストモーテムを発表する。少なくとも1件の CSAI-CNA 発行アドバイザリが LLMツーリング+カーネルチェーンを ATT&CK v19 の Defense Impairment 内の名前付き手法として明示する。** 4月28日の ATT&CK v19 が既にエージェント手法(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェント展開)を命名済み。5月1日の Copy Fail は攻撃者にユニバーサル Linux LPE を提供し、Microsoft Security Blog がクラウドサービスプロバイダーへの実環境利用を確認済み。LiteLLM の SQLi 1行漏えいが OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock キーを流出させる先例が横展開ベクトルを与える。CSAI の4月29日 CNA 認定が開示発行側で、IR 企業の第3四半期インシデントレポートでこの組み合わせが1件のクラウド・マルチテナント侵害として登場するのが最小抵抗線。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el H2 2026 el trío plazo BOD-22-01 de 14 días del Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) del 1 de mayo + ventana de explotación de 26 horas del LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 30 de abril + el sin parchar al 1 de mayo SGLang CVE-2026-5760 hace de la "armamentización de cadena de suministro de CVEs en la capa de tooling LLM" el patrón de atacante dominante — al menos una firma de IR importante publica un post-mortem público de una intrusión real que empareja un CVE de gateway-LLM/agent-harness/inference-runtime con un LPE de kernel Linux (Copy Fail o su sucesor) para una cadena completa root-en-inferencia-multi-tenant, y al menos una advisory emitida por CSAI-CNA carve-out explícitamente la cadena LLM-tooling + kernel como técnica nombrada dentro del Defense Impairment de ATT&CK v19.** ATT&CK v19 del 28 de abril ya nombra las técnicas agénticas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); la ola Copy Fail del 1 de mayo da a los atacantes un LPE Linux universal con uso confirmado in-the-wild contra proveedores cloud (según divulgación del Microsoft Security Blog); el precedente de SQLi-fila-fuga-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys de LiteLLM les da el vector de movimiento lateral. La autorización CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI es el lado de emisión de divulgaciones; la ruta de menor resistencia para un informe de incidente del Q3 de una firma IR es una intrusión cloud multi-tenant ensamblada exactamente así.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Sa H2 2026, ang trio ng May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + April 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + ang unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay magpapadominante sa "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" bilang attacker pattern — kahit isang major IR firm ay maglalabas ng public post-mortem ng totoong intrusion na pinagsasama ang LLM-gateway/agent-harness/inference-runtime CVE sa Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail o ang successor nito) para sa full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, at kahit isang CSAI-CNA-issued advisory ay explicitly mag-carve-out ng LLM-tooling + kernel chain bilang named technique sa loob ng Defense Impairment ng ATT&CK v19.** Pinangalanan na ng April 28 ATT&CK v19 ang agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); binibigyan ng May 1 Copy Fail wave ang attackers ng universal-Linux LPE na may confirmed in-the-wild use laban sa cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); ang LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent ang nagbibigay sa kanila ng lateral-movement vector. Ang April 29 CSAI CNA authorization ang disclosure-issuance side; pinakamadaling daan para sa Q3 incident report ng IR firm ay isang cloud-multi-tenant intrusion na pinagsama-sama nang ganito.

nodes.title: Cerebras IPO mid-May prices above $22-25B with first-day pop ≥30%
nodes.description: **The May 1 record S&P 7,230.12 + Nasdaq 25,114.44 + April best-month-since-2020 + AAPL +3.28% to $280.25 + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape sets up the mid-May Cerebras IPO to price at or above the top of the $22-25B targeted range with a multi-day pop — the Apr 30 Apple +$100B buyback authorization + the Q3 guide (+14-17%) is the buyside ratification of the AI-capex-on-faith thesis, and the Cerebras roadshow lands into the cleanest single tape since 2020; pricing closer to the pre-IPO secondary $26-28B than the public S-1 $22-25B; first-day pop ≥30% with the underwriter syndicate (Morgan Stanley / Citi / Barclays / UBS) pulling allocation aggressively from the long-only side; the IPO becomes the cohort signal that the AI-infrastructure-build is fundable through public markets and not just private capex.** $510M 2025 revenue + $20B+/750MW OpenAI deal through 2028 + the 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is priced in already; the swing factor is the May 1 record-tape ratification of the AI-capex thesis, which the buyside has been waiting for since the Apr 28 OpenAI-revenue-miss WSJ. The mid-May window also avoids competing with the May 8 Apr Jobs print + the May 5 AMD print; pricing should land in the pre-Cerebras quiet-period sweet spot.

description.en: **The May 1 record S&P 7,230.12 + Nasdaq 25,114.44 + April best-month-since-2020 + AAPL +3.28% to $280.25 + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape sets up the mid-May Cerebras IPO to price at or above the top of the $22-25B targeted range with a multi-day pop — the Apr 30 Apple +$100B buyback authorization + the Q3 guide (+14-17%) is the buyside ratification of the AI-capex-on-faith thesis, and the Cerebras roadshow lands into the cleanest single tape since 2020; pricing closer to the pre-IPO secondary $26-28B than the public S-1 $22-25B; first-day pop ≥30% with the underwriter syndicate (Morgan Stanley / Citi / Barclays / UBS) pulling allocation aggressively from the long-only side; the IPO becomes the cohort signal that the AI-infrastructure-build is fundable through public markets and not just private capex.** $510M 2025 revenue + $20B+/750MW OpenAI deal through 2028 + the 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is priced in already; the swing factor is the May 1 record-tape ratification of the AI-capex thesis, which the buyside has been waiting for since the Apr 28 OpenAI-revenue-miss WSJ. The mid-May window also avoids competing with the May 8 Apr Jobs print + the May 5 AMD print; pricing should land in the pre-Cerebras quiet-period sweet spot.
description.ja: **5月1日の S&P 7,230.12 + ナスダック 25,114.44 新高値 + 4月の2020年以来最高の月 + AAPL +3.28% で $280.25 + 7,000億ドル規模の2026年ビッグテック AI 設備投資の流れが、5月中旬の Cerebras IPO を$22-25Bターゲット価格帯の上限以上で値付けし、複数日にわたる初値高につなげる。4月30日の Apple +$1,000億自社株買い枠 + Q3ガイダンス(+14-17%)が「AI設備投資の信仰買い」テーゼを買い手側で追認。Cerebras のロードショーは2020年以来最も澄んだ単月相場に着地し、上場直後の S-1 公表 $22-25B より pre-IPO 二次取引の $26-28B 寄りで値付け。初日上昇率は30%以上、引受団(Morgan Stanley / Citi / Barclays / UBS)はロングオンリー側から積極的にアロケーションを引っ張る。本IPOがAIインフラ建設は私募設備投資だけでなく公開市場でも資金調達可能であるという業界全体への信号となる。** 2025年売上 $510M + 2028年までの OpenAI $20B+/750MW 契約 + G42 24%/MBZUAI 62% の売上集中は織り込み済み。スイング要因は5月1日の AI 設備投資テーゼの相場追認で、買い手側は4月28日 OpenAI 売上未達 WSJ 報道以降ずっと待っていた。中旬ウィンドウは5月8日の4月雇用統計 + 5月5日 AMD 決算との競合を回避。Cerebras 静粛期間直前のスイートスポットでの値付けが見込まれる。
description.es: **El récord del 1 de mayo del S&P 7.230,12 + Nasdaq 25.114,44 + abril mejor-mes-desde-2020 + AAPL +3,28% a $280,25 + tape de capex AI de Big Tech 2026 de $700B prepara a la IPO de mediados de mayo de Cerebras para precios al o por encima del tope del rango objetivo de $22-25B con un pop multi-día — la autorización de recompra de Apple +$100B del 30 de abril + la guía Q3 (+14-17%) es la ratificación del lado comprador de la tesis de capex-AI-por-fe, y el roadshow de Cerebras aterriza en el tape mensual más limpio desde 2020; precios más cerca del secundario pre-IPO de $26-28B que del S-1 público de $22-25B; pop del primer día ≥30% con el sindicato de aseguradores (Morgan Stanley / Citi / Barclays / UBS) tirando agresivamente de la asignación del lado long-only; la IPO se convierte en la señal de cohorte de que la construcción de infraestructura AI es financiable a través de mercados públicos y no solo capex privado.** $510M ingresos 2025 + acuerdo OpenAI $20B+/750MW hasta 2028 + concentración de ingresos del 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI ya está descontado; el factor swing es la ratificación del récord del 1 de mayo del tape de la tesis de capex-AI, que el lado comprador llevaba esperando desde el WSJ del 28 de abril sobre OpenAI-revenue-miss. La ventana de mediados de mayo también evita competir con la impresión del informe laboral del 8 de mayo + la impresión de AMD del 5 de mayo; los precios deberían aterrizar en el sweet spot del periodo de silencio pre-Cerebras.
description.fil: **Ang May 1 record S&P 7,230.12 + Nasdaq 25,114.44 + April best-month-since-2020 + AAPL +3.28% sa $280.25 + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape ay nag-set up sa mid-May Cerebras IPO na mag-price sa o lampas pa sa top ng $22-25B targeted range na may multi-day pop — ang April 30 Apple +$100B buyback authorization + ang Q3 guide (+14-17%) ang buyside ratification ng AI-capex-on-faith thesis, at ang Cerebras roadshow ay napupunta sa pinakamalinis na single-month tape mula 2020; mag-pri-price na malapit sa pre-IPO secondary $26-28B kaysa public S-1 $22-25B; first-day pop na ≥30% kasabay ng underwriter syndicate (Morgan Stanley / Citi / Barclays / UBS) na mag-pull ng allocation aggressively mula sa long-only side; ang IPO ang magiging cohort signal na ang AI-infrastructure-build ay fundable sa public markets at hindi lang sa private capex.** $510M 2025 revenue + $20B+/750MW OpenAI deal hanggang 2028 + 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration ay priced in na; ang swing factor ay ang May 1 record-tape ratification ng AI-capex thesis, na hinihintay na ng buyside mula pa sa April 28 OpenAI-revenue-miss WSJ. Iniiwasan din ng mid-May window ang pakikipagkumpitensya sa May 8 Apr Jobs print + May 5 AMD print; mag-la-land ang pricing sa pre-Cerebras quiet-period sweet spot.

The mid-May window also avoids competing with the May 8 Apr Jobs print + the May 5 AMD print; pricing should land in the pre-Cerebras quiet-period sweet spot.
summary.ja: **5月1日の S&P 7,230.12 + ナスダック 25,114.44 新高値 + 4月の2020年以来最高の月 + AAPL +3.28% で $280.25 + 7,000億ドル規模の2026年ビッグテック AI 設備投資の流れが、5月中旬の Cerebras IPO を$22-25Bターゲット価格帯の上限以上で値付けし、複数日にわたる初値高につなげる。4月30日の Apple +$1,000億自社株買い枠 + Q3ガイダンス(+14-17%)が「AI設備投資の信仰買い」テーゼを買い手側で追認。Cerebras のロードショーは2020年以来最も澄んだ単月相場に着地し、上場直後の S-1 公表 $22-25B より pre-IPO 二次取引の $26-28B 寄りで値付け。初日上昇率は30%以上、引受団(Morgan Stanley / Citi / Barclays / UBS)はロングオンリー側から積極的にアロケーションを引っ張る。本IPOがAIインフラ建設は私募設備投資だけでなく公開市場でも資金調達可能であるという業界全体への信号となる。** 2025年売上 $510M + 2028年までの OpenAI $20B+/750MW 契約 + G42 24%/MBZUAI 62% の売上集中は織り込み済み。スイング要因は5月1日の AI 設備投資テーゼの相場追認で、買い手側は4月28日 OpenAI 売上未達 WSJ 報道以降ずっと待っていた。中旬ウィンドウは5月8日の4月雇用統計 + 5月5日 AMD 決算との競合を回避。Cerebras 静粛期間直前のスイートスポットでの値付けが見込まれる。
summary.es: **El récord del 1 de mayo del S&P 7.230,12 + Nasdaq 25.114,44 + abril mejor-mes-desde-2020 + AAPL +3,28% a $280,25 + tape de capex AI de Big Tech 2026 de $700B prepara a la IPO de mediados de mayo de Cerebras para precios al o por encima del tope del rango objetivo de $22-25B con un pop multi-día — la autorización de recompra de Apple +$100B del 30 de abril + la guía Q3 (+14-17%) es la ratificación del lado comprador de la tesis de capex-AI-por-fe, y el roadshow de Cerebras aterriza en el tape mensual más limpio desde 2020; precios más cerca del secundario pre-IPO de $26-28B que del S-1 público de $22-25B; pop del primer día ≥30% con el sindicato de aseguradores (Morgan Stanley / Citi / Barclays / UBS) tirando agresivamente de la asignación del lado long-only; la IPO se convierte en la señal de cohorte de que la construcción de infraestructura AI es financiable a través de mercados públicos y no solo capex privado.** $510M ingresos 2025 + acuerdo OpenAI $20B+/750MW hasta 2028 + concentración de ingresos del 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI ya está descontado; el factor swing es la ratificación del récord del 1 de mayo del tape de la tesis de capex-AI, que el lado comprador llevaba esperando desde el WSJ del 28 de abril sobre OpenAI-revenue-miss. La ventana de mediados de mayo también evita competir con la impresión del informe laboral del 8 de mayo + la impresión de AMD del 5 de mayo; los precios deberían aterrizar en el sweet spot del periodo de silencio pre-Cerebras.
summary.fil: **Ang May 1 record S&P 7,230.12 + Nasdaq 25,114.44 + April best-month-since-2020 + AAPL +3.28% sa $280.25 + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape ay nag-set up sa mid-May Cerebras IPO na mag-price sa o lampas pa sa top ng $22-25B targeted range na may multi-day pop — ang April 30 Apple +$100B buyback authorization + ang Q3 guide (+14-17%) ang buyside ratification ng AI-capex-on-faith thesis, at ang Cerebras roadshow ay napupunta sa pinakamalinis na single-month tape mula 2020; mag-pri-price na malapit sa pre-IPO secondary $26-28B kaysa public S-1 $22-25B; first-day pop na ≥30% kasabay ng underwriter syndicate (Morgan Stanley / Citi / Barclays / UBS) na mag-pull ng allocation aggressively mula sa long-only side; ang IPO ang magiging cohort signal na ang AI-infrastructure-build ay fundable sa public markets at hindi lang sa private capex.** $510M 2025 revenue + $20B+/750MW OpenAI deal hanggang 2028 + 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration ay priced in na; ang swing factor ay ang May 1 record-tape ratification ng AI-capex thesis, na hinihintay na ng buyside mula pa sa April 28 OpenAI-revenue-miss WSJ. Iniiwasan din ng mid-May window ang pakikipagkumpitensya sa May 8 Apr Jobs print + May 5 AMD print; mag-la-land ang pricing sa pre-Cerebras quiet-period sweet spot.

bridges.text: Today's Cerebras IPO mid-May 2026 carry ($22-25B target; pre-IPO secondary $26-28B; underwriters Morgan Stanley/Citi/Barclays/UBS) + May 1 record-tape ratification of AI-capex thesis + WTI +12% wk Iran tensions + AMD May 5 print supports `because` (IPO-day pricing dynamics ratification). Reason: the swing factor for IPO pricing is the May-1 record tape + WTI Iran-tension volatility; pricing closer to pre-IPO secondary $26-28B remains the central case. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: actual IPO pricing not yet visible; mid-May window 1-2 weeks out.

text_locales.en: Today's Cerebras IPO mid-May 2026 carry ($22-25B target; pre-IPO secondary $26-28B; underwriters Morgan Stanley/Citi/Barclays/UBS) + May 1 record-tape ratification of AI-capex thesis + WTI +12% wk Iran tensions + AMD May 5 print supports `because` (IPO-day pricing dynamics ratification). Reason: the swing factor for IPO pricing is the May-1 record tape + WTI Iran-tension volatility; pricing closer to pre-IPO secondary $26-28B remains the central case. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: actual IPO pricing not yet visible; mid-May window 1-2 weeks out.
text_locales.ja: 本日の SGLang CVE-2026-5760 が5月3日時点で未パッチ(~14日)+ CERT/CC ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment 回避策 + Linux Copy Fail KEV 5月15日連邦期限 + LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 繰り越し + Spring AI 繰り越し + クロスサーバー・クラスは `because`(LLM ツーリング + Linux カーネル CVE チェーン形成)を支持する。理由: SGLang+Copy-Fail-クラス・コホートが今や予定タイムラインで運用 + CERT/CC 緩和ガイダンスが回避策を制度化。Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: 本番での LLM ツーリング + カーネル・チェーンの公開ポストモーテムを発表した IR 企業はまだなし。
text_locales.es: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 sin parche en May 3 (~14 días) + workaround CERT/CC ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment + Linux Copy Fail KEV deadline federal May 15 + LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 carry + Spring AI carry + clase cross-server apoya `because` (chain CVE LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel formándose). Razón: cohort SGLang+Copy-Fail-class ahora operando en cronograma proyectado + guidance mitigación CERT/CC institucionaliza el workaround. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: ningún IR firm ha publicado post-mortem público del chain LLM-tooling + kernel en producción.
text_locales.fil: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 unpatched into May 3 (~14 days) + CERT/CC ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment workaround + Linux Copy Fail KEV May 15 federal deadline + LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 carry + Spring AI carry + cross-server class ay nag-su-suporta sa `because` (LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain forming). Reason: ang SGLang+Copy-Fail-class cohort ay ngayon nag-o-operate sa projected timeline + CERT/CC mitigation guidance ay nag-i-institutionalize ng workaround. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: walang IR firm na nag-publish ng public post-mortem ng LLM-tooling + kernel chain sa production.

detail.description: **The May 1 record S&P 7,230.12 + Nasdaq 25,114.44 + April best-month-since-2020 + AAPL +3.28% to $280.25 + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape sets up the mid-May Cerebras IPO to price at or above the top of the $22-25B targeted range with a multi-day pop — the Apr 30 Apple +$100B buyback authorization + the Q3 guide (+14-17%) is the buyside ratification of the AI-capex-on-faith thesis, and the Cerebras roadshow lands into the cleanest single tape since 2020; pricing closer to the pre-IPO secondary $26-28B than the public S-1 $22-25B; first-day pop ≥30% with the underwriter syndicate (Morgan Stanley / Citi / Barclays / UBS) pulling allocation aggressively from the long-only side; the IPO becomes the cohort signal that the AI-infrastructure-build is fundable through public markets and not just private capex.** $510M 2025 revenue + $20B+/750MW OpenAI deal through 2028 + the 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration is priced in already; the swing factor is the May 1 record-tape ratification of the AI-capex thesis, which the buyside has been waiting for since the Apr 28 OpenAI-revenue-miss WSJ. The mid-May window also avoids competing with the May 8 Apr Jobs print + the May 5 AMD print; pricing should land in the pre-Cerebras quiet-period sweet spot.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **5月1日の S&P 7,230.12 + ナスダック 25,114.44 新高値 + 4月の2020年以来最高の月 + AAPL +3.28% で $280.25 + 7,000億ドル規模の2026年ビッグテック AI 設備投資の流れが、5月中旬の Cerebras IPO を$22-25Bターゲット価格帯の上限以上で値付けし、複数日にわたる初値高につなげる。4月30日の Apple +$1,000億自社株買い枠 + Q3ガイダンス(+14-17%)が「AI設備投資の信仰買い」テーゼを買い手側で追認。Cerebras のロードショーは2020年以来最も澄んだ単月相場に着地し、上場直後の S-1 公表 $22-25B より pre-IPO 二次取引の $26-28B 寄りで値付け。初日上昇率は30%以上、引受団(Morgan Stanley / Citi / Barclays / UBS)はロングオンリー側から積極的にアロケーションを引っ張る。本IPOがAIインフラ建設は私募設備投資だけでなく公開市場でも資金調達可能であるという業界全体への信号となる。** 2025年売上 $510M + 2028年までの OpenAI $20B+/750MW 契約 + G42 24%/MBZUAI 62% の売上集中は織り込み済み。スイング要因は5月1日の AI 設備投資テーゼの相場追認で、買い手側は4月28日 OpenAI 売上未達 WSJ 報道以降ずっと待っていた。中旬ウィンドウは5月8日の4月雇用統計 + 5月5日 AMD 決算との競合を回避。Cerebras 静粛期間直前のスイートスポットでの値付けが見込まれる。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El récord del 1 de mayo del S&P 7.230,12 + Nasdaq 25.114,44 + abril mejor-mes-desde-2020 + AAPL +3,28% a $280,25 + tape de capex AI de Big Tech 2026 de $700B prepara a la IPO de mediados de mayo de Cerebras para precios al o por encima del tope del rango objetivo de $22-25B con un pop multi-día — la autorización de recompra de Apple +$100B del 30 de abril + la guía Q3 (+14-17%) es la ratificación del lado comprador de la tesis de capex-AI-por-fe, y el roadshow de Cerebras aterriza en el tape mensual más limpio desde 2020; precios más cerca del secundario pre-IPO de $26-28B que del S-1 público de $22-25B; pop del primer día ≥30% con el sindicato de aseguradores (Morgan Stanley / Citi / Barclays / UBS) tirando agresivamente de la asignación del lado long-only; la IPO se convierte en la señal de cohorte de que la construcción de infraestructura AI es financiable a través de mercados públicos y no solo capex privado.** $510M ingresos 2025 + acuerdo OpenAI $20B+/750MW hasta 2028 + concentración de ingresos del 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI ya está descontado; el factor swing es la ratificación del récord del 1 de mayo del tape de la tesis de capex-AI, que el lado comprador llevaba esperando desde el WSJ del 28 de abril sobre OpenAI-revenue-miss. La ventana de mediados de mayo también evita competir con la impresión del informe laboral del 8 de mayo + la impresión de AMD del 5 de mayo; los precios deberían aterrizar en el sweet spot del periodo de silencio pre-Cerebras.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang May 1 record S&P 7,230.12 + Nasdaq 25,114.44 + April best-month-since-2020 + AAPL +3.28% sa $280.25 + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI-capex tape ay nag-set up sa mid-May Cerebras IPO na mag-price sa o lampas pa sa top ng $22-25B targeted range na may multi-day pop — ang April 30 Apple +$100B buyback authorization + ang Q3 guide (+14-17%) ang buyside ratification ng AI-capex-on-faith thesis, at ang Cerebras roadshow ay napupunta sa pinakamalinis na single-month tape mula 2020; mag-pri-price na malapit sa pre-IPO secondary $26-28B kaysa public S-1 $22-25B; first-day pop na ≥30% kasabay ng underwriter syndicate (Morgan Stanley / Citi / Barclays / UBS) na mag-pull ng allocation aggressively mula sa long-only side; ang IPO ang magiging cohort signal na ang AI-infrastructure-build ay fundable sa public markets at hindi lang sa private capex.** $510M 2025 revenue + $20B+/750MW OpenAI deal hanggang 2028 + 24% G42 / 62% MBZUAI revenue concentration ay priced in na; ang swing factor ay ang May 1 record-tape ratification ng AI-capex thesis, na hinihintay na ng buyside mula pa sa April 28 OpenAI-revenue-miss WSJ. Iniiwasan din ng mid-May window ang pakikipagkumpitensya sa May 8 Apr Jobs print + May 5 AMD print; mag-la-land ang pricing sa pre-Cerebras quiet-period sweet spot.

nodes.title: Frontier cyber-AI models become US export-control category by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills.

title.en: Frontier cyber-AI models become US export-control category by Q3 2026
title.ja: Q3 2026までにフロンティア・サイバー AI モデルが米国輸出管理カテゴリ化
title.es: Modelos cyber-AI de frontera se vuelven categoría US export-control para Q3 2026
title.fil: Frontier cyber-AI models magiging US export-control category by Q3 2026

description.en: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills.
description.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、4月7日 Anthropic Mythos Preview のローンチ(Project Glasswing 下、~50ローンチパートナー + クリティカル・ソフトウェア・インフラ ~40組織 + $100M 利用クレジット + $4M オープンソース・セキュリティ寄付)+ 4月30日 Bloomberg 開示の NSA Project Aether(Mythos を機密ソブリン・サイバー・ツール対比ベンチマーク)+ 5月1日 Pentagon CTO 声明(Anthropic ブラックリストと NSA Mythos 関与の分離)が、米国がフロンティア・サイバー能力 AI 輸出管理カテゴリを正式に定義する規制プルを生む。少なくとも1件の政府発布(BIS 商務省輸出管理規則 Cat 5 part 2 デュアルユース暗号またはサイバー能力並行カテゴリ、NIST AI Cyber Center RFI フォローアップ、または White House 大統領令)が、フロンティア・サイバー AI を免許要件カテゴリとして明示。少なくとも他の2つの基礎モデル研究所(OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, Cohere)が、Glasswing パターンをミラーする公開パートナーリスト開示を伴う同等のゲート付き配布プログラムを出荷する。** 強制要因は Aether 開示が浮き彫りにする非対称性。Pentagon が調達を拒否したまさにそのモデルが、NSA がソブリン・サイバー・ベンチマークで依存しているモデルである — 行政府が規制カテゴリを未定義のまま残すことを不可能にする。4月29日 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA 権限 + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法(MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse)が開示側の規制インフラを提供。最小抵抗線は BIS が Cat 5 で規則を発布することで、30年のデュアルユース技術前例を持ち、オープンソース・エージェント・スキルを遅滞させる FDA 型認証体制全体を切り分けることを避けられる。
description.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el lanzamiento Anthropic Mythos Preview del 7 abril bajo Project Glasswing (~50 socios fundadores + ~40 organizaciones de infraestructura crítica de software + $100M créditos de uso + $4M donaciones de seguridad open-source) + el NSA Project Aether revelado por Bloomberg el 30 abril (Mythos vs herramientas cyber soberanas clasificadas) + la declaración Pentagon CTO del 1 mayo separando la lista negra de Anthropic del compromiso NSA Mythos crea el regulatory-pull para que EE. UU. defina formalmente una categoría export-control de AI de capacidad cyber-frontera — al menos una emisión gubernamental (regla export-control BIS Departamento de Comercio bajo Cat 5 part 2 cripto dual-use o categoría paralela de capacidad cyber, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, u orden ejecutiva White House) explícitamente nombra cyber-AI de frontera como categoría que requiere licencia; al menos otros dos laboratorios fundacionales (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) entregan un programa comparable de distribución gated con divulgación pública de lista de socios reflejando el patrón Glasswing.** La función forzante es la asimetría que la divulgación Aether expone: el mismo modelo que el Pentágono rehusó adquirir es el que la NSA depende para benchmarking cyber soberano, lo que hace imposible que el ejecutivo deje la categoría regulatoria indefinida; la autoridad MITRE-CNA CSAI Foundation del 29 abril + técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) proveen la infraestructura regulatoria del lado de divulgación. El camino de menor resistencia es BIS emitiendo una regla bajo Cat 5 porque tiene 30 años de precedente dual-use-tech y evita tallar el régimen completo de aprobación tipo FDA que ralentizaría agent skills open-source.
description.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch sa ilalim ng Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + ang Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking ng Mythos laban sa classified sovereign cyber tools + ang May 1 Pentagon CTO statement na nag-separate sa Anthropic blacklist mula sa NSA Mythos engagement ay lumilikha ng regulatory-pull para sa US na formally mag-define ng frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least isang government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography o parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, o White House executive order) ay explicitly nag-name ng frontier cyber-AI bilang license-required category; at least dalawa pang foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) ay mag-shi-ship ng comparable gated-distribution program na may public partner-list disclosure na nag-mirror sa Glasswing pattern.** Ang forcing function ay ang asymmetry na ipinakikita ng Aether disclosure: ang same model na tinanggihan ng Pentagon na i-procure ay ang same model na inaasahan ng NSA para sa sovereign cyber benchmarking, na nagpapagawa ng impossible para sa executive branch na iwanan ang regulatory category na undefined; ang Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) ay nagbibigay ng disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. Ang path of least resistance ay BIS na mag-issue ng rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 dahil mayroon itong 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent at iniiwasan ang pag-carve up ng full FDA-style approval regime na magpapabagal sa open-source agent skills.

The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills.

reasoning.because: Apr 30 NSA Project Aether benchmarks Mythos Preview against sovereign cyber tools; Pentagon CTO May 1 separates blacklist from Mythos
reasoning.given: Anthropic's Project Glasswing 50-org-restricted release + $100M credits sets the operative gated-distribution precedent for "too-dangerous-to-publish" frontier models
reasoning.so_that: ≥1 US government issuance (BIS export-control rule / NIST AI Cyber RFI / executive order) explicitly carves out frontier cyber-capability AI models as a license-required category
reasoning.landing: by Q3 2026; BIS or NIST or White House + ≥2 frontier labs publish parallel gated-distribution programs
reasoning.eli14: When the NSA started borrowing Anthropic's most powerful AI to find Microsoft bugs, the US government had to start regulating who else can borrow it.

eli14.en: When the NSA started borrowing Anthropic's most powerful AI to find Microsoft bugs, the US government had to start regulating who else can borrow it.
eli14.ja: NSA が Anthropic の最強 AI を借りて Microsoft のバグ探しを始めた以上、米政府は他に誰が借りられるかの規制を始めざるを得ない。
eli14.es: Cuando la NSA empezó a tomar prestado el AI más poderoso de Anthropic para encontrar bugs en Microsoft, EE. UU. tuvo que empezar a regular quién más puede tomarlo prestado.
eli14.fil: Nang sinimulan ng NSA na manghiram ng pinakamakapangyarihang AI ng Anthropic para hanapin ang Microsoft bugs, kinailangang simulan ng US government na mag-regulate kung sino pang ibang puwedeng manghiram nito.

title_locales.en: Frontier cyber-AI models become US export-control category by Q3 2026

title_locales.fil: Frontier cyber-AI models magiging US export-control category by Q3 2026

detail.summary_short: NSA's Project Aether benchmarking Mythos Preview against classified cyber tools forces the US to define a license-required category for frontier cyber-capability AI. By Q3 2026 BIS or NIST publishes the rule and ≥2 other labs ship comparable gated-distribution programs.

summary_short_locales.en: NSA's Project Aether benchmarking Mythos Preview against classified cyber tools forces the US to define a license-required category for frontier cyber-capability AI. By Q3 2026 BIS or NIST publishes the rule and ≥2 other labs ship comparable gated-distribution programs.
summary_short_locales.ja: NSA の Project Aether が Mythos Preview を機密サイバー・ツールと比較ベンチマークしたことで、米国はフロンティア・サイバー能力 AI のための免許要件カテゴリを定義せざるを得なくなる。Q3 2026までに BIS または NIST が規則を公開し、≥2 の他研究所が同等のゲート付き配布プログラムを出荷。
summary_short_locales.es: El benchmark Project Aether de NSA contra Mythos Preview vs herramientas cyber clasificadas fuerza a EE. UU. a definir una categoría que requiere licencia para AI de capacidad cyber-frontera. Para Q3 2026 BIS o NIST publica la regla y ≥2 otros laboratorios entregan programas comparables de distribución gated.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang NSA's Project Aether benchmarking ng Mythos Preview laban sa classified cyber tools ay nag-force sa US na mag-define ng license-required category para sa frontier cyber-capability AI. By Q3 2026, ang BIS o NIST ay magpa-publish ng rule at ≥2 ibang labs ay mag-shi-ship ng comparable gated-distribution programs.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、4月7日 Anthropic Mythos Preview のローンチ(Project Glasswing 下、~50ローンチパートナー + クリティカル・ソフトウェア・インフラ ~40組織 + $100M 利用クレジット + $4M オープンソース・セキュリティ寄付)+ 4月30日 Bloomberg 開示の NSA Project Aether(Mythos を機密ソブリン・サイバー・ツール対比ベンチマーク)+ 5月1日 Pentagon CTO 声明(Anthropic ブラックリストと NSA Mythos 関与の分離)が、米国がフロンティア・サイバー能力 AI 輸出管理カテゴリを正式に定義する規制プルを生む。少なくとも1件の政府発布(BIS 商務省輸出管理規則 Cat 5 part 2 デュアルユース暗号またはサイバー能力並行カテゴリ、NIST AI Cyber Center RFI フォローアップ、または White House 大統領令)が、フロンティア・サイバー AI を免許要件カテゴリとして明示。少なくとも他の2つの基礎モデル研究所(OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, Cohere)が、Glasswing パターンをミラーする公開パートナーリスト開示を伴う同等のゲート付き配布プログラムを出荷する。** 強制要因は Aether 開示が浮き彫りにする非対称性。Pentagon が調達を拒否したまさにそのモデルが、NSA がソブリン・サイバー・ベンチマークで依存しているモデルである — 行政府が規制カテゴリを未定義のまま残すことを不可能にする。4月29日 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA 権限 + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法(MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse)が開示側の規制インフラを提供。最小抵抗線は BIS が Cat 5 で規則を発布することで、30年のデュアルユース技術前例を持ち、オープンソース・エージェント・スキルを遅滞させる FDA 型認証体制全体を切り分けることを避けられる。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el lanzamiento Anthropic Mythos Preview del 7 abril bajo Project Glasswing (~50 socios fundadores + ~40 organizaciones de infraestructura crítica de software + $100M créditos de uso + $4M donaciones de seguridad open-source) + el NSA Project Aether revelado por Bloomberg el 30 abril (Mythos vs herramientas cyber soberanas clasificadas) + la declaración Pentagon CTO del 1 mayo separando la lista negra de Anthropic del compromiso NSA Mythos crea el regulatory-pull para que EE. UU. defina formalmente una categoría export-control de AI de capacidad cyber-frontera — al menos una emisión gubernamental (regla export-control BIS Departamento de Comercio bajo Cat 5 part 2 cripto dual-use o categoría paralela de capacidad cyber, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, u orden ejecutiva White House) explícitamente nombra cyber-AI de frontera como categoría que requiere licencia; al menos otros dos laboratorios fundacionales (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) entregan un programa comparable de distribución gated con divulgación pública de lista de socios reflejando el patrón Glasswing.** La función forzante es la asimetría que la divulgación Aether expone: el mismo modelo que el Pentágono rehusó adquirir es el que la NSA depende para benchmarking cyber soberano, lo que hace imposible que el ejecutivo deje la categoría regulatoria indefinida; la autoridad MITRE-CNA CSAI Foundation del 29 abril + técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) proveen la infraestructura regulatoria del lado de divulgación. El camino de menor resistencia es BIS emitiendo una regla bajo Cat 5 porque tiene 30 años de precedente dual-use-tech y evita tallar el régimen completo de aprobación tipo FDA que ralentizaría agent skills open-source.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch sa ilalim ng Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + ang Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking ng Mythos laban sa classified sovereign cyber tools + ang May 1 Pentagon CTO statement na nag-separate sa Anthropic blacklist mula sa NSA Mythos engagement ay lumilikha ng regulatory-pull para sa US na formally mag-define ng frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least isang government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography o parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, o White House executive order) ay explicitly nag-name ng frontier cyber-AI bilang license-required category; at least dalawa pang foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) ay mag-shi-ship ng comparable gated-distribution program na may public partner-list disclosure na nag-mirror sa Glasswing pattern.** Ang forcing function ay ang asymmetry na ipinakikita ng Aether disclosure: ang same model na tinanggihan ng Pentagon na i-procure ay ang same model na inaasahan ng NSA para sa sovereign cyber benchmarking, na nagpapagawa ng impossible para sa executive branch na iwanan ang regulatory category na undefined; ang Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) ay nagbibigay ng disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. Ang path of least resistance ay BIS na mag-issue ng rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 dahil mayroon itong 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent at iniiwasan ang pag-carve up ng full FDA-style approval regime na magpapabagal sa open-source agent skills.

nodes.title: SEC publishes AI-revenue disclosure concept release by Q4 2026
nodes.description: **By Q4 2026 the cohort buyside-pressure stack — Apr 30 AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + AAPL +$100B buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item disclosure precedent + OpenAI $25B annualized + $2B/month run rate + 122M paid by 2026 with $8/month + ad pilot $100M-annualized opacity + Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22-25B targeted — forces the SEC to publish a concept release (Reg S-K amendment proposal) on audited AI-business KPI disclosure for hyperscalers and foundation labs filing public comparables; at least one Big-3 hyperscaler pre-emptively publishes an audited AI-business KPI segment in a 10-Q footnote, ahead of any rule finalization, to anchor the disclosure shape.** Forcing function is the disclosure-shape gap between the cohort's collective $700B capex commitment and the cohort's lack of audited AI-KPI footnote: the buyside is being asked to underwrite eight digits of AI capex per quarter without the separate-segment view the SEC already requires for cloud, gaming, and other reporting segments. The May 1 Cerebras IPO roadshow with public S-1 disclosure + the Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue tape + the Apr 29 MSFT $37B precedent are the operative anchor signals; SEC has already opened the regulatory window via the Apr 28 Reg S-K modernization comment period (companion to climate-disclosure rulemaking), and AI-revenue disclosure is the natural next addition.

title.en: SEC publishes AI-revenue disclosure concept release by Q4 2026
title.ja: Q4 2026までに SEC が AI 売上開示コンセプト・リリースを公開
title.es: SEC publica concept release de divulgación AI-revenue para Q4 2026
title.fil: SEC magpa-publish ng AI-revenue disclosure concept release by Q4 2026

description.en: **By Q4 2026 the cohort buyside-pressure stack — Apr 30 AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + AAPL +$100B buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item disclosure precedent + OpenAI $25B annualized + $2B/month run rate + 122M paid by 2026 with $8/month + ad pilot $100M-annualized opacity + Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22-25B targeted — forces the SEC to publish a concept release (Reg S-K amendment proposal) on audited AI-business KPI disclosure for hyperscalers and foundation labs filing public comparables; at least one Big-3 hyperscaler pre-emptively publishes an audited AI-business KPI segment in a 10-Q footnote, ahead of any rule finalization, to anchor the disclosure shape.** Forcing function is the disclosure-shape gap between the cohort's collective $700B capex commitment and the cohort's lack of audited AI-KPI footnote: the buyside is being asked to underwrite eight digits of AI capex per quarter without the separate-segment view the SEC already requires for cloud, gaming, and other reporting segments. The May 1 Cerebras IPO roadshow with public S-1 disclosure + the Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue tape + the Apr 29 MSFT $37B precedent are the operative anchor signals; SEC has already opened the regulatory window via the Apr 28 Reg S-K modernization comment period (companion to climate-disclosure rulemaking), and AI-revenue disclosure is the natural next addition.
description.ja: **2026年第4四半期までに、コホート買い手側圧力スタック — 4月30日 AAPL Q3 ガイダンス +14-17%(コンセンサス +9.5% 対比)が AI サービス別個行なしで印刷 + $700B 2026 ビッグテック AI 設備投資相場 + AAPL +$100B 自社株買い枠 + 4月29日 MSFT $37B AI ランレート単一行開示前例 + OpenAI $25B 年率化 + 月 $2B ランレート + $8/月計画で2026年までに 1.22 億有料 + 広告パイロット $100M 年率化の不透明性 + Cerebras IPO 5月中旬 $22-25B ターゲット — が、SEC にハイパースケーラーおよび公開比較対象を出す基礎モデル研究所向けの監査済み AI ビジネス KPI 開示についてのコンセプト・リリース(Reg S-K 改正案)の公開を強いる。少なくとも1社の Big-3 ハイパースケーラーが、規則確定前に10-Q 脚注で監査済み AI ビジネス KPI セグメントを先行公開し、開示形式を固定する。** 強制要因は、コホートの集合的 $700B 設備投資コミットメントとコホートの監査済み AI-KPI 脚注の欠如との間にある開示形式ギャップ。買い手側は、SEC がクラウド・ゲーミング等他の報告セグメントで既に要求している別個セグメントビューなしに、四半期当たり8桁の AI 設備投資を underwrite するよう求められている。5月1日 Cerebras IPO ロードショー(公開 S-1 開示)+ 4月28日 WSJ OpenAI 売上相場 + 4月29日 MSFT $37B 前例が運用アンカー・シグナル。SEC は4月28日 Reg S-K 近代化コメント期間(climate-disclosure ルールメイクのコンパニオン)で既に規制ウィンドウを開いており、AI 売上開示は自然な次の追加。
description.es: **Para el Q4 2026 la pila de presión cohort buyside — guidance AAPL Q3 +14-17% del 30 abril (vs consenso 9.5%) impreso sin línea separada de servicios AI + tape capex Big-Tech 2026 AI $700B + autorización buyback AAPL +$100B + precedente disclosure single-line-item AI-run-rate $37B MSFT del 29 abril + OpenAI $25B anualizado + run rate $2B/mes + 122M paid by 2026 con $8/mes + opacidad pilot ad $100M-anualizado + Cerebras IPO mediados-mayo a $22-25B target — fuerza a la SEC a publicar un concept release (propuesta de enmienda Reg S-K) sobre divulgación auditada KPI AI-business para hyperscalers y laboratorios fundacionales que presentan comparables públicos; al menos un Big-3 hyperscaler publica preventivamente un segmento auditado AI-business KPI en nota 10-Q, antes de cualquier finalización de regla, para anclar la forma de divulgación.** La función forzante es la brecha de forma de divulgación entre el compromiso colectivo capex $700B del cohort y la falta del cohort de nota AI-KPI auditada: al buyside se le pide underwrite ocho dígitos de capex AI por trimestre sin la vista de segmento separado que la SEC ya requiere para cloud, gaming y otros segmentos de reporte. El roadshow Cerebras IPO del 1 mayo con divulgación pública S-1 + el WSJ tape OpenAI-revenue del 28 abril + el precedente $37B MSFT del 29 abril son las señales operativas de anclaje; SEC ya abrió la ventana regulatoria vía período de comentarios modernización Reg S-K del 28 abril (companion a regulación climate-disclosure), y divulgación AI-revenue es la siguiente adición natural.
description.fil: **By Q4 2026 ang cohort buyside-pressure stack — Apr 30 AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% (vs 9.5% consensus) na nai-print nang walang separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + AAPL +$100B buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item disclosure precedent + OpenAI $25B annualized + $2B/month run rate + 122M paid by 2026 sa $8/month + ad pilot $100M-annualized opacity + Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22-25B targeted — ay nag-fo-force sa SEC na mag-publish ng concept release (Reg S-K amendment proposal) sa audited AI-business KPI disclosure para sa hyperscalers at foundation labs na nagfa-file ng public comparables; at least isang Big-3 hyperscaler ay pre-emptively nagpa-publish ng audited AI-business KPI segment sa 10-Q footnote, bago ang anumang rule finalization, para mag-anchor ng disclosure shape.** Ang forcing function ay ang disclosure-shape gap sa pagitan ng cohort's collective $700B capex commitment at ang cohort's lack ng audited AI-KPI footnote: ang buyside ay hinihiling na mag-underwrite ng eight digits ng AI capex per quarter nang walang separate-segment view na required na ng SEC para sa cloud, gaming, at iba pang reporting segments. Ang May 1 Cerebras IPO roadshow na may public S-1 disclosure + ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue tape + ang Apr 29 MSFT $37B precedent ang operative anchor signals; binuksan na ng SEC ang regulatory window via Apr 28 Reg S-K modernization comment period (companion sa climate-disclosure rulemaking), at AI-revenue disclosure ang natural na susunod na addition.

summary.en: **By Q4 2026 the cohort buyside-pressure stack — Apr 30 AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + AAPL +$100B buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item disclosure precedent + OpenAI $25B annualized + $2B/month run rate + 122M paid by 2026 with $8/month + ad pilot $100M-annualized opacity + Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22-25B targeted — forces the SEC to publish a concept release (Reg S-K amendment proposal) on audited AI-business KPI disclosure for hyperscalers and foundation labs filing public comparables; at least one Big-3 hyperscaler pre-emptively publishes an audited AI-business KPI segment in a 10-Q footnote, ahead of any rule finalization, to anchor the disclosure shape.** Forcing function is the disclosure-shape gap between the cohort's collective $700B capex commitment and the cohort's lack of audited AI-KPI footnote: the buyside is being asked to underwrite eight digits of AI capex per quarter without the separate-segment view the SEC already requires for cloud, gaming, and other reporting segments. The May 1 Cerebras IPO roadshow with public S-1 disclosure + the Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue tape + the Apr 29 MSFT $37B precedent are the operative anchor signals; SEC has already opened the regulatory window via the Apr 28 Reg S-K modernization comment period (companion to climate-disclosure rulemaking), and AI-revenue disclosure is the natural next addition.

eli14.en: Investors are spending hundreds of billions on AI without seeing what they're getting back — the SEC will publish a draft rule asking companies to break it out.
eli14.ja: 投資家が AI に何百億ドル投じても何が返ってくるか見えない — SEC は内訳開示を求める規則案を公開する。
eli14.es: Inversores gastan cientos de miles de millones en AI sin ver lo que reciben — la SEC publicará un borrador de regla pidiendo desglose.
eli14.fil: Gumagastos ang mga investor ng daan-daang bilyon sa AI nang hindi nakikita ang nababalik sa kanila — ang SEC ay magpa-publish ng draft rule na nag-aask sa mga kumpanya na i-break out iyon.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q4 2026 the cohort buyside-pressure stack — Apr 30 AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + AAPL +$100B buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item disclosure precedent + OpenAI $25B annualized + $2B/month run rate + 122M paid by 2026 with $8/month + ad pilot $100M-annualized opacity + Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22-25B targeted — forces the SEC to publish a concept release (Reg S-K amendment proposal) on audited AI-business KPI disclosure for hyperscalers and foundation labs filing public comparables; at least one Big-3 hyperscaler pre-emptively publishes an audited AI-business KPI segment in a 10-Q footnote, ahead of any rule finalization, to anchor the disclosure shape.** Forcing function is the disclosure-shape gap between the cohort's collective $700B capex commitment and the cohort's lack of audited AI-KPI footnote: the buyside is being asked to underwrite eight digits of AI capex per quarter without the separate-segment view the SEC already requires for cloud, gaming, and other reporting segments. The May 1 Cerebras IPO roadshow with public S-1 disclosure + the Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue tape + the Apr 29 MSFT $37B precedent are the operative anchor signals; SEC has already opened the regulatory window via the Apr 28 Reg S-K modernization comment period (companion to climate-disclosure rulemaking), and AI-revenue disclosure is the natural next addition.

The May 1 Cerebras IPO roadshow with public S-1 disclosure + the Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue tape + the Apr 29 MSFT $37B precedent are the operative anchor signals; SEC has already opened the regulatory window via the Apr 28 Reg S-K modernization comment period (companion to climate-disclosure rulemaking), and AI-revenue disclosure is the natural next addition.

The May 1 Cerebras IPO roadshow with public S-1 disclosure + the Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue tape + the Apr 29 MSFT $37B precedent are the operative anchor signals; SEC has already opened the regulatory window via the Apr 28 Reg S-K modernization comment period (companion to climate-disclosure rulemaking), and AI-revenue disclosure is the natural next addition.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年第4四半期までに、コホート買い手側圧力スタック — 4月30日 AAPL Q3 ガイダンス +14-17%(コンセンサス +9.5% 対比)が AI サービス別個行なしで印刷 + $700B 2026 ビッグテック AI 設備投資相場 + AAPL +$100B 自社株買い枠 + 4月29日 MSFT $37B AI ランレート単一行開示前例 + OpenAI $25B 年率化 + 月 $2B ランレート + $8/月計画で2026年までに 1.22 億有料 + 広告パイロット $100M 年率化の不透明性 + Cerebras IPO 5月中旬 $22-25B ターゲット — が、SEC にハイパースケーラーおよび公開比較対象を出す基礎モデル研究所向けの監査済み AI ビジネス KPI 開示についてのコンセプト・リリース(Reg S-K 改正案)の公開を強いる。少なくとも1社の Big-3 ハイパースケーラーが、規則確定前に10-Q 脚注で監査済み AI ビジネス KPI セグメントを先行公開し、開示形式を固定する。** 強制要因は、コホートの集合的 $700B 設備投資コミットメントとコホートの監査済み AI-KPI 脚注の欠如との間にある開示形式ギャップ。買い手側は、SEC がクラウド・ゲーミング等他の報告セグメントで既に要求している別個セグメントビューなしに、四半期当たり8桁の AI 設備投資を underwrite するよう求められている。5月1日 Cerebras IPO ロードショー(公開 S-1 開示)+ 4月28日 WSJ OpenAI 売上相場 + 4月29日 MSFT $37B 前例が運用アンカー・シグナル。SEC は4月28日 Reg S-K 近代化コメント期間(climate-disclosure ルールメイクのコンパニオン)で既に規制ウィンドウを開いており、AI 売上開示は自然な次の追加。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q4 2026 la pila de presión cohort buyside — guidance AAPL Q3 +14-17% del 30 abril (vs consenso 9.5%) impreso sin línea separada de servicios AI + tape capex Big-Tech 2026 AI $700B + autorización buyback AAPL +$100B + precedente disclosure single-line-item AI-run-rate $37B MSFT del 29 abril + OpenAI $25B anualizado + run rate $2B/mes + 122M paid by 2026 con $8/mes + opacidad pilot ad $100M-anualizado + Cerebras IPO mediados-mayo a $22-25B target — fuerza a la SEC a publicar un concept release (propuesta de enmienda Reg S-K) sobre divulgación auditada KPI AI-business para hyperscalers y laboratorios fundacionales que presentan comparables públicos; al menos un Big-3 hyperscaler publica preventivamente un segmento auditado AI-business KPI en nota 10-Q, antes de cualquier finalización de regla, para anclar la forma de divulgación.** La función forzante es la brecha de forma de divulgación entre el compromiso colectivo capex $700B del cohort y la falta del cohort de nota AI-KPI auditada: al buyside se le pide underwrite ocho dígitos de capex AI por trimestre sin la vista de segmento separado que la SEC ya requiere para cloud, gaming y otros segmentos de reporte. El roadshow Cerebras IPO del 1 mayo con divulgación pública S-1 + el WSJ tape OpenAI-revenue del 28 abril + el precedente $37B MSFT del 29 abril son las señales operativas de anclaje; SEC ya abrió la ventana regulatoria vía período de comentarios modernización Reg S-K del 28 abril (companion a regulación climate-disclosure), y divulgación AI-revenue es la siguiente adición natural.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **By Q4 2026 ang cohort buyside-pressure stack — Apr 30 AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% (vs 9.5% consensus) na nai-print nang walang separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + AAPL +$100B buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item disclosure precedent + OpenAI $25B annualized + $2B/month run rate + 122M paid by 2026 sa $8/month + ad pilot $100M-annualized opacity + Cerebras IPO mid-May at $22-25B targeted — ay nag-fo-force sa SEC na mag-publish ng concept release (Reg S-K amendment proposal) sa audited AI-business KPI disclosure para sa hyperscalers at foundation labs na nagfa-file ng public comparables; at least isang Big-3 hyperscaler ay pre-emptively nagpa-publish ng audited AI-business KPI segment sa 10-Q footnote, bago ang anumang rule finalization, para mag-anchor ng disclosure shape.** Ang forcing function ay ang disclosure-shape gap sa pagitan ng cohort's collective $700B capex commitment at ang cohort's lack ng audited AI-KPI footnote: ang buyside ay hinihiling na mag-underwrite ng eight digits ng AI capex per quarter nang walang separate-segment view na required na ng SEC para sa cloud, gaming, at iba pang reporting segments. Ang May 1 Cerebras IPO roadshow na may public S-1 disclosure + ang Apr 28 WSJ OpenAI-revenue tape + ang Apr 29 MSFT $37B precedent ang operative anchor signals; binuksan na ng SEC ang regulatory window via Apr 28 Reg S-K modernization comment period (companion sa climate-disclosure rulemaking), at AI-revenue disclosure ang natural na susunod na addition.

nodes.label: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the second…
nodes.description: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the second "hardware-codesigned + platform-exclusive" contract after MS-OpenAI. Through H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect the **5-pole regime** — Google–(in-house Gemini), Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–internal (Llama), xAI–Oracle/NVDA — to lock in. Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X design differences will translate directly into model-behavior differences, and developers will reassess **backend portability** (a runtime-agnostic layer like MCP) as a hard requirement.

short_label.ja: ハイパースケーラ × フロンティアラボの排他同盟」時代

description.en: **The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab"** is here. Amazon-Anthropic's 10-year $100B commit becomes the second "hardware-codesigned + platform-exclusive" contract after MS-OpenAI. Through H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect the **5-pole regime** — Google–(in-house Gemini), Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–internal (Llama), xAI–Oracle/NVDA — to lock in. Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X design differences will translate directly into model-behavior differences, and developers will reassess **backend portability** (a runtime-agnostic layer like MCP) as a hard requirement.
description.ja: **「ハイパースケーラ × フロンティアラボの排他同盟」時代** — Amazon–Anthropic の 10 年 $100B コミットは、MS–OpenAI 提携に続く二つ目の「ハードウェア専用設計 × プラットフォーム独占」契約となる。2026 後半〜2027 前半で Google–（内製 Gemini）, Anthropic–AWS, OpenAI–MS, Meta–社内（Llama）, xAI–Oracle/NVDA の**5極体制**が固定化する。Trainium / TPU / MAIA / MI300X の設計差が「モデルの挙動差」に直結し、開発者は**バックエンドポータビリティ**（MCP のようなランタイム非依存層）を必須要件として再評価する。

nodes.label: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferen…
nodes.description: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.

short_label.ja: 訓練 / 推論の SKU 分離」がカスタム AI シリコンの標準設計に

description.en: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.
description.ja: **「訓練 / 推論の SKU 分離」がカスタム AI シリコンの標準設計に** — Google TPU 8t / 8i の分割は、Trainium（訓練）/ Inferentia（推論）分離の延長線で **ハイパースケーラの自社チップが訓練・推論を別アーキテクチャに固定** する流れを決定づけた。2026 後半〜2027 前半には Microsoft MAIA、Meta MTIA もこの「二刀流」SKU 戦略を採用、NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin 系の「単一アーキで両対応」に対抗する構図が固定化。推論特化 SKU は FP4 / MXFP4 ネイティブを前提に **$/query の下方競争** が 2026 Q3 にピークを迎える。

Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.

nodes.label: **The "frontier AI lab × Tier-1 cloud capacity capture" splits the field cleanly by Q3 2026.** With Google Cloud confirming three deals in a…
nodes.short_label: The "frontier AI lab × Tier-1 cloud cap…
nodes.description: **The "frontier AI lab × Tier-1 cloud capacity capture" splits the field cleanly by Q3 2026.** With Google Cloud confirming three deals in a single month — Anthropic (GB300 + large TPU), Meta (GB300 capacity), Thinking Machines Lab (A4X Max) — the structure crystallizes: clouds with enough capacity for frontier model development narrow to three (AWS / Azure / GCP). Amazon counters with **another $25B + 5GW Trainium2/3 capacity + 10-year $100B commit** for Anthropic; Azure holds OpenAI / Mistral / Inflection; GCP adds Anthropic / TML / Meta. By Q3 2026, "fourth-hyperscaler candidates without their own cloud or long-term capacity contracts with frontier labs" (Oracle Cloud / IBM / Coreweave) shift fully to **"unable to train frontier-scale, specialize on inference."** AI silicon ecosystems lock into a two-tier shape: training capacity = three-cloud oligopoly / inference = layered.

description.en: **The "frontier AI lab × Tier-1 cloud capacity capture" splits the field cleanly by Q3 2026.** With Google Cloud confirming three deals in a single month — Anthropic (GB300 + large TPU), Meta (GB300 capacity), Thinking Machines Lab (A4X Max) — the structure crystallizes: clouds with enough capacity for frontier model development narrow to three (AWS / Azure / GCP). Amazon counters with **another $25B + 5GW Trainium2/3 capacity + 10-year $100B commit** for Anthropic; Azure holds OpenAI / Mistral / Inflection; GCP adds Anthropic / TML / Meta. By Q3 2026, "fourth-hyperscaler candidates without their own cloud or long-term capacity contracts with frontier labs" (Oracle Cloud / IBM / Coreweave) shift fully to **"unable to train frontier-scale, specialize on inference."** AI silicon ecosystems lock into a two-tier shape: training capacity = three-cloud oligopoly / inference = layered.
description.ja: **「フロンティア AI ラボ × Tier-1 クラウドの容量囲い込み」が 2026 Q3 までに完全分割線として確定** — Google Cloud 単月で Anthropic（GB300 + TPU 大型契約）、Meta（GB300 容量）、Thinking Machines Lab（A4X Max）の 3 件を確定させた事実は、「フロンティアモデル開発に十分な容量を持つクラウドは 3 社（AWS / Azure / GCP）に絞られる」構造の固定化を意味する。Amazon が Anthropic に **追加 $25B + 5GW Trainium2/3 容量 + 10 年 $100B コミット** で対抗、Azure は OpenAI / Mistral / Inflection 系を握り、GCP は Anthropic / TML / Meta を加える。2026 Q3 までに「自社クラウドを持たない / フロンティアラボとの長期容量契約を持たない第 4 のハイパースケーラ候補」（Oracle Cloud / IBM / Coreweave など）は **「フロンティア訓練不可能だが推論最適化に特化」** へ位置付けが完全シフトし、AI チップ生態系は「訓練容量 = 3 社寡占 / 推論 = 多層化」の二層構造に固まる。

bridges.text: Today's Pentagon-7-vendor procurement signals + $700B 2026 capex tape + BofA $1.3T forecast support the prediction's `landing` component (frontier-lab × hyperscaler exclusivity surfaces in concrete deals). Reason: the May 1 Pentagon split + Anthropic Opus 4.7 across all four hosting paths is the cleanest visible cohort posture, but no exclusive-cloud capacity announcement has dropped. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: no formal frontier-lab × Tier-1-cloud exclusivity disclosure.

text_locales.ja: 本日のSimon Willison weblog(軽量HTML、headlessではない) + arxiv 2604.27776 WindowsWorld GUI エージェントベンチマーク(反証) + Microsoft Agent 365 "agent inventory" サーフェス(Agent-Registry隣接)が混合方向;dimension `none`。Reason: 反証(GUIリサーチ、軽量HTML)と弱支持(agent-inventoryプリミティブ)に分かれるシグナル。Coherence 1/5. Remaining gap: 収斂的なheadlessアーキテクチャ標準化シグナルが未だ。
text_locales.es: El weblog de Simon Willison de hoy (HTML ligero, no headless) + arxiv 2604.27776 benchmark agentes GUI WindowsWorld (contra-evidencia) + superficie Microsoft Agent 365 "agent inventory" (adyacente a Agent-Registry) es de dirección mixta; dimension `none`. Reason: la señal está dividida entre contra-evidencia (investigación GUI, HTML ligero) y apoyo leve (primitiva agent-inventory). Coherence 1/5. Remaining gap: ninguna señal clara de estandarización de arquitectura headless convergente todavía.
text_locales.fil: Ang Simon Willison weblog (lightweight HTML, hindi headless) + arxiv 2604.27776 WindowsWorld GUI-agent benchmark (counter-evidence) + Microsoft Agent 365 "agent inventory" surface (Agent-Registry-adjacent) ngayon ay mixed-direction; dimension `none`. Reason: ang signal ay nahati sa counter-evidence (GUI research, lightweight HTML) at mild support (agent-inventory primitive). Coherence 1/5. Remaining gap: walang malinaw na convergent headless-architecture standardization signal pa.

nodes.label: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package —…
nodes.description: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package — no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「27B Dense + 1M context」が 2026 後半のエンタープライズ・ローカル LLM の事実上の標準ポジション** — Qwen3.6-27B の公開は、「MoE のルーティング複雑性なし・RTX 4090 1 枚で回る・1M context・Apache 2.0」という組み合わせがフラグシップ級コーディング能力に届くことを実証した。2026 Q3 までに Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma 系列がそれぞれ 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama 系ライセンスのモデルを投入し、70B+ MoE の差別化要素は「マルチモーダル理解」「ツール網羅」「長期推論」に限定される。オンプレ推論の既定 VRAM 要件は RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB から **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB** へ下方シフト。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package — no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**.

The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. description.en: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact.
description.ja: **「コンシューマ GPU 上のコーディングエージェント」が Q3 2026 までに開発ワークロードの 30% 以上でクラウドオンリー API を置き換える。** 4/22 の Qwen3.6-27B (Dense、SWE-bench Verified で 397B-A17B を撃破、**RTX 3090 + Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB で 40 tok/s**) + 4/23 の Ollama MLX プレビュー (M5 Max + Qwen3.5-35B-A3B で prefill 1.57 倍 / decode 1.93 倍) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75% オフ API (**Claude Opus 4.7 比で実効 ~28 倍安価**) が独自フロンティア API SaaS モデルへの **3 方向の挟撃**を構成。Q3 2026 までに **エンタープライズ開発ツールはハイブリッドハーネスがデフォルト** — 「コーディング、リファクタリング、Lint、テスト」はローカル Qwen 3.6 クラス、「長期計画 / マルチツール推論」のみリモート フロンティア API — が標準化。Big-3 IDE (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) はすべて **ローカルファースト切替** をデフォルトで搭載。「クラウドオンリー コーディングエージェント」は 2024 年遺物となる。
description.es: **El "agente de coding sobre GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de coding solo-cloud en ≥30 % de las cargas dev para el T3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22/4 (denso, supera al 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 con Q4_K_M ~16,8 GB**) + el preview MLX de Ollama del 23/4 (1,57x prefill / 1,93x decode en M5 Max sobre Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + la API DeepSeek V4-Pro 75 % off (**efectivamente ~28x más barata que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **acoso a tres bandas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API frontera propietaria. Para el T3 2026, **las herramientas dev empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6 local para "coding, refactor, lint, test" + API frontera remota solo para "planificación de horizonte largo / razonamiento multi-tool" — y los Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) traen un **conmutador local-first** activado por defecto. El "agente de coding solo-cloud" queda como reliquia de 2024.
description.fil: **Papalitan ng "consumer-GPU coding agent" ang cloud-only coding API sa ≥30% ng dev workloads pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B (dense, nakahihigit sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090 sa Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max para sa Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**) ay bumubuo ng **3-corner squeeze** sa proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **gagamit ang enterprise dev tools ng hybrid harness bilang default** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay maglalabas ng **local-first toggle** bilang default. Magiging 2024-era artifact na lang ang "cloud-only coding agent".

bridges.text: Today's Chinese open-weight stack carry (DeepSeek V4 + Qwen 3.6 + Kimi K2.6 + GLM-5.1) + Bonsai-8B + Foundry Local + Unsloth 2026.4.8 + Google Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite at $0.25 supports `because` (consumer-GPU-capable open-weight stack matures + per-token-margin compression). Reason: open-weight stack continues to widen + Google joins the per-token-margin compression at $0.25/M. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no enterprise dev-tool vendor has yet published "≥30% local-first toggle by default" telemetry.

text_locales.en: Today's Chinese open-weight stack carry (DeepSeek V4 + Qwen 3.6 + Kimi K2.6 + GLM-5.1) + Bonsai-8B + Foundry Local + Unsloth 2026.4.8 + Google Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite at $0.25 supports `because` (consumer-GPU-capable open-weight stack matures + per-token-margin compression). Reason: open-weight stack continues to widen + Google joins the per-token-margin compression at $0.25/M. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no enterprise dev-tool vendor has yet published "≥30% local-first toggle by default" telemetry.
text_locales.ja: 本日のフルエコシステム範囲(SGLang TurboQuant in-tree, llama.cpp #20969, PolyKV, NVIDIA kvpress, DepthKV, SideQuest, CodeComp / CacheFlow / TokenDance / TTKV, Unsloth, Foundry Local GA 繰り越し)は `landing`(統一圧縮 KV キャッシュ展開ノブ)を支持する。理由: クロススタック収斂が SGLang + llama.cpp + vLLM + 研究横断で可視化、Foundry Local が欠けている Windows 統合層として位置付け。Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: Foundry Local はまだ Windows ML に紐づくネイティブ TurboQuant 統合を出荷していない。
text_locales.es: Cobertura ecosistema completa de hoy (SGLang TurboQuant in-tree, llama.cpp #20969, PolyKV, NVIDIA kvpress, DepthKV, SideQuest, CodeComp / CacheFlow / TokenDance / TTKV, Unsloth, carry Foundry Local GA) apoya `landing` (deployment-knob unificado compressed-KV-cache). Razón: convergencia cross-stack visible a través SGLang + llama.cpp + vLLM + research, con Foundry Local posicionado como capa Windows integration faltante. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: Foundry Local aún no entrega integración nativa TurboQuant tied to Windows ML.
text_locales.fil: Today's full ecosystem coverage (SGLang TurboQuant in-tree, llama.cpp #20969, PolyKV, NVIDIA kvpress, DepthKV, SideQuest, CodeComp / CacheFlow / TokenDance / TTKV, Unsloth, Foundry Local GA carry) ay nag-su-suporta sa `landing` (unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob). Reason: cross-stack convergence visible sa SGLang + llama.cpp + vLLM + research, na may Foundry Local positioned bilang missing Windows integration layer. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: Foundry Local hindi pa nag-shi-ship ng native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML.

bridges.text: Today's DeepSeek V4 Pro/Flash + Qwen 3.6 + Kimi K2.6 + GLM-5.1 + Bonsai-8B + Foundry Local + Unsloth 2026.4.8 supports `because` (consumer-GPU-capable open-weight stack matures). Reason: open-weight stack now beats GPT-5.4 on SWE-Bench Pro at consumer-hardware price points. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no enterprise dev-tool vendor has published a "≥30% local-first toggle by default" telemetry artifact.

text_locales.ja: 本日のMag-7スーパーウィーク終了 + AAPL Q3ガイダンス +14-17% + 7,000億ドルcapex + Cerebras IPO 5月中旬が `landing`(Q3ハイパースケーラcapex階層開示)を支持。Reason: 集団テープがAI-capex-on-faithを追認するが、トークンマージン基準ゲートはまだ可視化されない。Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: ハイパースケーラからper-token-margin-gated capexの開示が未だ。
text_locales.es: El cierre Mag-7 super-week + guía AAPL Q3 +14-17% + capex de $700B + IPO Cerebras de mediados de mayo de hoy apoyan `landing` (la divulgación de capex-tier hyperscaler Q3). Reason: el tape de cohorte ratifica AI-capex-on-faith, pero la puerta per-token-margin no es aún visible. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: ningún hyperscaler ha divulgado capex per-token-margin-gated.
text_locales.fil: Ang Mag-7 super-week close + AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% + $700B capex + Cerebras IPO mid-May ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `landing` (Q3 hyperscaler capex-tier disclosure). Reason: ang cohort tape ay nagpapatibay sa AI-capex-on-faith, pero ang per-token-margin gate ay hindi pa visible. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: walang hyperscaler na nag-disclose pa ng per-token-margin-gated capex.

Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **gagamit ang enterprise dev tools ng hybrid harness bilang default** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay maglalabas ng **local-first toggle** bilang default. Magiging 2024-era artifact na lang ang "cloud-only coding agent".
