nodes.description: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.

description.en: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.
description.ja: **Q4 2026までに、KVキャッシュ圧縮dtypeはすべての主要推論スタックでファーストクラスのデプロイ・ノブとして露出する — vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLMが TurboQuant + 1つ以上の代替(KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention)を同梱した`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`(または同等)フラグを出荷する。** 4/27–29がこれをほぼ確実にしている: **TurboQuantがICLR 2026 + Google Researchブログに着地**、**SGLang PR #21419は既にツリー内**(融合カーネル書き換え#23134でbf16比93–105%スループット)、**NVIDIA kvpress**はDecoding-Press成熟、**PolyKV(arxiv 2604.24971)**がマルチエージェント共有プール量子化を実証、**コミュニティMLX + Triton + vLLM移植**がGoogleの公式Python実装(Q2 2026予定)に先行して流通。経済的な強制力は4/28のWSJ OpenAI未達が割ったMag 7キャペックス相場と同一: メモリ帯域律速の長コンテキスト・ワークロードがFP16から3.5ビットへ移れれば、トークン当たり実効コストは約5–6倍カットできる。Q4 2026までにハイパースケーラはBedrock/Azure/Vertexのトークン課金を圧縮キャッシュ・ティアにオプトイン依存させ、昨日レポートの「インクリメンタルGPUキャペックスへのハードキャップ」テーゼは GPUを減らすのではなくこのレバーで締まる。
description.es: **Para Q4 2026 el dtype de compresión de KV-cache se expone como un knob de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia mayor — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lanzan un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El periodo 27–29 abr lo vuelve casi seguro: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **el PR #21419 de SGLang ya está in-tree** con una rescritura de fused-kernel (#23134) llegando a 93–105% del throughput bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** alcanza madurez en Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demuestra cuantización con pool compartido multi-agente y **ports comunitarios MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulan antes de que llegue la liberación oficial Python de Google en Q2 2026. La función forzante económica es el mismo tape de capex Mag-7 que el reporte del WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI acaba de fracturar: cada workload long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda mover de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el costo efectivo por token unas 5–6x. Para Q4 2026 los hyperscalers condicionan los precios por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex a tiers opt-in de cache comprimido, y la tesis de hard-cap a capex GPU incremental del reporte de ayer aprieta vía esta palanca y no por menos GPUs.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isang first-class deployment knob na ang KV-cache-compression dtype sa bawat major inference stack — magla-launch ang vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + di bababa sa isang alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ginagawang halos siguradong ito ng Apr 27–29: **pumasok ang TurboQuant sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419** na may fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umabot ng 93–105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago pa man dumating ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binitak ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na puwedeng lumipat mula FP16 patungo sa 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5–6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ipo-condition ng hyperscalers ang per-token pricing ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at higpit ang thesis ng kahapon na hard-cap sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan nitong lever, hindi sa pamamagitan ng pagbawas ng GPU.

The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.

detail.title: By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype i…

bridges.text: Today's SGLang TurboQuant #21419 + #23134 + llama.cpp #20969 + PolyKV + NVIDIA kvpress + new arxiv wave (SideQuest reasoning-driven KV cache management; DepthKV layer-dependent pruning) + KVFundaBench + vLLM v0.20.0 + Unsloth 2026.4.8 supports `landing` (cross-stack deployment-knob exposure). Reason: alternatives-to-TurboQuant set is broadening on cadence + reasoning-driven and layer-aware variants now research-mature. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: TGI + Ollama + TensorRT-LLM still missing the explicit `--kv-cache-dtype` flag.

text_locales.en: Today's SGLang TurboQuant #21419 + #23134 + llama.cpp #20969 + PolyKV + NVIDIA kvpress + new arxiv wave (SideQuest reasoning-driven KV cache management; DepthKV layer-dependent pruning) + KVFundaBench + vLLM v0.20.0 + Unsloth 2026.4.8 supports `landing` (cross-stack deployment-knob exposure). Reason: alternatives-to-TurboQuant set is broadening on cadence + reasoning-driven and layer-aware variants now research-mature. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: TGI + Ollama + TensorRT-LLM still missing the explicit `--kv-cache-dtype` flag.
text_locales.ja: 本日の Simon Willison ウェブログ「Sightings」(5月2日、JS アプリが Claude Code for web 経由で iNaturalist データを取得)+ Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync(本番プレビューでクロスクラウド・エージェント識別基本機能)は混在方向シグナル; 次元 `none`. 理由: Sightings はヘッドレスではなく軽量 HTML; Agent Registry 基本機能は Agent 365 Registry Sync 経由で進展。Coherence 1/5. Remaining gap: 明確な収斂的ヘッドレス・アーキテクチャ標準化シグナルはまだなし。
text_locales.es: Simon Willison weblog "Sightings" (May 2, JS app fetching iNaturalist data via Claude Code for web) + Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync (cross-cloud agent-identity primitive en preview producción) es señal mixed-direction; dimensión `none`. Razón: Sightings es HTML ligero; primitivo Agent Registry avanza vía Agent 365 Registry Sync. Coherence 1/5. Remaining gap: sin señal convergente headless-architecture standardization aún.
text_locales.fil: Today's Simon Willison weblog "Sightings" (May 2, JS app fetching iNaturalist data via Claude Code for web) + Microsoft Agent 365 Registry Sync (cross-cloud agent-identity primitive sa production preview) ay mixed-direction signal; dimension `none`. Reason: Sightings ay lightweight HTML kaysa headless; Agent Registry primitive nagsusulong via Agent 365 Registry Sync. Coherence 1/5. Remaining gap: walang clear convergent headless-architecture standardization signal yet.

bridges.text: Today's SGLang TurboQuant #21419 in-tree + #23134 fused-Triton + llama.cpp #20969 + PolyKV + NVIDIA kvpress + arxiv wave (CodeComp / CacheFlow / TokenDance / TTKV) + vLLM v0.20.0 + Unsloth 2026.4.8 supports `landing` (deployment-knob exposure across stacks). Reason: the alternatives-to-TurboQuant set is broadening on cadence. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: TGI + Ollama + TensorRT-LLM still missing the explicit `--kv-cache-dtype` flag.

text_locales.en: Today's SGLang TurboQuant #21419 in-tree + #23134 fused-Triton + llama.cpp #20969 + PolyKV + NVIDIA kvpress + arxiv wave (CodeComp / CacheFlow / TokenDance / TTKV) + vLLM v0.20.0 + Unsloth 2026.4.8 supports `landing` (deployment-knob exposure across stacks). Reason: the alternatives-to-TurboQuant set is broadening on cadence. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: TGI + Ollama + TensorRT-LLM still missing the explicit `--kv-cache-dtype` flag.
text_locales.ja: 本日のCSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 + NIST CAISI RFI + CISA KEV 5/1(Linux Copy Fail)が `because`(規制プリミティブの形成)を支持。Reason: 発行者権限 + named-technique足場がMITRE + CSA + NIST全体で整備済み。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: CISA / NISTがKEVと別の推論サーバ / agentic-CIサブカタログをまだ公表していない。
text_locales.es: CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 + RFI NIST CAISI + CISA KEV 1/5 (Linux Copy Fail) de hoy apoyan `because` (primitiva regulatoria formándose). Reason: el andamiaje de autoridad emisora + named-technique está en su lugar a través de MITRE + CSA + NIST. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: CISA / NIST aún no ha publicado un sub-catálogo de servidor de inferencia / agentic-CI separado de KEV.
text_locales.fil: Ang CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 + NIST CAISI RFI + CISA KEV May 1 (Linux Copy Fail) ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `because` (regulatory primitive na nabubuo). Reason: ang issuer-authority + named-technique scaffolding ay nasa lugar na sa MITRE + CSA + NIST. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: hindi pa nag-publish ang CISA / NIST ng inference-server / agentic-CI sub-catalog na hiwalay sa KEV.

prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para Q4 2026 el dtype de compresión de KV-cache se expone como un knob de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia mayor — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lanzan un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El periodo 27–29 abr lo vuelve casi seguro: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **el PR #21419 de SGLang ya está in-tree** con una rescritura de fused-kernel (#23134) llegando a 93–105% del throughput bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** alcanza madurez en Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demuestra cuantización con pool compartido multi-agente y **ports comunitarios MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulan antes de que llegue la liberación oficial Python de Google en Q2 2026. La función forzante económica es el mismo tape de capex Mag-7 que el reporte del WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI acaba de fracturar: cada workload long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda mover de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el costo efectivo por token unas 5–6x. Para Q4 2026 los hyperscalers condicionan los precios por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex a tiers opt-in de cache comprimido, y la tesis de hard-cap a capex GPU incremental del reporte de ayer aprieta vía esta palanca y no por menos GPUs.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isang first-class deployment knob na ang KV-cache-compression dtype sa bawat major inference stack — magla-launch ang vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + di bababa sa isang alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ginagawang halos siguradong ito ng Apr 27–29: **pumasok ang TurboQuant sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419** na may fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umabot ng 93–105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago pa man dumating ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binitak ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na puwedeng lumipat mula FP16 patungo sa 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5–6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ipo-condition ng hyperscalers ang per-token pricing ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at higpit ang thesis ng kahapon na hard-cap sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan nitong lever, hindi sa pamamagitan ng pagbawas ng GPU.

nodes.description: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.

description.en: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.
description.ja: **2026年 H2 までに、すべての主要ローカル LLM エコシステム (vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM、Foundry Local) が統一された圧縮 KV キャッシュデプロイメントノブ — TurboQuant + 少なくとも 1つの代替 — を公開し、Foundry Local (Microsoft、4/9 GA) が Windows ML / WinML 実行プロバイダーに紐づく Windows デフォルト最適化として TurboQuant ネイティブ統合を出荷する。** 4/27-29 のエビデンス: SGLang PR #21419 がツリーイン; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode カーネル書き直しが bf16 比 93–105% スループットに到達; vLLM v0.19.0 (4/2) が torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / 非同期スケジューラデフォルト + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971、4/27) はマルチエージェント推論のための共有非対称 KV プール; NVIDIA kvpress は Decoding-Press 成熟段階; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant ディスカッションスレッドはアクティブ; Unsloth 2026.4.8 推論 20-30% 高速化。Foundry Local は欠落していたエンタープライズ Windows エントリポイント — Microsoft はハードウェア対応 WinML 実行プロバイダーで任意のアプリにローカル AI をバンドルする約 20MB のネイティブライブラリとして出荷しており、2026年 Q2 の自明な次の一歩は Foundry Catalog で TurboQuant フラグを公開することだ。経済的強制関数は同じ Mag 7 設備投資テープ: メモリ帯域制約のロングコンテキストワークロードが FP16 から 3.5ビットに移ると、トークンあたりの実効コストは ~5-6倍下がり、Foundry Local はそのスイッチをエンドデベロッパーから不可視にする。
description.es: **(Tecnológica) Para H2 2026 cada gran ecosistema de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un selector unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimida — TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa — y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9-abr) integra TurboQuant nativo ligado a los proveedores de ejecución Windows ML / WinML como optimización por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia 27-29 abr: SGLang PR #21419 ya en árbol; reescritura de kernel fused-Triton-decode SGLang #23134 alcanzando 93–105% de throughput vs bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2-abr) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / scheduler asíncrono por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27-abr) pool KV asimétrico compartido para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress en madurez Decoding-Press; hilo de discusión llama.cpp #20969 sobre TurboQuant activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 con inferencia 20-30% más rápida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial Windows que faltaba — Microsoft lo distribuye como una librería nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con proveedores de ejecución WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La función forzada económica es la misma cinta de capex Mag 7: cada carga de trabajo de contexto largo limitada por ancho de banda de memoria que pase de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el coste efectivo por token ~5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores.
description.fil: **Bago matapos ang H2 2026, ipo-publish ng bawat major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) ang unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + hindi bababa sa isang alternative — at magsi-ship ang Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML / WinML execution providers bilang Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419; umaabot sa 93–105% bf16 throughput ang SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool para sa multi-agent inference; Decoding-Press maturity ang NVIDIA kvpress; aktibo ang llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread; 20-30% mas mabilis ang inference ng Unsloth 2026.4.8. Ang Foundry Local ang nawawalang enterprise-Windows entry point — ini-ship ito ng Microsoft bilang ~20MB native library na nag-bubundle ng local AI sa anumang app na may hardware-matched WinML execution providers, at ang halatang susunod na hakbang para sa Q2 2026 ay i-surface ang TurboQuant flag sa Foundry Catalog. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag 7 capex tape: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na lilipat mula FP16 patungong 3.5-bit ay magpaputol sa effective per-token cost ng ~5-6x, at ginagawang invisible ng Foundry Local ang switch na iyon sa end-developers.

detail.title: By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosys…

bridges.text: Today's full ecosystem coverage (SGLang TurboQuant in-tree, llama.cpp #20969, PolyKV, NVIDIA kvpress, DepthKV, SideQuest, CodeComp / CacheFlow / TokenDance / TTKV, Unsloth, Foundry Local GA carry) supports `landing` (unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob). Reason: cross-stack convergence visible across SGLang + llama.cpp + vLLM + research, with Foundry Local positioned as the missing Windows integration layer. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: Foundry Local does not yet ship native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML.

text_locales.en: Today's full ecosystem coverage (SGLang TurboQuant in-tree, llama.cpp #20969, PolyKV, NVIDIA kvpress, DepthKV, SideQuest, CodeComp / CacheFlow / TokenDance / TTKV, Unsloth, Foundry Local GA carry) supports `landing` (unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob). Reason: cross-stack convergence visible across SGLang + llama.cpp + vLLM + research, with Foundry Local positioned as the missing Windows integration layer. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: Foundry Local does not yet ship native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML.
text_locales.ja: 本日の CSAI MITRE-CNA 繰り越し + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法 + SGLang/LiteLLM/Spring AI 繰り越し + UTT/IBM Langflow + Microsoft Agent 365 allow/block + Anthropic Project Glasswing model card(4月7日、~50 ローンチパートナー + ~40 クリティカル・ソフトウェア・インフラ組織 + $100M 利用クレジット + $4M オープンソース・セキュリティ寄付)は `because`(CNA 発行サブコーパス形成 + ゲート付きフロンティア・サイバー配布前例)を支持する。理由: 発行体権限 + 名前付き手法語彙 + クロス CVE クラスター + Glasswing 配布前例が予測トポロジーへ収斂。Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: ≥50 のエージェント固有 CVE はまだ計上されていない; 強制署名 + 出所ゲートを出荷したマーケットプレイスはなし。
text_locales.es: Carry CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 named techniques + carry SGLang/LiteLLM/Spring AI + UTT/IBM Langflow + Microsoft Agent 365 allow/block + Anthropic Project Glasswing model card (Apr 7, ~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) apoya `because` (formación CNA-issued sub-corpus + precedente distribution gated frontera-cyber). Razón: issuer authority + vocabulario named-technique + cluster cross-CVE + precedente distribución Glasswing convergiendo en topología predicha. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: ≥50 CVEs específicos-agentes aún no contados; ningún marketplace ha entregado gate mandatorio signed-+-provenance.
text_locales.fil: Today's CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + ATT&CK v19 named techniques + SGLang/LiteLLM/Spring AI carry + UTT/IBM Langflow + Microsoft Agent 365 allow/block + Anthropic Project Glasswing model card (Apr 7, ~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) ay nag-su-suporta sa `because` (CNA-issued sub-corpus formation + gated frontier-cyber distribution precedent). Reason: issuer authority + named-technique vocabulary + cross-CVE cluster + Glasswing distribution precedent ay nagko-converge sa predicted topology. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: ≥50 agent-specific CVEs hindi pa counted; walang marketplace na nag-shi-ship ng mandatory signed-+-provenance gate.

Remaining gap: Foundry Local does not yet ship native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML.
text_locales.ja: 本日のペンタゴン7社調達シグナル + 7,000億ドル2026 capexテープ + BofA $1.3T 予測が予測の `landing` コンポーネント(フロンティア研究所×ハイパースケーラ独占性が具体的契約に表面化)を支持。Reason: 5/1のペンタゴン分裂 + Anthropic Opus 4.7の4経路展開が最も明確な集団ポスチャだが、独占的キャパシティ契約の発表はまだ。Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: フロンティア研究所×Tier-1クラウドの独占性に関する正式開示が未だ。
text_locales.es: Las señales de adquisición Pentágono-7-vendedores + el tape de capex 2026 de $700B + el pronóstico de BofA $1,3T de hoy apoyan el componente `landing` de la predicción (la exclusividad laboratorio frontera × hyperscaler aflora en acuerdos concretos). Reason: la división Pentágono del 1/5 + Anthropic Opus 4.7 en las cuatro rutas de hosting es la postura de cohorte más limpia visible, pero ningún anuncio de capacidad cloud exclusiva ha aparecido. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: ninguna divulgación formal de exclusividad laboratorio frontera × cloud Tier-1.
text_locales.fil: Ang Pentagon-7-vendor procurement signals + $700B 2026 capex tape + BofA $1.3T forecast ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `landing` component ng prediction (frontier-lab × hyperscaler exclusivity ay lumitaw sa concrete deals). Reason: ang May 1 Pentagon split + Anthropic Opus 4.7 sa apat na hosting paths ay pinakamalinis na visible cohort posture, pero walang exclusive-cloud capacity announcement ang lumabas. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: walang formal frontier-lab × Tier-1-cloud exclusivity disclosure.

readings.cluster_narrative: This prediction is supported by a single cluster: 13 of 27 items in 'Local Inference Runtime' (2026-17); the cluster is accelerating. Concentrated support — if this thread breaks, the prediction loses its base.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年 H2 までに、すべての主要ローカル LLM エコシステム (vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM、Foundry Local) が統一された圧縮 KV キャッシュデプロイメントノブ — TurboQuant + 少なくとも 1つの代替 — を公開し、Foundry Local (Microsoft、4/9 GA) が Windows ML / WinML 実行プロバイダーに紐づく Windows デフォルト最適化として TurboQuant ネイティブ統合を出荷する。** 4/27-29 のエビデンス: SGLang PR #21419 がツリーイン; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode カーネル書き直しが bf16 比 93–105% スループットに到達; vLLM v0.19.0 (4/2) が torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / 非同期スケジューラデフォルト + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971、4/27) はマルチエージェント推論のための共有非対称 KV プール; NVIDIA kvpress は Decoding-Press 成熟段階; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant ディスカッションスレッドはアクティブ; Unsloth 2026.4.8 推論 20-30% 高速化。Foundry Local は欠落していたエンタープライズ Windows エントリポイント — Microsoft はハードウェア対応 WinML 実行プロバイダーで任意のアプリにローカル AI をバンドルする約 20MB のネイティブライブラリとして出荷しており、2026年 Q2 の自明な次の一歩は Foundry Catalog で TurboQuant フラグを公開することだ。経済的強制関数は同じ Mag 7 設備投資テープ: メモリ帯域制約のロングコンテキストワークロードが FP16 から 3.5ビットに移ると、トークンあたりの実効コストは ~5-6倍下がり、Foundry Local はそのスイッチをエンドデベロッパーから不可視にする。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **(Tecnológica) Para H2 2026 cada gran ecosistema de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un selector unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimida — TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa — y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9-abr) integra TurboQuant nativo ligado a los proveedores de ejecución Windows ML / WinML como optimización por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia 27-29 abr: SGLang PR #21419 ya en árbol; reescritura de kernel fused-Triton-decode SGLang #23134 alcanzando 93–105% de throughput vs bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2-abr) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / scheduler asíncrono por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27-abr) pool KV asimétrico compartido para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress en madurez Decoding-Press; hilo de discusión llama.cpp #20969 sobre TurboQuant activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 con inferencia 20-30% más rápida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial Windows que faltaba — Microsoft lo distribuye como una librería nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con proveedores de ejecución WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La función forzada económica es la misma cinta de capex Mag 7: cada carga de trabajo de contexto largo limitada por ancho de banda de memoria que pase de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el coste efectivo por token ~5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Bago matapos ang H2 2026, ipo-publish ng bawat major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) ang unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + hindi bababa sa isang alternative — at magsi-ship ang Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML / WinML execution providers bilang Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419; umaabot sa 93–105% bf16 throughput ang SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool para sa multi-agent inference; Decoding-Press maturity ang NVIDIA kvpress; aktibo ang llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread; 20-30% mas mabilis ang inference ng Unsloth 2026.4.8. Ang Foundry Local ang nawawalang enterprise-Windows entry point — ini-ship ito ng Microsoft bilang ~20MB native library na nag-bubundle ng local AI sa anumang app na may hardware-matched WinML execution providers, at ang halatang susunod na hakbang para sa Q2 2026 ay i-surface ang TurboQuant flag sa Foundry Catalog. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag 7 capex tape: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na lilipat mula FP16 patungong 3.5-bit ay magpaputol sa effective per-token cost ng ~5-6x, at ginagawang invisible ng Foundry Local ang switch na iyon sa end-developers.

description.en: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time.
description.ja: **「GGUF 供給経路」がサプライチェーン攻撃の新しい主戦場** — SGLang CVE-2026-5760（GGUF 経由の Jinja2 SSTI で RCE）は「モデルファイル自体が実行可能コードのキャリア」である現実を可視化した。2026 Q3 までに Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope は **モデルカード + chat_template の署名検証／サンドボックス実行** を標準要件化し、Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM も GGUF ロード時に SSTI スキャンをデフォルト有効化する。

nodes.label: **Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market …
nodes.short_label: Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on t…
nodes.description: **Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — by Q4 2026 the FOMC reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2 dissenters) under Warsh as Chair, but Powell's continued Board presence becomes the marginal swing vote on the Fed-investigation governance question, not on rates.** Apr 29 was the highest-dissent FOMC since Oct-1992 (8-4); Miran wanted -25bp; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan opposed easing-bias inclusion. Warsh nomination advanced from Senate Banking same day. The 2026-2027 setup: Powell on Board through term-end 2028 with Warsh in the Chair seat; the dissent posture compresses on rate calls because the Chair sets the framing; Powell's marginal vote becomes a governance signal whenever the Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome moves. Markets price a smaller forward-guidance volatility on rates but a larger institutional-risk premium on the Fed itself. The 1992-precedent comparison stops being a curiosity and starts being a structural reference point in financial-press explanations of the new Fed governance regime.

description.en: **Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — by Q4 2026 the FOMC reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2 dissenters) under Warsh as Chair, but Powell's continued Board presence becomes the marginal swing vote on the Fed-investigation governance question, not on rates.** Apr 29 was the highest-dissent FOMC since Oct-1992 (8-4); Miran wanted -25bp; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan opposed easing-bias inclusion. Warsh nomination advanced from Senate Banking same day. The 2026-2027 setup: Powell on Board through term-end 2028 with Warsh in the Chair seat; the dissent posture compresses on rate calls because the Chair sets the framing; Powell's marginal vote becomes a governance signal whenever the Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome moves. Markets price a smaller forward-guidance volatility on rates but a larger institutional-risk premium on the Fed itself. The 1992-precedent comparison stops being a curiosity and starts being a structural reference point in financial-press explanations of the new Fed governance regime.
description.ja: **Powell が 4/29 に Chair 任期終了 (5/15) 後も理事会に残る決定が 2026年金融政策市場心理を再構築 — 2026年 Q4 までに FOMC は Warsh Chair 体制下で反対票 ≤2 のより小さい反対規範に戻るが、Powell の理事会継続在任は金利ではなく Fed 調査ガバナンス問題のマージナルスイング票となる。** 4/29 は 1992年10月以来の最多反対 FOMC (8-4); Miran は -25bp を主張; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan は緩和バイアス含めることに反対。同日 Warsh 指名が上院銀行委員会を通過。2026-2027年セットアップ: Warsh が Chair 席で Powell が 2028年任期末まで理事会に在任; Chair がフレーミングを設定するため、利率コールでは反対姿勢が圧縮; トランプ政権 Fed 調査の結果が動くたびに Powell のマージナル票はガバナンスシグナルになる。市場は金利のフォワードガイダンスボラティリティを下げ、Fed 自体の制度リスクプレミアムを上げる方向に値付けする。1992年の前例比較は珍奇な話題ではなく、新しい Fed ガバナンス体制の金融プレス解説における構造的参照点になる。
description.es: **(No tecnológica) La decisión de Powell del 29-abr de permanecer en la Junta de Gobernadores tras vencer su mandato como Chair (15-may) reconfigura la psicología del mercado de política monetaria 2026 — para Q4 2026 el FOMC vuelve a una norma de menor disidencia (≤2 disidentes) bajo Warsh como Chair, pero la presencia continua de Powell en la Junta se convierte en el voto pivote marginal sobre la cuestión de gobernanza de la investigación Fed, no sobre los tipos.** El 29-abr fue el FOMC con más disidentes desde oct-1992 (8-4); Miran quería -25pb; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan se opusieron a incluir sesgo de relajación. La nominación de Warsh avanzó del Comité Bancario del Senado el mismo día. La configuración 2026-2027: Powell en la Junta hasta el final de su mandato en 2028 con Warsh en el sillón del Chair; la postura disidente se comprime en las decisiones de tipos porque el Chair fija el encuadre; el voto marginal de Powell se convierte en señal de gobernanza siempre que se mueva el resultado de la investigación Fed de Trump. Los mercados ponen precio a una menor volatilidad de forward guidance sobre tipos pero a una mayor prima de riesgo institucional sobre la propia Fed. La comparación con el precedente de 1992 deja de ser una curiosidad y pasa a ser un punto de referencia estructural en las explicaciones de la prensa financiera del nuevo régimen de gobernanza Fed.
description.fil: **Binabago ng desisyon ni Powell noong Apr 29 na manatili sa Board of Governors lampas sa pagtatapos ng Chair-term niya (May 15) ang 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — bago matapos ang Q4 2026, babalik ang FOMC sa mas maliit na dissent norm (≤2 dissenters) sa ilalim ni Warsh bilang Chair, ngunit ang patuloy na presensya ni Powell sa Board ang magiging marginal swing vote sa Fed-investigation governance question, hindi sa rates.** Ang Apr 29 ang highest-dissent FOMC mula Oct-1992 (8-4); gusto ni Miran ang -25bp; tutol sina Hammack/Kashkari/Logan sa pagsasama ng easing-bias. Umusad ang nominasyon ni Warsh mula Senate Banking sa parehong araw. Ang 2026-2027 setup: Powell sa Board hanggang term-end 2028 habang nasa Chair seat si Warsh; mag-co-compress ang dissent posture sa rate calls dahil itinatakda ng Chair ang framing; ang marginal vote ni Powell ang magiging governance signal kapag may galaw sa Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome. Pe-presyuhan ng markets ang mas maliit na forward-guidance volatility sa rates ngunit mas malaki ang institutional-risk premium sa Fed mismo. Hihinto na ang 1992-precedent comparison sa pagiging curiosity at magiging structural reference point sa financial-press explanations ng bagong Fed governance regime.

summary.en: **Powell's Apr 29 decision to remain on the Board of Governors past his Chair-term expiration (May 15) reshapes 2026 monetary-policy market psychology — by Q4 2026 the FOMC reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2 dissenters) under Warsh as Chair, but Powell's continued Board presence becomes the marginal swing vote on the Fed-investigation governance question, not on rates.** Apr 29 was the highest-dissent FOMC since Oct-1992 (8-4); Miran wanted -25bp; Hammack/Kashkari/Logan opposed easing-bias inclusion. Warsh nomination advanced from Senate Banking same day. The 2026-2027 setup: Powell on Board through term-end 2028 with Warsh in the Chair seat; the dissent posture compresses on rate calls because the Chair sets the framing; Powell's marginal vote becomes a governance signal whenever the Trump-admin Fed-investigation outcome moves. Markets price a smaller forward-guidance volatility on rates but a larger institutional-risk premium on the Fed itself. The 1992-precedent comparison stops being a curiosity and starts being a structural reference point in financial-press explanations of the new Fed governance regime.

bridges.text: Today's Powell stays past May 15 + Warsh Senate Banking confirm + Powell on Board through 2028 + Apr Jobs Report May 8 baseline + WTI +12% week-on-week supports `because` (market-psychology pivot under macro-volatile week). Reason: structural shift from "shadow chair" to formal-Board-marginal-swing now publicly negotiated; Iran-tension oil bid adds volatility. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: dissent-vote count under Warsh Chair has not yet printed; ≤2 dissent norm projection unobserved.

text_locales.en: Today's Powell stays past May 15 + Warsh Senate Banking confirm + Powell on Board through 2028 + Apr Jobs Report May 8 baseline + WTI +12% week-on-week supports `because` (market-psychology pivot under macro-volatile week). Reason: structural shift from "shadow chair" to formal-Board-marginal-swing now publicly negotiated; Iran-tension oil bid adds volatility. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: dissent-vote count under Warsh Chair has not yet printed; ≤2 dissent norm projection unobserved.
text_locales.ja: 本日の CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法 + Linux Copy Fail KEV + cPanel & WHM KEV + NIST CAISI RFI は `because`(規制プリミティブ形成中)を支持する。理由: 発行体権限 + 名前付き手法基盤が MITRE + CSA + NIST + CISA 横断で揃い、本日の予測 #2(フロンティア・サイバー AI 輸出管理カテゴリ)が運用上のエスカレーション。Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: CISA / NIST はまだ KEV と分離した推論サーバー / agentic-CI サブカタログを公開していない。
text_locales.es: CSAI MITRE-CNA + técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 + Linux Copy Fail KEV + cPanel & WHM KEV + NIST CAISI RFI de hoy apoya `because` (primitivo regulatorio formándose). Razón: andamio issuer-authority + named-technique está en lugar a través MITRE + CSA + NIST + CISA, y predicción hoy #2 (frontier cyber-AI export-control category) es la escalada operativa. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: CISA / NIST aún no ha publicado sub-catálogo inference-server / agentic-CI separado de KEV.
text_locales.fil: Today's CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques + Linux Copy Fail KEV + cPanel & WHM KEV + NIST CAISI RFI ay nag-su-suporta sa `because` (regulatory primitive nabubuo). Reason: issuer-authority + named-technique scaffolding ay nasa lugar sa MITRE + CSA + NIST + CISA, at today's prediction #2 (frontier cyber-AI export-control category) ay ang operative escalation. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: ang CISA / NIST ay hindi pa nag-publish ng inference-server / agentic-CI sub-catalog separate from KEV.

Reason: the structural shift from "shadow chair" framing to formal-Board-marginal-swing is now publicly negotiated. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: dissent-vote count under Warsh Chair has not yet printed; the ≤2 dissent norm projection is unobserved.

text_locales.ja: 本日のCSA Identity in the Age of AI(5/1) + Microsoft Agent 365 Entra/Purview/Intune/Defenderサブストレートが `given`(エージェント=第一級アイデンティティ足場)を支持。Reason: 操作的サブストレート・プリミティブが企業コントロールプレーン層で形成中。Coherence 2/5. Remaining gap: 本日のニュースに米州法令や立法草案活動なし。
text_locales.es: El blog CSA Identity in the Age of AI (1/5) + sustrato Microsoft Agent 365 Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender de hoy apoyan `given` (el andamiaje de agente como identidad de primera clase). Reason: la primitiva de sustrato operativo se está formando en la capa de plano de control empresarial. Coherence 2/5. Remaining gap: ninguna actividad legislativa o estatuto de estado en EE. UU. en las noticias de hoy.
text_locales.fil: Ang CSA Identity in the Age of AI (May 1) + Microsoft Agent 365 Entra/Purview/Intune/Defender substrate ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `given` (agent-as-first-class-identity scaffolding). Reason: ang operative-substrate primitive ay nabubuo sa enterprise control-plane layer. Coherence 2/5. Remaining gap: walang US-state statute o legislative-draft activity sa balita ngayon.

nodes.description: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.15 GB. Designing for 1-bit from training, rather than 4/8-bit post-quantization, will become the standard for edge LLMs. Expect 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families to follow within the next quarter.

short_label.ja: プロプライエタリ再膨張とオープンウェイトの地政学分断

description.en: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes. Open weights, meanwhile, concentrate on the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines for production, formalizing the line: local for utility, cloud for the frontier.
description.ja: **プロプライエタリ再膨張とオープンウェイトの地政学分断** — Qwen3.6-Max-Preview が「プロプライエタリのまま API のみ公開」に舵を切った点、Anthropic も Mythos Preview で段階ゲーティング化した点から、2026 Q3 には**「最強モデル＝非オープンウェイト」が明確化**。一方、オープンウェイトは 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama 系に最適化が集中し、ローカル = 実用帯、クラウド = フロンティアという線引きが制度化される。

nodes.label: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-2…
nodes.description: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers."

nodes.description: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve.

description.en: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve.
description.ja: **Mag 7 Q1 決算 (4/29-30) が AI capex の ROI ナラティブをリセット — Q3 2026 にハイパースケーラー初の「トークン マージン ゲート」による AI 設備投資階層化が公表される。** Alphabet (1,750〜1,850 億ドル)、Amazon (約 2,000 億ドル)、Meta (1,150〜1,350 億ドル)、Microsoft (Azure ラガード再評価リスク) の 2026 年合計 capex ガイダンスはおよそ 6,500〜7,000 億ドルに達し、ウォール街の「AI ROI 現実点検」と対峙する。4/29-30 の決算で **トークンあたり収益のエグジット ベロシティ** テーゼが検証されるか、マルチプル圧縮が引き起こされるかが分かれる。Q3 2026 までに Big-3 ハイパースケーラーのうち少なくとも 1 社が、Bedrock/Azure/Vertex の **トークン マージン下限** を増分 GPU 設備投資の条件として **公的に明示** する。これは公開クラウドからの最初の明示的「AI インフラ ROI 閾値」であり、2024-2025 の「投資せざるを得ない」教義の終焉を告げる。フロンティア ラボのアンカーディール (Google 400 億 / Anthropic、Amazon 250 億 / Anthropic、OpenAI 200 億 / Cerebras + Microsoft) は可視的な圧力リリースバルブとなる。
description.es: **Los resultados Q1 de las Mag 7 (29-30/04) reescriben la narrativa del ROI del capex en IA — el Q3 2026 verá al primer hyperscaler que escalonará públicamente el capex de IA por una compuerta de margen por token.** Con la guía combinada de capex 2026 de Alphabet (175.000-185.000 M USD), Amazon (~200.000 M USD), Meta (115.000-135.000 M USD) y Microsoft (con riesgo de re-rating por rezago de Azure) totalizando ~650.000-700.000 M USD frente al "control de realidad del ROI de la IA" de Wall Street, los resultados del 29-30/04 validarán la tesis de **velocidad de escape de ingreso por token** o desencadenarán una compresión de múltiplos. Para el Q3 2026, al menos un hyperscaler de los Big-3 **condicionará públicamente el capex incremental en GPU a un piso de margen por token en Bedrock/Azure/Vertex** — el primer "umbral de ROI de infraestructura de IA" explícito desde una nube pública, poniendo fin a la doctrina 2024-2025 de "gasta o muere". Los acuerdos ancla de los frontier labs (Google 40.000 M / Anthropic, Amazon 25.000 M / Anthropic, OpenAI 20.000 M / Cerebras + Microsoft) pasan a ser la válvula visible de alivio.
description.fil: **I-reset ng Mag 7 Q1 earnings (4/29-30) ang AI-capex ROI narrative — sa Q3 2026, may unang hyperscaler na publikong magta-tier ng AI capex sa pamamagitan ng token-margin gate.** Sa pinagsamang 2026 capex guidance mula sa Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), at Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) na umaabot ng ~$650B-$700B kontra sa "AI ROI reality check" ng Wall Street, ang 4/29-30 prints ay maaaring magpatibay sa thesis ng **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** o magtigger ng multiple compression. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang publikong **mag-gagate ng incremental GPU capex sa isang Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — ito ang unang explicit na "AI infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud, na magtatapos sa 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Ang frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) ang magiging visible pressure relief valve.

summary.en: **Mag 7 Q1 earnings (Apr 29-30) reset the AI-capex ROI narrative — Q3 2026 sees the first hyperscaler to publicly tier AI capex by token-margin gate.** With combined 2026 capex guidance from Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), and Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) totaling ~$650B-$700B against Wall Street's "AI ROI reality check," the Apr 29-30 prints either validate the **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** thesis or trigger a multiple compression. By Q3 2026, at least one Big-3 hyperscaler publicly **gates incremental GPU capex on a Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — the first explicit "AI infra ROI threshold" from a public cloud, ending the 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) become the visible pressure relief valve.

bridges.text: Today's May 1 record S&P + Nasdaq close + AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% + $700B 2026 capex + AMD May 5 OpenAI 6GW H2 first-deployment timing + WTI +12% week-on-week supports `landing` (Q3 hyperscaler capex-tier disclosure window). Reason: cohort tape + OpenAI 6GW H2 explicit timing put per-token-margin gating squarely in the AMD May 5 print + Q3 earnings call window. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no hyperscaler has yet publicly tiered AI capex by token-margin.

text_locales.en: Today's May 1 record S&P + Nasdaq close + AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% + $700B 2026 capex + AMD May 5 OpenAI 6GW H2 first-deployment timing + WTI +12% week-on-week supports `landing` (Q3 hyperscaler capex-tier disclosure window). Reason: cohort tape + OpenAI 6GW H2 explicit timing put per-token-margin gating squarely in the AMD May 5 print + Q3 earnings call window. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no hyperscaler has yet publicly tiered AI capex by token-margin.
text_locales.ja: 本日の SGLang TurboQuant #21419 + #23134 + llama.cpp #20969 + PolyKV + NVIDIA kvpress + 新 arxiv 波(SideQuest 推論駆動 KV キャッシュ管理; DepthKV 層依存剪定)+ KVFundaBench + vLLM v0.20.0 + Unsloth 2026.4.8 は `landing`(クロススタック展開ノブ露出)を支持する。理由: TurboQuant 代替セットがリズム良く拡大 + 推論駆動 + 層対応バリアントが研究的に成熟。Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: TGI + Ollama + TensorRT-LLM はまだ明示的 `--kv-cache-dtype` フラグを欠く。
text_locales.es: SGLang TurboQuant #21419 + #23134 + llama.cpp #20969 + PolyKV + NVIDIA kvpress + nueva ola arxiv (SideQuest reasoning-driven KV cache management; DepthKV layer-dependent pruning) + KVFundaBench + vLLM v0.20.0 + Unsloth 2026.4.8 apoya `landing` (exposición deployment-knob cross-stack). Razón: set alternativas-a-TurboQuant ampliándose en cadencia + variantes reasoning-driven y layer-aware ahora research-mature. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: TGI + Ollama + TensorRT-LLM aún sin flag explícito `--kv-cache-dtype`.
text_locales.fil: Today's SGLang TurboQuant #21419 + #23134 + llama.cpp #20969 + PolyKV + NVIDIA kvpress + new arxiv wave (SideQuest reasoning-driven KV cache management; DepthKV layer-dependent pruning) + KVFundaBench + vLLM v0.20.0 + Unsloth 2026.4.8 ay nag-su-suporta sa `landing` (cross-stack deployment-knob exposure). Reason: alternatives-to-TurboQuant set patuloy na lumalapad + reasoning-driven at layer-aware variants ngayon ay research-mature. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: TGI + Ollama + TensorRT-LLM ay nawawala pa rin ang explicit `--kv-cache-dtype` flag.

bridges.text: Today's Mag-7 super-week close + AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% + $700B capex + Cerebras IPO mid-May supports `landing` (the Q3 hyperscaler capex-tier disclosure). Reason: the cohort tape ratifies AI-capex-on-faith, but the per-token-margin gate is not yet visible. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: no hyperscaler has yet disclosed per-token-margin-gated capex.

text_locales.en: Today's Mag-7 super-week close + AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% + $700B capex + Cerebras IPO mid-May supports `landing` (the Q3 hyperscaler capex-tier disclosure). Reason: the cohort tape ratifies AI-capex-on-faith, but the per-token-margin gate is not yet visible. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: no hyperscaler has yet disclosed per-token-margin-gated capex.
text_locales.ja: 本日のOpenAI売上テープ + AAPL Q3ガイダンス +14-17% + サービス別AI行なし + Cerebras IPO 5月中旬が `because`(開示書き換え力が形成)を支持。Reason: AAPL Q3ガイダンスが可視化開示先例の拡大、OpenAI売上形が依然不透明。Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: SECや買い手側からのAI売上開示フレームワークの公表が未だ。
text_locales.es: Tape de ingresos OpenAI + guía AAPL Q3 +14-17% + Services sin línea AI separada + IPO Cerebras de mediados de mayo de hoy apoyan `because` (fuerza de reescritura de divulgación se construye). Reason: la guía AAPL Q3 es el precedente de divulgación visible expandiéndose mientras la forma de ingresos OpenAI permanece opaca. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: ningún marco de divulgación de ingresos AI publicado por SEC o buyside todavía.
text_locales.fil: Ang OpenAI revenue tape + AAPL Q3 guide +14-17% + Services walang AI line + Cerebras IPO mid-May ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `because` (disclosure-rewrite force ay nabubuo). Reason: ang AAPL Q3 guide ay visible-disclosure precedent na lumalawak habang ang OpenAI revenue shape ay nananatiling opaque. Coherence 3/5. Remaining gap: walang SEC o buyside-published AI-revenue disclosure framework pa.

prediction_summary_locales.fil: **I-reset ng Mag 7 Q1 earnings (4/29-30) ang AI-capex ROI narrative — sa Q3 2026, may unang hyperscaler na publikong magta-tier ng AI capex sa pamamagitan ng token-margin gate.** Sa pinagsamang 2026 capex guidance mula sa Alphabet ($175B-$185B), Amazon (~$200B), Meta ($115B-$135B), at Microsoft (Azure-laggard rerating risk) na umaabot ng ~$650B-$700B kontra sa "AI ROI reality check" ng Wall Street, ang 4/29-30 prints ay maaaring magpatibay sa thesis ng **per-token-revenue exit-velocity** o magtigger ng multiple compression. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, hindi bababa sa isang Big-3 hyperscaler ang publikong **mag-gagate ng incremental GPU capex sa isang Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token-margin floor** — ito ang unang explicit na "AI infra ROI threshold" mula sa public cloud, na magtatapos sa 2024-2025 "spend or die" doctrine. Ang frontier-lab anchor deals (Google $40B / Anthropic, Amazon $25B / Anthropic, OpenAI $20B / Cerebras + Microsoft) ang magiging visible pressure relief valve.

nodes.description: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.**

description.en: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.**
description.ja: **Physical AI の SaaS 化と「Robot-as-a-Service」基盤競争** — Neura × AWS、DEEPX × Hyundai、NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos の相次ぐ提携は、**ロボット制御モデルの訓練パイプラインがクラウド側に集約** される方向性を示す。2026 Q3 にはロボット 1 台あたりのクラウド計算課金（訓練 + 同期シミュ + ポリシ更新）がエンタープライズ契約の既定項目となり、ロボット本体は「動くコンピュート終端」として商品コモディティ化、メーカは **フリート管理ソフトウェアの経常収益** へシフトする。

nodes.label: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours…
nodes.description: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** at Erlangen — on the production line, not a demo — is a clear graduation point from "humanoid = PoC." By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) will fold "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," and "MES / PLC integration" into de facto cuts. The competitive axis for Physical AI shifts entirely from "good-looking demo videos" to "ease of insertion into existing OT environments."

description.en: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** at Erlangen — on the production line, not a demo — is a clear graduation point from "humanoid = PoC." By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) will fold "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," and "MES / PLC integration" into de facto cuts. The competitive axis for Physical AI shifts entirely from "good-looking demo videos" to "ease of insertion into existing OT environments."
description.ja: **「Physical AI の 8 時間本番稼働」が 2026 後半のエンタープライズ調達条件に** — Siemens–Humanoid の HMND 01 Alpha が Erlangen で「デモではなく本番ライン」で **8 時間 / 90% 成功率 / 60 tote/h** を達成したことは、「ヒューマノイド = PoC」の段階からの明確な卒業点。2026 Q4 までに大手製造業（VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / トヨタ）の RFP から「24 時間連続稼働実績」「1 週間 MTBF」「90%+ 自律完了率」「既存 MES / PLC 統合」が事実上の足切り条件に組み込まれ、Physical AI の競争軸は「見栄えの良いデモ動画」から「既存 OT 環境への差し込み容易性」に完全に移る。

description.en: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** (60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+), BMW Spartanburg's **Figure 02** (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), BMW Leipzig's **AEON** (Apr 2026 trial → summer pilot), and GXO's **Digit** (100K+ totes) all hit the same window — and Hannover Messe 2026 making Physical AI its first central theme — the industry's evaluation criterion is shifting from "vendor-claimed demos" to **"OEM-adopted production records."** In H2 2026 at **IROS (October)** and **GTC Fall 2026**, league tables for "OEM adoption count × continuous-operation hours × parts handled × MTBF" begin, with Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five at the top. The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits.
description.ja: **「Physical AI 本番ライン稼働実績が IROS / GTC 2026 でのリーグテーブル化」を 2026 後半に開始** — Siemens Erlangen の **HMND 01 Alpha**（60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+）、BMW Spartanburg の **Figure 02**（10 ヶ月 / 30,000 台 / 9 万部品）、BMW Leipzig の **AEON**（Apr 2026 テスト → 夏パイロット）、GXO の **Digit**（10 万 tote 超）が同期間に並列達成し、Hannover Messe 2026 で物理 AI が「初の中心テーマ」となった事実は、業界が **「ベンダ自称デモ」→「OEM 採用本番稼働実績」** の評価基準シフトを始めたことを示す。2026 H2 の **IROS（10 月）** および **GTC Fall 2026** で「OEM 採用社数 × 連続稼働時間 × 部品稼働数 × MTBF」のリーグテーブル化が始まり、Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON の 5 強がベンチマーク上位を占める一方、PoC 段階から脱せない 30+ 社が 2026 Q4 中に資金枯渇 / 買収 / 撤退に追い込まれる。

bridges.text: Today's Apptronik exec-hire wave + Figure 03 1/hour autonomous overnight runs + Tesla / Boston Dynamics / SoftBank Roze trajectory supports the prediction's `landing` component (production-line records as the eval primitive). Reason: third-mover commercial deployment is now visible across four vendors and OEM-adopted records are emerging. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no IROS / GTC league-table publication formalizing the eval criterion yet.

text_locales.en: Today's Apptronik exec-hire wave + Figure 03 1/hour autonomous overnight runs + Tesla / Boston Dynamics / SoftBank Roze trajectory supports the prediction's `landing` component (production-line records as the eval primitive). Reason: third-mover commercial deployment is now visible across four vendors and OEM-adopted records are emerging. Coherence 4/5. text_locales.ja: 本日のSGLang CVE-2026-5760未パッチ + クロスサーバクラスのvLLM/LMDeploy/Spring AI/LiteLLM波及 + CSAI MITRE-CNA + CISA KEV(Linux Copy Fail)が `because`(OWASPクラス形成)を支持。Reason: named-technique + 未パッチCVE先例がロック済み。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026未公表;CISA KEV 5/1追加はLinuxカーネル、AI-infra固有ではない。
text_locales.es: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 sin parche + propagación cross-server class a vLLM/LMDeploy/Spring AI/LiteLLM + CSAI MITRE-CNA + CISA KEV (Linux Copy Fail) de hoy apoyan `because` (la clase OWASP se está formando). Reason: el precedente named-technique + CVE sin parche está bloqueado. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 aún no publicado; CISA KEV agregado del 1/5 fue kernel Linux, no AI-infra-específico.
text_locales.fil: Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 unpatched + cross-server class spread sa vLLM/LMDeploy/Spring AI/LiteLLM + CSAI MITRE-CNA + CISA KEV (Linux Copy Fail) ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `because` (OWASP class na nabubuo). Reason: ang named-technique + unpatched-CVE precedent ay locked-in. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 hindi pa publish; CISA KEV May 1 add ay Linux kernel, hindi AI-infra-specific.

nodes.label: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template — by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop …
nodes.description: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template — by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop a discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, replaced by fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Apr 27's Microsoft/OpenAI rewrite is no longer just about Azure exclusivity — it converts a binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk into a **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** and **multi-cloud distribution as the new default**. Google × Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one.

short_label.ja: AGI条項解消」がテンプレート化
short_label.es: El "deshilado de la cláusula AGI" sient…

description.en: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template — by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop a discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, replaced by fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Apr 27's Microsoft/OpenAI rewrite is no longer just about Azure exclusivity — it converts a binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk into a **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** and **multi-cloud distribution as the new default**. Google × Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one.
description.ja: **「AGI条項解消」がテンプレート化 — 2026年Q4までに少なくとももう1件の基盤モデルラボ × ハイパースケーラー契約が、裁量的な「能力トリガー」条項を破棄し、固定期限の収益シェア + 非独占的なクラウド配信に置き換えられる。** 4/27のMicrosoft / OpenAI再構築は単なるAzure独占の問題ではなく、二者択一の取締役会裁量によるIP消滅リスクを**カレンダーベースの収益キャップ(2030年)**と**マルチクラウド配信を新たなデフォルト**に変換した。Google × Anthropic の$40B / 5GW契約、Amazon × Anthropic の$5B + $25B / $100B AWSコミット、OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft、そして近日中に予定されているCerebras IPO($22B-$25B、5月中旬)はすべて同様の能力トリガー文言を含む。**2026年Q4までに、これらの契約のうち少なくとも1件が4/27のパターンを反映する形で公に再構築される** — 固定日付の収益キャップ、非独占ライセンス、マルチクラウド配信条項。「AGI」という語は形而上的概念ではなく、金融商品プリミティブとなる。
description.es: **El "deshilado de la cláusula AGI" sienta una plantilla — para Q4 2026 al menos otro contrato laboratorio-fundacional × hyperscaler se reformula públicamente para abandonar una cláusula discrecional de "gatillo de capacidad", reemplazada por reparto de ingresos con fecha fija + distribución multi-cloud no exclusiva.** La reescritura Microsoft / OpenAI del 27 abr ya no se trata sólo de exclusividad de Azure — convierte un riesgo binario, discrecional para el directorio, de revocación de PI en un **techo de ingresos basado en calendario (2030)** y **distribución multi-cloud como nuevo predeterminado**. El acuerdo Google × Anthropic de $40B / 5GW, el compromiso Amazon × Anthropic de $5B + $25B / $100B AWS, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, y la próxima IPO de Cerebras ($22B-$25B mediados de may) descansan sobre un lenguaje similar de gatillo de capacidad. **Para Q4 2026 veremos al menos uno de esos contratos públicamente reestructurado para reflejar el patrón del 27 abr** — techo de ingresos con fecha fija, licencia no exclusiva, cláusula de distribución multi-cloud. La palabra "AGI" se vuelve una primitiva de instrumento financiero, no una metafísica.
description.fil: **Ang "AGI-clause unwind" ay nagtatakda ng template — pagdating ng Q4 2026, may isa pang foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract na publicly amended para alisin ang isang discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, pinalitan ng fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Hindi na lang tungkol sa Azure exclusivity ang Apr 27 Microsoft / OpenAI rewrite — kino-convert nito ang binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk sa **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** at **multi-cloud distribution bilang bagong default**. Ang Google × Anthropic na $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic na $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, at ang papalapit na Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) lahat nakaupo sa parehong capability-trigger language. **Pagdating ng Q4 2026 makikita natin ang isa man lang sa mga kontratang ito na publicly restructured para tumugma sa pattern ng Apr 27** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. Magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI", hindi metaphysical.

summary.en: **The "AGI-clause unwind" sets a template — by Q4 2026 at least one other foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract is publicly amended to drop a discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, replaced by fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Apr 27's Microsoft/OpenAI rewrite is no longer just about Azure exclusivity — it converts a binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk into a **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** and **multi-cloud distribution as the new default**. Google × Anthropic's $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic's $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, and the upcoming Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) all sit on similar capability-trigger language. **By Q4 2026 we see at least one of those contracts publicly restructured to mirror Apr 27's pattern** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. The "AGI" word becomes a financial-instrument primitive, not a metaphysical one.
summary.ja: **「AGI条項解消」がテンプレート化 — 2026年Q4までに少なくとももう1件の基盤モデルラボ × ハイパースケーラー契約が、裁量的な「能力トリガー」条項を破棄し、固定期限の収益シェア + 非独占的なクラウド配信に置き換えられる。** 4/27のMicrosoft / OpenAI再構築は単なるAzure独占の問題ではなく、二者択一の取締役会裁量によるIP消滅リスクを**カレンダーベースの収益キャップ(2030年)**と**マルチクラウド配信を新たなデフォルト**に変換した。Google × Anthropic の$40B / 5GW契約、Amazon × Anthropic の$5B + $25B / $100B AWSコミット、OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft、そして近日中に予定されているCerebras IPO($22B-$25B、5月中旬)はすべて同様の能力トリガー文言を含む。**2026年Q4までに、これらの契約のうち少なくとも1件が4/27のパターンを反映する形で公に再構築される** — 固定日付の収益キャップ、非独占ライセンス、マルチクラウド配信条項。「AGI」という語は形而上的概念ではなく、金融商品プリミティブとなる。
summary.es: **El "deshilado de la cláusula AGI" sienta una plantilla — para Q4 2026 al menos otro contrato laboratorio-fundacional × hyperscaler se reformula públicamente para abandonar una cláusula discrecional de "gatillo de capacidad", reemplazada por reparto de ingresos con fecha fija + distribución multi-cloud no exclusiva.** La reescritura Microsoft / OpenAI del 27 abr ya no se trata sólo de exclusividad de Azure — convierte un riesgo binario, discrecional para el directorio, de revocación de PI en un **techo de ingresos basado en calendario (2030)** y **distribución multi-cloud como nuevo predeterminado**. El acuerdo Google × Anthropic de $40B / 5GW, el compromiso Amazon × Anthropic de $5B + $25B / $100B AWS, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, y la próxima IPO de Cerebras ($22B-$25B mediados de may) descansan sobre un lenguaje similar de gatillo de capacidad. **Para Q4 2026 veremos al menos uno de esos contratos públicamente reestructurado para reflejar el patrón del 27 abr** — techo de ingresos con fecha fija, licencia no exclusiva, cláusula de distribución multi-cloud. La palabra "AGI" se vuelve una primitiva de instrumento financiero, no una metafísica.
summary.fil: **Ang "AGI-clause unwind" ay nagtatakda ng template — pagdating ng Q4 2026, may isa pang foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract na publicly amended para alisin ang isang discretionary "capability-trigger" clause, pinalitan ng fixed-end revenue-share + non-exclusive cloud distribution.** Hindi na lang tungkol sa Azure exclusivity ang Apr 27 Microsoft / OpenAI rewrite — kino-convert nito ang binary, board-discretionary IP-revocation risk sa **calendar-bound revenue cap (2030)** at **multi-cloud distribution bilang bagong default**. Ang Google × Anthropic na $40B / 5GW deal, Amazon × Anthropic na $5B + $25B / $100B AWS commit, OpenAI × Cerebras + Microsoft, at ang papalapit na Cerebras IPO ($22B-$25B mid-May) lahat nakaupo sa parehong capability-trigger language. **Pagdating ng Q4 2026 makikita natin ang isa man lang sa mga kontratang ito na publicly restructured para tumugma sa pattern ng Apr 27** — fixed-date revenue cap, non-exclusive license, multi-cloud distribution clause. Magiging financial-instrument primitive ang salitang "AGI", hindi metaphysical.

nodes.label: **Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs…
nodes.short_label: Powell's decision to stay on the Federa…
nodes.description: **Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility — by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language.** Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2.
