description.en: **Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility — by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language.** Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2.
description.ja: **Powell が 2028年まで FRB 理事会に残留する決定 + 4/29 の 8-4 反対(1992年10月以降最多)+ 5/1 4 月雇用統計(5/15 議長交代窓口の入口)の組み合わせで、2026年金融政策の市場心理は「金利ボラ」から「制度ボラ」へシフトする — 2026 Q4 までに Warsh 議長下の FOMC は金利議題で反対 2 名以下の通常範囲に戻るが、Powell-Warsh の対立は FRB 調査ガバナンス問題のスイングボートとなり、株式市場の AI 設備投資再格付けイベントは FOMC 声明文よりも理事会シグナルに敏感になる。** 4/29 は 1992年以来初の 4 反対 FOMC、Powell の理事残留は 1948年以降前例なし、Warsh は同日に上院銀行委員会で承認、本会議採決は 5/15 までに予定。4/30 の Mag 7 月間相場(2020年以来最大)は FOMC 反対姿勢が裏付けていない利下げ期待を一部織り込んでおり、5/1 雇用統計が市場予想 13.5 万人(3月 17.8 万人から減速)で出れば、議長交代窓口に入る最初の弱含みデータとなる。Powell は 4/29 に「shadow chair にはならない」と明言したが、Warsh 議長下で Powell が反対理事として 7 名理事会に座る制度的事実が、金利ではなく FRB 独立性問題でその力学を生む。市場は 2026 H2 を通じて金利ボラを縮小し、制度リスクプレミアムを拡大する価格付けに動く。
description.es: **(No tech) La decisión de Powell de seguir en la Junta de la Fed hasta 2028 + la disensión 8-4 del 29/abr (la mayor desde octubre de 1992) + el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may al inicio de la ventana de relevo del 15/may desplaza la psicología del mercado de política monetaria de 2026 de "volatilidad de tipos" a "volatilidad institucional" — para el Q4 de 2026 el FOMC bajo Warsh como presidente vuelve a una norma de menor disensión (≤2) en decisiones de tipos, pero el desacuerdo Powell-Warsh sobre la gobernanza de la investigación a la Fed se convierte en el voto pivote en cualquier cuestión de independencia de la Fed; los eventos de re-rating del capex AI en bolsa se vuelven más sensibles a las señales de la Junta que al lenguaje del comunicado del FOMC.** El 29/abr fue el primer FOMC con 4 disidentes desde 1992; la permanencia de Powell en la Junta es inédita desde 1948; Warsh fue confirmado por el Comité Bancario del Senado el 29/abr con votación plenaria prevista antes del 15/may; el tape mensual del 30/abr de los Mag 7 (mejor mes desde 2020) está parcialmente puesto en precio sobre expectativas de bajadas de tipos que la postura disidente del FOMC aún no valida; el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may en consenso 135 K (vs 178 K de marzo) es el primer dato más débil dentro de la ventana de relevo. El rótulo "Powell como shadow chair" fue específicamente rechazado por Powell el 29/abr ("no seré un shadow chair"), pero la realidad institucional de una Junta de 7 miembros con Powell como gobernador disidente bajo un presidente Warsh genera exactamente esa dinámica en cuestiones de independencia, aunque no en tipos. Los mercados comprimirán el precio de la volatilidad de tipos e inflarán el precio del riesgo institucional a lo largo de H2 2026.
description.fil: **Ang desisyon ni Powell na manatili sa Federal Reserve Board hanggang 2028 + ang Apr 29 8-4 dissent (pinakamataas mula Oct-1992) + ang May 1 Apr-jobs print sa harap ng May 15 Chair handoff window ay magbabago ng 2026 monetary-policy market psychology mula rate-volatility patungong institutional-volatility — pagdating ng Q4 2026 babalik ang FOMC sa ilalim ni Warsh sa smaller-dissent norm (≤2) sa rate calls pero ang Powell-Warsh disagreement sa Fed-investigation governance ang magiging marginal swing-vote sa anumang Fed-independence question; mas magiging sensitibo ang equity-market AI-capex re-rating events sa Fed-Board signaling kaysa sa FOMC statement language.** Ang Apr 29 ang unang 4-dissenter FOMC mula 1992; ang Powell-staying-on-Board ay walang precedent mula 1948; nakumpirma si Warsh sa Senate Banking noong Apr 29 na may full-Senate vote bago ang May 15; ang Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (pinakamagandang buwan mula 2020) ay partly priced sa rate-cut hopes na hindi pa na-validate ng FOMC dissent posture; ang May 1 Apr jobs print sa consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) ang unang weakening data papasok sa handoff window. Ang "Powell as shadow chair" framing ay tinanggihan ni Powell sa Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") pero ang institutional reality ng 7-member Board na may Powell bilang dissenting governor sa ilalim ni Warsh chair ay gumagawa eksakto ng dynamic na iyon sa Fed-independence questions, kahit hindi sa rates. Pipilitin ng markets na liitin ang rate-volatility pricing at palakihin ang institutional-risk pricing sa buong H2 2026.

summary.en: **Powell's decision to stay on the Federal Reserve Board through 2028 + the Apr 29 8-4 dissent (highest since Oct-1992) + the May 1 Apr-jobs print at the front of the May 15 Chair handoff window shifts 2026 monetary-policy market psychology from rate-volatility to institutional-volatility — by Q4 2026 the FOMC under Warsh as Chair reverts to a smaller-dissent norm (≤2) on rate calls but the Powell-Warsh disagreement on Fed-investigation governance becomes the marginal swing-vote on any Fed-independence question; equity-market AI-capex re-rating events become more sensitive to Fed-Board signaling than to FOMC statement language.** Apr 29 was the first 4-dissenter FOMC since 1992; Powell-staying-on-Board is unprecedented since 1948; Warsh confirmed by Senate Banking on Apr 29 with full-Senate vote scheduled before May 15; Apr 30 Mag-7 monthly tape (best month since 2020) is partially priced on rate-cut hopes that the FOMC dissent posture has not yet validated; May 1 Apr jobs print at the consensus 135K (vs 178K Mar) is the first weakening data into the handoff window. The "Powell as shadow chair" framing was specifically rejected by Powell on Apr 29 ("I won't be a shadow chair") but the institutional reality of a 7-member Board with Powell as a dissenting governor under a Warsh chair creates exactly that dynamic on Fed-independence questions, even if not on rates. Markets will compress rate-volatility pricing and inflate institutional-risk pricing through 2026 H2.
summary.ja: **Powell が 2028年まで FRB 理事会に残留する決定 + 4/29 の 8-4 反対(1992年10月以降最多)+ 5/1 4 月雇用統計(5/15 議長交代窓口の入口)の組み合わせで、2026年金融政策の市場心理は「金利ボラ」から「制度ボラ」へシフトする — 2026 Q4 までに Warsh 議長下の FOMC は金利議題で反対 2 名以下の通常範囲に戻るが、Powell-Warsh の対立は FRB 調査ガバナンス問題のスイングボートとなり、株式市場の AI 設備投資再格付けイベントは FOMC 声明文よりも理事会シグナルに敏感になる。** 4/29 は 1992年以来初の 4 反対 FOMC、Powell の理事残留は 1948年以降前例なし、Warsh は同日に上院銀行委員会で承認、本会議採決は 5/15 までに予定。4/30 の Mag 7 月間相場(2020年以来最大)は FOMC 反対姿勢が裏付けていない利下げ期待を一部織り込んでおり、5/1 雇用統計が市場予想 13.5 万人(3月 17.8 万人から減速)で出れば、議長交代窓口に入る最初の弱含みデータとなる。Powell は 4/29 に「shadow chair にはならない」と明言したが、Warsh 議長下で Powell が反対理事として 7 名理事会に座る制度的事実が、金利ではなく FRB 独立性問題でその力学を生む。市場は 2026 H2 を通じて金利ボラを縮小し、制度リスクプレミアムを拡大する価格付けに動く。
summary.es: **(No tech) La decisión de Powell de seguir en la Junta de la Fed hasta 2028 + la disensión 8-4 del 29/abr (la mayor desde octubre de 1992) + el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may al inicio de la ventana de relevo del 15/may desplaza la psicología del mercado de política monetaria de 2026 de "volatilidad de tipos" a "volatilidad institucional" — para el Q4 de 2026 el FOMC bajo Warsh como presidente vuelve a una norma de menor disensión (≤2) en decisiones de tipos, pero el desacuerdo Powell-Warsh sobre la gobernanza de la investigación a la Fed se convierte en el voto pivote en cualquier cuestión de independencia de la Fed; los eventos de re-rating del capex AI en bolsa se vuelven más sensibles a las señales de la Junta que al lenguaje del comunicado del FOMC.** El 29/abr fue el primer FOMC con 4 disidentes desde 1992; la permanencia de Powell en la Junta es inédita desde 1948; Warsh fue confirmado por el Comité Bancario del Senado el 29/abr con votación plenaria prevista antes del 15/may; el tape mensual del 30/abr de los Mag 7 (mejor mes desde 2020) está parcialmente puesto en precio sobre expectativas de bajadas de tipos que la postura disidente del FOMC aún no valida; el dato de empleo de abril del 1/may en consenso 135 K (vs 178 K de marzo) es el primer dato más débil dentro de la ventana de relevo. El rótulo "Powell como shadow chair" fue específicamente rechazado por Powell el 29/abr ("no seré un shadow chair"), pero la realidad institucional de una Junta de 7 miembros con Powell como gobernador disidente bajo un presidente Warsh genera exactamente esa dinámica en cuestiones de independencia, aunque no en tipos. Los mercados comprimirán el precio de la volatilidad de tipos e inflarán el precio del riesgo institucional a lo largo de H2 2026.

text_locales.ja: 本日の ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法 + CSAI MITRE-CNA + Microsoft Agent 365 tools-management allow/block + 今後の Anthropic Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI Agent 365 統合は `so_that`(サブマトリックス着地)を支持する。理由: マトリックス層出荷済み + allow/block 基本機能が施行サーフェス; 今後のローカル・エージェント統合がコーディング・エージェントへ施行サーフェスを拡張。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: 主要スキル・マーケットプレイスはまだ強制署名 + 出所ゲートを出荷していない。
text_locales.es: Técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 + CSAI MITRE-CNA + Microsoft Agent 365 tools-management allow/block + próximas integraciones Anthropic Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI Agent 365 apoya `so_that` (sub-matriz aterriza). Razón: capa matriz entregada + primitivo allow/block es la superficie enforcement; las próximas integraciones agente-local extienden la superficie enforcement a coding agents. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ningún marketplace de skills mayor ha entregado gate enforced signing + provenance.
text_locales.fil: Today's ATT&CK v19 named-techniques + CSAI MITRE-CNA + Microsoft Agent 365 tools-management allow/block + upcoming Anthropic Claude Code + GitHub Copilot CLI Agent 365 integrations ay nag-su-suporta sa `so_that` (sub-matrix lands). Reason: matrix layer shipped + allow/block primitive ay ang enforcement surface; ang upcoming local-agent integrations ay nag-e-extend sa enforcement surface sa coding agents. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: walang major skill marketplace na nag-shi-ship ng enforced signing + provenance gate.

Reason: la predicción espera una segunda señal de enmienda Q4 que no ha aterrizado. Coherence 1/5. Remaining gap: ningún segundo contrato laboratorio fundación × hyperscaler enmendado públicamente.

Reason: ang prediction ay umaasa sa Q4 second-amendment signal na hindi pa lumalapit. Coherence 1/5. Remaining gap: walang second foundation-lab × hyperscaler contract na publicly amended.

nodes.title: Two more frontier labs publish autonomous-weapons carve-outs by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **The May 1 Pentagon-snubs-Anthropic + 7-vendor classified-network AI deal becomes the first US presidential-administration vs frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons-use line in the sand — by Q3 2026 at least two other frontier labs (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) explicitly publish a use-of-force / autonomous-weapons carve-out in their public ToS or DoD bid responses; Anthropic's federal-judge-blocked Trump-admin freeze (April CA ruling) becomes the operative procurement-law precedent; Q3 earnings calls add an "autonomous-weapons exposure" disclosure line for the cohort.** Forcing function is litigation precedent: the federal-judge block already exists, so any future DoD freeze action against a competing lab now has a court-tested predicate. Trump's "deal is possible" framing on Apr 17 + the May 1 contract signings are the carrot-and-stick choreography; once a deal-or-no-deal binary becomes visible to the buyside, capital-allocation pressure will force every frontier-lab board to formally adopt either the Anthropic posture (carve-out, accept exclusion) or the OpenAI/Microsoft/Google posture (no carve-out, accept full DoD use). The middle position becomes untenable as soon as Q3 earnings cycle starts.

Trump's "deal is possible" framing on Apr 17 + the May 1 contract signings are the carrot-and-stick choreography; once a deal-or-no-deal binary becomes visible to the buyside, capital-allocation pressure will force every frontier-lab board to formally adopt either the Anthropic posture (carve-out, accept exclusion) or the OpenAI/Microsoft/Google posture (no carve-out, accept full DoD use). The middle position becomes untenable as soon as Q3 earnings cycle starts.
description.ja: **5月1日の「国防総省が Anthropic を排除し7社契約」が、米大統領政権とフロンティアAI研究所との自律兵器使用をめぐる初の一線となる。2026年第3四半期までに少なくとも他の2つのフロンティア研究所(Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere)が公開 ToS または DoD 入札回答に武力使用・自律兵器の除外条項を明示。Anthropic の連邦判事差し止め(4月CA判決)がトランプ政権凍結措置の作動可能な調達法上の前例となる。第3四半期決算電話会議で「自律兵器エクスポージャー」開示行が業界全体に追加される。** 強制要因は判例。連邦判事差し止め判決が既に存在するため、競合研究所への将来の DoD 凍結措置は法廷検証済みの前提を持つ。トランプ氏の4月17日「合意は可能」と5月1日の契約締結はアメとムチの振付け。買い手側に「合意するかしないか」が二者択一として可視化された瞬間、資本配分圧力により全フロンティア研究所の取締役会が Anthropic 路線(除外条項 + 排除受容)か OpenAI/Microsoft/Google 路線(除外条項なし + DoD全使用受容)を正式採択せざるを得なくなる。第3四半期決算サイクル開始と同時に中間ポジションが維持不可能になる。
description.es: **El "Pentágono excluye a Anthropic" del 1 de mayo + acuerdo de IA de 7 proveedores se convierte en la primera línea presidencial de EE. UU. vs laboratorio frontera de IA sobre uso en armas autónomas — para el Q3 2026 al menos otros dos laboratorios frontera (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) publican explícitamente un carve-out de uso de fuerza/armas autónomas en sus ToS públicos o respuestas a licitaciones del DoD; la congelación de la administración Trump bloqueada por juez federal de Anthropic (sentencia CA de abril) se convierte en el precedente de derecho de adquisición operativo; las llamadas de resultados del Q3 añaden una línea de divulgación de "exposición a armas autónomas" para la cohorte.** El forzamiento es el precedente litigioso: el bloqueo del juez federal ya existe, así que cualquier acción futura de congelación del DoD contra un laboratorio competidor ahora tiene un predicado verificado en tribunales. La narrativa "deal is possible" de Trump del 17 de abril + las firmas del 1 de mayo son la coreografía zanahoria-y-palo; una vez que el binario hay-acuerdo-o-no-acuerdo se hace visible al lado comprador, la presión de asignación de capital obligará a cada consejo de laboratorio frontera a adoptar formalmente o la postura Anthropic (carve-out, aceptar exclusión) o la postura OpenAI/Microsoft/Google (sin carve-out, aceptar uso completo del DoD). La posición intermedia se vuelve insostenible tan pronto comience el ciclo de resultados del Q3.
description.fil: **Ang May 1 Pentagon-snubs-Anthropic + 7-vendor classified-network AI deal ay magiging unang US presidential-administration-vs-frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons-use line in the sand — sa Q3 2026, kahit dalawa pang frontier labs (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) ay explicitly maglalabas ng use-of-force / autonomous-weapons carve-out sa public ToS o DoD bid responses; ang Anthropic federal-judge-blocked Trump-admin freeze (April CA ruling) ay magiging operative procurement-law precedent; magdadagdag ang Q3 earnings calls ng "autonomous-weapons exposure" disclosure line para sa cohort.** Ang forcing function ay litigation precedent: existing na ang federal-judge block, kaya anumang future DoD freeze action laban sa kakumpitensyang lab ngayon ay may court-tested predicate. Ang "deal is possible" framing ni Trump noong April 17 + ang May 1 contract signings ang carrot-and-stick choreography; sa sandaling mag-binary ang deal-or-no-deal sa buyside, ipipilit ng capital-allocation pressure sa bawat frontier-lab board na pormal na adopt ang Anthropic posture (carve-out, accept exclusion) o ang OpenAI/Microsoft/Google posture (no carve-out, accept full DoD use). Hindi na maitatago ang gitnang posisyon sa simula pa lang ng Q3 earnings cycle.

summary.en: **The May 1 Pentagon-snubs-Anthropic + 7-vendor classified-network AI deal becomes the first US presidential-administration vs frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons-use line in the sand — by Q3 2026 at least two other frontier labs (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) explicitly publish a use-of-force / autonomous-weapons carve-out in their public ToS or DoD bid responses; Anthropic's federal-judge-blocked Trump-admin freeze (April CA ruling) becomes the operative procurement-law precedent; Q3 earnings calls add an "autonomous-weapons exposure" disclosure line for the cohort.** Forcing function is litigation precedent: the federal-judge block already exists, so any future DoD freeze action against a competing lab now has a court-tested predicate. Trump's "deal is possible" framing on Apr 17 + the May 1 contract signings are the carrot-and-stick choreography; once a deal-or-no-deal binary becomes visible to the buyside, capital-allocation pressure will force every frontier-lab board to formally adopt either the Anthropic posture (carve-out, accept exclusion) or the OpenAI/Microsoft/Google posture (no carve-out, accept full DoD use). The middle position becomes untenable as soon as Q3 earnings cycle starts.

detail.summary_short: The May 1 Pentagon-Anthropic split is the first US-administration vs frontier-lab line on autonomous-weapons use. By Q3 2026 ≥2 other frontier labs publish carve-outs in ToS or DoD bid responses, and Q3 earnings calls add an autonomous-weapons exposure disclosure line for the cohort.

summary_short_locales.en: The May 1 Pentagon-Anthropic split is the first US-administration vs frontier-lab line on autonomous-weapons use. By Q3 2026 ≥2 other frontier labs publish carve-outs in ToS or DoD bid responses, and Q3 earnings calls add an autonomous-weapons exposure disclosure line for the cohort.
summary_short_locales.ja: 5/1のペンタゴン-Anthropic分裂は米政権 vs フロンティア研究所の自律兵器使用を巡る初の一線。Q3 2026までに≥2社が公開ToSまたはDoD入札回答で除外条項を明示し、Q3決算電話で「自律兵器エクスポージャー」開示行が業界全体に追加される。
summary_short_locales.es: La división Pentágono-Anthropic del 1 mayo es la primera línea Administración-EE. UU. vs laboratorio frontera sobre uso en armas autónomas. Para el Q3 2026, ≥2 laboratorios frontera publican carve-outs en ToS o respuestas DoD, y las llamadas Q3 añaden una línea de divulgación de "exposición a armas autónomas" para la cohorte.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang May 1 Pentagon-Anthropic split ang unang US-administration vs frontier-lab line sa autonomous-weapons use. Sa Q3 2026, ≥2 frontier labs ay magpa-publish ng carve-outs sa ToS o DoD bid responses, at magdadagdag ang Q3 earnings calls ng "autonomous-weapons exposure" disclosure line para sa cohort.

bridges.text: Today's Pentagon 8-vendor list with Oracle added + Anthropic 6-month sunset + NSA Project Aether (NSA still uses Mythos despite blacklist) + today's prediction #2 (frontier cyber-AI export-control category by Q3 2026) supports `landing` (frontier labs publish autonomous-weapons carve-outs). Reason: the Pentagon-Anthropic posture is now visible at 8-vendor scale, and the BIS export-control framework would force every frontier lab to formalize the carve-out posture; the carve-out shape is starting to be defined by Glasswing-style gated distribution. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no second frontier lab has yet publicly published an autonomous-weapons carve-out beyond Anthropic.

text_locales.en: Today's Pentagon 8-vendor list with Oracle added + Anthropic 6-month sunset + NSA Project Aether (NSA still uses Mythos despite blacklist) + today's prediction #2 (frontier cyber-AI export-control category by Q3 2026) supports `landing` (frontier labs publish autonomous-weapons carve-outs). Reason: the Pentagon-Anthropic posture is now visible at 8-vendor scale, and the BIS export-control framework would force every frontier lab to formalize the carve-out posture; the carve-out shape is starting to be defined by Glasswing-style gated distribution. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no second frontier lab has yet publicly published an autonomous-weapons carve-out beyond Anthropic.
text_locales.ja: 本日の Microsoft Agent 365 が $15/user(ユーザー単価エージェント・コントロール開示単位)+ AAPL Q3 +14-17% ガイダンス + Cerebras IPO 5月中旬 + 本日の予測 #3(SEC AI 売上コンセプト・リリース Q4 2026)+ AMD 5月5日 OpenAI 6GW H2 初期配備は `landing`(Q4 コホート開示ウィンドウ)を支持する。理由: $15/user は開示前例単位としての初のユーザー単価エージェント・コントロールプレーン価格 + AMD の H2 OpenAI 6GW コミットがトークン単価マージン階層化アンカー + 本日の予測 #3 が運用上の SEC エスカレーション。Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: 監査済み月次 AI-KPI 10-Q 脚注を公開した Big-3 ハイパースケーラーはまだなし。
text_locales.es: Microsoft Agent 365 a $15/user (per-user agent-control disclosure unit) + AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide + Cerebras IPO mid-May + predicción hoy #3 (SEC AI-revenue concept release Q4 2026) + AMD May 5 OpenAI 6GW H2 first-deployment apoya `landing` (ventana Q4 cohort disclosure). Razón: $15/user es el primer per-user agent-control-plane price como unidad disclosure-precedent + commit H2 OpenAI 6GW de AMD como ancla per-token-margin-gating + #3 hoy es la escalada SEC operativa. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: ningún Big-3 hyperscaler ha publicado footnote 10-Q con audited monthly AI-KPI.
text_locales.fil: Today's Microsoft Agent 365 priced sa $15/user (per-user agent-control disclosure unit) + AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide + Cerebras IPO mid-May + today's prediction #3 (SEC AI-revenue concept release Q4 2026) + AMD May 5 OpenAI 6GW H2 first-deployment ay nag-su-suporta sa `landing` (Q4 cohort disclosure window). Reason: $15/user ay ang first per-user agent-control-plane price bilang disclosure-precedent unit + AMD's H2 OpenAI 6GW commit bilang per-token-margin-gating anchor + today's prediction #3 ay ang operative SEC escalation. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: walang Big-3 hyperscaler na nag-publish ng audited monthly AI-KPI 10-Q footnote.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **The May 1 Pentagon-snubs-Anthropic + 7-vendor classified-network AI deal becomes the first US presidential-administration vs frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons-use line in the sand — by Q3 2026 at least two other frontier labs (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) explicitly publish a use-of-force / autonomous-weapons carve-out in their public ToS or DoD bid responses; Anthropic's federal-judge-blocked Trump-admin freeze (April CA ruling) becomes the operative procurement-law precedent; Q3 earnings calls add an "autonomous-weapons exposure" disclosure line for the cohort.** Forcing function is litigation precedent: the federal-judge block already exists, so any future DoD freeze action against a competing lab now has a court-tested predicate. Trump's "deal is possible" framing on Apr 17 + the May 1 contract signings are the carrot-and-stick choreography; once a deal-or-no-deal binary becomes visible to the buyside, capital-allocation pressure will force every frontier-lab board to formally adopt either the Anthropic posture (carve-out, accept exclusion) or the OpenAI/Microsoft/Google posture (no carve-out, accept full DoD use). The middle position becomes untenable as soon as Q3 earnings cycle starts.
detail.prediction_summary: **The May 1 Pentagon-snubs-Anthropic + 7-vendor classified-network AI deal becomes the first US presidential-administration vs frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons-use line in the sand — by Q3 2026 at least two other frontier labs (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) explicitly publish a use-of-force / autonomous-weapons carve-out in their public ToS or DoD bid responses; Anthropic's federal-judge-blocked Trump-admin freeze (April CA ruling) becomes the operative procurement-law precedent; Q3 earnings calls add an "autonomous-weapons exposure" disclosure line for the cohort.** Forcing function is litigation precedent: the federal-judge block already exists, so any future DoD freeze action against a competing lab now has a court-tested predicate. Trump's "deal is possible" framing on Apr 17 + the May 1 contract signings are the carrot-and-stick choreography; once a deal-or-no-deal binary becomes visible to the buyside, capital-allocation pressure will force every frontier-lab board to formally adopt either the Anthropic posture (carve-out, accept exclusion) or the OpenAI/Microsoft/Google posture (no carve-out, accept full DoD use). The middle position becomes untenable as soon as Q3 earnings cycle starts.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **The May 1 Pentagon-snubs-Anthropic + 7-vendor classified-network AI deal becomes the first US presidential-administration vs frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons-use line in the sand — by Q3 2026 at least two other frontier labs (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) explicitly publish a use-of-force / autonomous-weapons carve-out in their public ToS or DoD bid responses; Anthropic's federal-judge-blocked Trump-admin freeze (April CA ruling) becomes the operative procurement-law precedent; Q3 earnings calls add an "autonomous-weapons exposure" disclosure line for the cohort.** Forcing function is litigation precedent: the federal-judge block already exists, so any future DoD freeze action against a competing lab now has a court-tested predicate. Trump's "deal is possible" framing on Apr 17 + the May 1 contract signings are the carrot-and-stick choreography; once a deal-or-no-deal binary becomes visible to the buyside, capital-allocation pressure will force every frontier-lab board to formally adopt either the Anthropic posture (carve-out, accept exclusion) or the OpenAI/Microsoft/Google posture (no carve-out, accept full DoD use). The middle position becomes untenable as soon as Q3 earnings cycle starts.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **5月1日の「国防総省が Anthropic を排除し7社契約」が、米大統領政権とフロンティアAI研究所との自律兵器使用をめぐる初の一線となる。2026年第3四半期までに少なくとも他の2つのフロンティア研究所(Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere)が公開 ToS または DoD 入札回答に武力使用・自律兵器の除外条項を明示。Anthropic の連邦判事差し止め(4月CA判決)がトランプ政権凍結措置の作動可能な調達法上の前例となる。第3四半期決算電話会議で「自律兵器エクスポージャー」開示行が業界全体に追加される。** 強制要因は判例。連邦判事差し止め判決が既に存在するため、競合研究所への将来の DoD 凍結措置は法廷検証済みの前提を持つ。トランプ氏の4月17日「合意は可能」と5月1日の契約締結はアメとムチの振付け。買い手側に「合意するかしないか」が二者択一として可視化された瞬間、資本配分圧力により全フロンティア研究所の取締役会が Anthropic 路線(除外条項 + 排除受容)か OpenAI/Microsoft/Google 路線(除外条項なし + DoD全使用受容)を正式採択せざるを得なくなる。第3四半期決算サイクル開始と同時に中間ポジションが維持不可能になる。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El "Pentágono excluye a Anthropic" del 1 de mayo + acuerdo de IA de 7 proveedores se convierte en la primera línea presidencial de EE. UU. vs laboratorio frontera de IA sobre uso en armas autónomas — para el Q3 2026 al menos otros dos laboratorios frontera (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) publican explícitamente un carve-out de uso de fuerza/armas autónomas en sus ToS públicos o respuestas a licitaciones del DoD; la congelación de la administración Trump bloqueada por juez federal de Anthropic (sentencia CA de abril) se convierte en el precedente de derecho de adquisición operativo; las llamadas de resultados del Q3 añaden una línea de divulgación de "exposición a armas autónomas" para la cohorte.** El forzamiento es el precedente litigioso: el bloqueo del juez federal ya existe, así que cualquier acción futura de congelación del DoD contra un laboratorio competidor ahora tiene un predicado verificado en tribunales. La narrativa "deal is possible" de Trump del 17 de abril + las firmas del 1 de mayo son la coreografía zanahoria-y-palo; una vez que el binario hay-acuerdo-o-no-acuerdo se hace visible al lado comprador, la presión de asignación de capital obligará a cada consejo de laboratorio frontera a adoptar formalmente o la postura Anthropic (carve-out, aceptar exclusión) o la postura OpenAI/Microsoft/Google (sin carve-out, aceptar uso completo del DoD). La posición intermedia se vuelve insostenible tan pronto comience el ciclo de resultados del Q3.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang May 1 Pentagon-snubs-Anthropic + 7-vendor classified-network AI deal ay magiging unang US presidential-administration-vs-frontier-AI-lab autonomous-weapons-use line in the sand — sa Q3 2026, kahit dalawa pang frontier labs (Mistral, OpenAI, xAI, Google DeepMind, Inflection-2026, Cohere) ay explicitly maglalabas ng use-of-force / autonomous-weapons carve-out sa public ToS o DoD bid responses; ang Anthropic federal-judge-blocked Trump-admin freeze (April CA ruling) ay magiging operative procurement-law precedent; magdadagdag ang Q3 earnings calls ng "autonomous-weapons exposure" disclosure line para sa cohort.** Ang forcing function ay litigation precedent: existing na ang federal-judge block, kaya anumang future DoD freeze action laban sa kakumpitensyang lab ngayon ay may court-tested predicate. Ang "deal is possible" framing ni Trump noong April 17 + ang May 1 contract signings ang carrot-and-stick choreography; sa sandaling mag-binary ang deal-or-no-deal sa buyside, ipipilit ng capital-allocation pressure sa bawat frontier-lab board na pormal na adopt ang Anthropic posture (carve-out, accept exclusion) o ang OpenAI/Microsoft/Google posture (no carve-out, accept full DoD use). Hindi na maitatago ang gitnang posisyon sa simula pa lang ng Q3 earnings cycle.

nodes.title: Mag-7 physical-AI capex segments split out in a 10-Q footnote by H2 2026
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles.

title.en: Mag-7 physical-AI capex segments split out in a 10-Q footnote by H2 2026
title.ja: H2 2026までに Mag-7 が10-Q 脚注で physical-AI 設備投資セグメントを切り分け
title.es: Capex físico-AI Mag-7 separados en nota 10-Q para H2 2026
title.fil: Mag-7 physical-AI capex segments mag-split out sa 10-Q footnote by H2 2026

description.en: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles.
description.ja: **2026年下半期までに、Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus 量産ライン構築(レガシー Model S + Model X ラインが段階的に廃止され、年100万台公称の第一世代ロボット工場へ; Optimus 3 が2026年夏に $20K-$30K でローンチ、本年は数百台、2027-2028年にかけて数千・数万台へ漸増)+ 4月28日 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo 製造パートナーシップ + Figure 03 毎時1台量産・夜間完全自律稼働 + Tesla CFO の EV-ロボティクス間設備投資配分コメンタリー相場が、少なくとも1社の Mag-7(Tesla を皮切りに; ≥1 兄弟 — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft)に SEC 義務化前に10-Q で physical-AI 設備投資を別個セグメントまたは脚注として公開させる。これは2014-2015年に SEC が形式化する前に自主公開されたクラウド・セグメント開示と同様のパターン。** 強制要因は開示前例の拡大。クラウド設備投資セグメンテーションは金額が買い手側注意閾値を越えた時点で標準となった。Tesla 年100万台公称(価格目標で年率 ~$25B-$35B)での physical-AI 設備投資は単一施設でその閾値を越え、Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics 商業展開軌道の上に重なる。Q2 量産ライン構築 + Optimus 3 夏ローンチが意味するのは、2026年9月30日終了期間 Tesla 10-Q が初の自然な開示舞台となること。単一の Tesla 脚注開示からの競争圧力で、1-2 件の決算サイクル以内に兄弟 Mag-7 開示が引き寄せられる。
description.es: **Para el H2 2026 la construcción línea de producción Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus (líneas heredadas Model S + Model X siendo eliminadas gradualmente para una planta de robótica de primera generación de capacidad nominal 1M-unidades/año; Optimus 3 lanza verano 2026 a $20K-$30K con cientos de unidades en 2026 aumentando a miles luego decenas de miles para 2027-2028) + el partnership manufactura Apollo Apptronik + Jabil del 28 abril + producción Figure 03 a 1/hora con corridas autónomas nocturnas + tape comentario CFO Tesla sobre asignación capex entre EV y robótica forzará a al menos un Mag-7 (Tesla inicialmente; ≥1 hermana — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) a publicar capex físico-AI como segmento separado o nota en 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato SEC, reflejando cómo divulgación de segmento cloud fue primero publicada voluntariamente en 2014-2015 antes de que la SEC lo formalizara.** La función forzante es la expansión de precedente de divulgación: segmentación capex cloud se volvió estándar una vez que las cantidades en dólares cruzaron un umbral de atención buyside; capex físico-AI a la capacidad nominal Tesla 1M-unidades/año (~$25B-$35B anualizado al precio target) cruza ese umbral en una sola facilidad, superpuesto a trayectoria despliegue comercial Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics. La construcción línea-producción Q2 más el lanzamiento Optimus 3 verano significan que Tesla 10-Q para el período terminando 30 sept 2026 es el venue natural de primera divulgación; presión competitiva desde una sola divulgación nota Tesla atraerá una divulgación Mag-7 hermana dentro de uno o dos ciclos de presentación.
description.fil: **By H2 2026 ang Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines na unti-unting tinatanggal para sa 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 ay mag-la-launch summer 2026 sa $20K-$30K na may daan-daang units sa 2026 na nag-ra-ramp up patungong libu-libo tapos sampu-sampung libo by 2027-2028) + ang Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production sa 1/hour na may overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary sa capex-allocation sa pagitan ng EV at robotics tape ay magpi-pilit sa at least isang Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) na magpa-publish ng physical-AI capex bilang separate segment o footnote sa 10-Q bago ang anumang SEC mandate, mirroring kung paano ang cloud-segment disclosure ay unang pinupublish nang voluntarily noong 2014-2015 bago iyon na-formalize ng SEC.** Ang forcing function ay ang disclosure-precedent expansion: naging standard ang cloud capex segmentation sa sandaling lumampas ang dollar amounts sa buyside-attention threshold; ang physical-AI capex sa Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized sa price target) ay lumampas sa threshold na iyon sa isang facility lamang, layered sa Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. Ang Q2 production-line build-out plus ang Optimus 3 summer launch ay nangangahulugan na ang Tesla 10-Q para sa period ending Sept 30 2026 ang natural na first disclosure venue; competitive pressure mula sa isang Tesla footnote disclosure ay magha-hatak ng sibling Mag-7 disclosure sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles.

summary.en: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles.
detail.prediction_summary: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年下半期までに、Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus 量産ライン構築(レガシー Model S + Model X ラインが段階的に廃止され、年100万台公称の第一世代ロボット工場へ; Optimus 3 が2026年夏に $20K-$30K でローンチ、本年は数百台、2027-2028年にかけて数千・数万台へ漸増)+ 4月28日 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo 製造パートナーシップ + Figure 03 毎時1台量産・夜間完全自律稼働 + Tesla CFO の EV-ロボティクス間設備投資配分コメンタリー相場が、少なくとも1社の Mag-7(Tesla を皮切りに; ≥1 兄弟 — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft)に SEC 義務化前に10-Q で physical-AI 設備投資を別個セグメントまたは脚注として公開させる。これは2014-2015年に SEC が形式化する前に自主公開されたクラウド・セグメント開示と同様のパターン。** 強制要因は開示前例の拡大。クラウド設備投資セグメンテーションは金額が買い手側注意閾値を越えた時点で標準となった。Tesla 年100万台公称(価格目標で年率 ~$25B-$35B)での physical-AI 設備投資は単一施設でその閾値を越え、Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics 商業展開軌道の上に重なる。Q2 量産ライン構築 + Optimus 3 夏ローンチが意味するのは、2026年9月30日終了期間 Tesla 10-Q が初の自然な開示舞台となること。単一の Tesla 脚注開示からの競争圧力で、1-2 件の決算サイクル以内に兄弟 Mag-7 開示が引き寄せられる。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el H2 2026 la construcción línea de producción Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus (líneas heredadas Model S + Model X siendo eliminadas gradualmente para una planta de robótica de primera generación de capacidad nominal 1M-unidades/año; Optimus 3 lanza verano 2026 a $20K-$30K con cientos de unidades en 2026 aumentando a miles luego decenas de miles para 2027-2028) + el partnership manufactura Apollo Apptronik + Jabil del 28 abril + producción Figure 03 a 1/hora con corridas autónomas nocturnas + tape comentario CFO Tesla sobre asignación capex entre EV y robótica forzará a al menos un Mag-7 (Tesla inicialmente; ≥1 hermana — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) a publicar capex físico-AI como segmento separado o nota en 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato SEC, reflejando cómo divulgación de segmento cloud fue primero publicada voluntariamente en 2014-2015 antes de que la SEC lo formalizara.** La función forzante es la expansión de precedente de divulgación: segmentación capex cloud se volvió estándar una vez que las cantidades en dólares cruzaron un umbral de atención buyside; capex físico-AI a la capacidad nominal Tesla 1M-unidades/año (~$25B-$35B anualizado al precio target) cruza ese umbral en una sola facilidad, superpuesto a trayectoria despliegue comercial Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics. La construcción línea-producción Q2 más el lanzamiento Optimus 3 verano significan que Tesla 10-Q para el período terminando 30 sept 2026 es el venue natural de primera divulgación; presión competitiva desde una sola divulgación nota Tesla atraerá una divulgación Mag-7 hermana dentro de uno o dos ciclos de presentación.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **By H2 2026 ang Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines na unti-unting tinatanggal para sa 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 ay mag-la-launch summer 2026 sa $20K-$30K na may daan-daang units sa 2026 na nag-ra-ramp up patungong libu-libo tapos sampu-sampung libo by 2027-2028) + ang Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production sa 1/hour na may overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary sa capex-allocation sa pagitan ng EV at robotics tape ay magpi-pilit sa at least isang Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) na magpa-publish ng physical-AI capex bilang separate segment o footnote sa 10-Q bago ang anumang SEC mandate, mirroring kung paano ang cloud-segment disclosure ay unang pinupublish nang voluntarily noong 2014-2015 bago iyon na-formalize ng SEC.** Ang forcing function ay ang disclosure-precedent expansion: naging standard ang cloud capex segmentation sa sandaling lumampas ang dollar amounts sa buyside-attention threshold; ang physical-AI capex sa Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized sa price target) ay lumampas sa threshold na iyon sa isang facility lamang, layered sa Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. Ang Q2 production-line build-out plus ang Optimus 3 summer launch ay nangangahulugan na ang Tesla 10-Q para sa period ending Sept 30 2026 ang natural na first disclosure venue; competitive pressure mula sa isang Tesla footnote disclosure ay magha-hatak ng sibling Mag-7 disclosure sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles.

description.ja: Mag 7のcapex開示、Alphabet 2026年1,750億〜1,850億ドルcapex、Microsoft Azureのcapex確約、Teslaのコンピュートcapex、Trainium/GB300/Vera Rubin/MAIAアクセラレーターへの確約、5GW Trainium容量、10年コンピュート契約、データセンター電力フットプリント、ハイパースケーラー設備拡大。
description.es: Divulgaciones de capex del Mag 7, capex de Alphabet 2026 de 175-185 mil millones de dólares, compromisos capex de Microsoft Azure, capex de compute de Tesla, compromisos con Trainium/GB300/Vera Rubin/MAIA, capacidad Trainium de 5 GW, acuerdos de compute a 10 años, huella eléctrica de centros de datos, expansión de hiperscaladores.
description.fil: Mag 7 capex disclosures, Alphabet 2026 $175-185B capex, Microsoft Azure capex commitments, Tesla compute capex, Trainium/GB300/Vera Rubin/MAIA accelerator commitments, 5GW Trainium capacity, 10-taong compute deals, data center power footprint, hyperscaler buildout.

nodes.label: Cloud vs Local AI Distribution
nodes.description: Local on-device inference vs hosted cloud frontier AI, edge deployment, cloud-overflow inversion, SMB local-first adoption, distribution model shifts (hosted API vs open-weight download), privacy-driven local choices.

label.en: Cloud vs Local AI Distribution
label.ja: クラウド対ローカルAI配信
label.es: Distribución de IA: nube vs local
label.fil: Cloud vs Lokal na AI

short_label.ja: クラウド対ローカル

description.en: Local on-device inference vs hosted cloud frontier AI, edge deployment, cloud-overflow inversion, SMB local-first adoption, distribution model shifts (hosted API vs open-weight download), privacy-driven local choices.
description.ja: デバイス上のローカル推論対ホスト型クラウドフロンティアAI、エッジ展開、クラウドオーバーフロー逆転、SMBのローカルファースト採用、配信モデルの移行（ホスト型API対オープン重みダウンロード）、プライバシー起因のローカル選択。
description.es: Inferencia local en dispositivo frente a IA frontera alojada en la nube, despliegue en el edge, inversión del desbordamiento cloud, adopción local-first por PYMEs, cambios en el modelo de distribución (API alojada vs descarga de pesos abiertos), elecciones locales motivadas por privacidad.
description.fil: Lokal na on-device inference kumpara sa hosted cloud frontier AI, edge deployment, cloud-overflow inversion, SMB local-first adoption, paglipat ng distribution model (hosted API vs open-weight download), privacy-driven na lokal na pagpili.

detail.subtitle: Theme · Business
detail.description: Local on-device inference vs hosted cloud frontier AI, edge deployment, cloud-overflow inversion, SMB local-first adoption, distribution model shifts (hosted API vs open-weight download), privacy-driven local choices.

nodes.label: Hyperscaler × Frontier Lab Alliance
nodes.description: Exclusive alliance contracts between hyperscalers and frontier AI labs (AWS × Anthropic, Google × Thinking Machines Lab, Microsoft × OpenAI), Tier-1 compute capacity capture, multi-billion compute commitments, capital coupling between cloud providers and labs, GB300 / Trainium exclusivity, platform lock-in via training and serving infrastructure.

label.en: Hyperscaler × Frontier Lab Alliance
label.ja: ハイパースケーラ × フロンティアラボ提携
label.es: Alianza hyperscaler × laboratorio frontier
label.fil: Hyperscaler x Frontier Lab Alliance

short_label.ja: ハイパースケーラ提携

description.en: Exclusive alliance contracts between hyperscalers and frontier AI labs (AWS × Anthropic, Google × Thinking Machines Lab, Microsoft × OpenAI), Tier-1 compute capacity capture, multi-billion compute commitments, capital coupling between cloud providers and labs, GB300 / Trainium exclusivity, platform lock-in via training and serving infrastructure.
description.ja: ハイパースケーラーとフロンティアAIラボ間の独占提携契約（AWS×Anthropic、Google×Thinking Machines Lab、Microsoft×OpenAI）、Tier-1コンピュート容量の確保、数十億ドル規模のコンピュート確約、クラウドプロバイダーとラボ間の資本結合、GB300/Trainiumの排他性、学習・推論インフラによるプラットフォームロックイン。
description.es: Contratos de alianza exclusiva entre hiperscaladores y laboratorios frontier de IA (AWS×Anthropic, Google×Thinking Machines Lab, Microsoft×OpenAI), captura de capacidad de compute Tier-1, compromisos multimillonarios de compute, acoplamiento de capital entre proveedores cloud y labs, exclusividad en GB300/Trainium, lock-in de plataforma vía infraestructura de entrenamiento y serving.
description.fil: Exclusive alliance contracts sa pagitan ng mga hyperscaler at frontier AI labs (AWS×Anthropic, Google×Thinking Machines Lab, Microsoft×OpenAI), Tier-1 compute capacity capture, multi-billion compute commitments, capital coupling sa pagitan ng cloud providers at labs, GB300/Trainium exclusivity, platform lock-in sa pamamagitan ng training at serving infrastructure.

detail.subtitle: Theme · Business

nodes.label: AI Security Compliance Market
nodes.description: AI vulnerability disclosures becoming compliance categories, CVE / CVSS scoring of AI bugs, OWASP LLM Top 10 / OWASP Agentic Top 10, enterprise risk-budget allocation for AI, security-tooling spend (Wiz AI-APP, CrowdStrike, Palo Alto, Zenity, Keycard), FedRAMP for AI, audit / disclosure obligations.

label.en: AI Security Compliance Market
label.ja: AIセキュリティ・コンプライアンス市場
label.es: Mercado de cumplimiento de seguridad de IA
label.fil: Merkado ng AI Security Compliance

short_label.ja: AIセキュリティ・コンプラ

description.en: AI vulnerability disclosures becoming compliance categories, CVE / CVSS scoring of AI bugs, OWASP LLM Top 10 / OWASP Agentic Top 10, enterprise risk-budget allocation for AI, security-tooling spend (Wiz AI-APP, CrowdStrike, Palo Alto, Zenity, Keycard), FedRAMP for AI, audit / disclosure obligations.
description.ja: AI脆弱性開示のコンプライアンス分類への昇格、AIバグへのCVE/CVSSスコアリング、OWASP LLM Top 10・OWASP Agentic Top 10、エンタープライズのAIリスク予算配分、セキュリティツーリング支出（Wiz AI-APP、CrowdStrike、Palo Alto、Zenity、Keycard）、AIへのFedRAMP適用、監査・開示義務。
description.es: Divulgaciones de vulnerabilidades de IA como nuevas categorías de cumplimiento, puntuación CVE/CVSS de bugs de IA, OWASP LLM Top 10/OWASP Agentic Top 10, asignación de presupuesto de riesgo empresarial para IA, gasto en seguridad (Wiz AI-APP, CrowdStrike, Palo Alto, Zenity, Keycard), FedRAMP para IA, obligaciones de auditoría y divulgación.
description.fil: Ang mga AI vulnerability disclosure na nagiging compliance categories, CVE/CVSS scoring ng AI bugs, OWASP LLM Top 10/OWASP Agentic Top 10, enterprise risk-budget allocation para sa AI, security-tooling spend (Wiz AI-APP, CrowdStrike, Palo Alto, Zenity, Keycard), FedRAMP para sa AI, audit at disclosure obligations.
